100TUSuperModeElminaModernBoss.name: Unleashed
100TUSuperModeElminaModernBoss.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 1% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

10PercentHPInstantDefeatAMusashiRegularB.name: Absolute Zero
10PercentHPInstantDefeatAMusashiRegularB.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 10% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

10PercentHPInstantDefeatAMusashiRegular.name: Absolute Zero
10PercentHPInstantDefeatAMusashiRegular.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 10% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

150TUSuperModeElminaModern.name: Overclock
150TUSuperModeElminaModern.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 25% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

200TUBigHealAMusashiRegular.name: Dual Heaven Style
200TUBigHealAMusashiRegular.description:
The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, will enter Dual Heaven Stance for 200TU and Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. While in Dual Heaven Stance, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. Usable if this unit has not defeated any units with attacks or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards and Endure effects cannot stack.

200TUHeal50PercentHPAttackUP50Percent.name: Dual Heaven Stance
200TUHeal50PercentHPAttackUP50Percent.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

200TUHeal5PercentHPAnd30PercentChancePur.description: For another {0}TU, this unit will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.

2AllyEnrageADragonGirlRegularBoss.name: Dragon Fire
2AllyEnrageADragonGirlRegularBoss.description:
Enrages 2 allies and grants them the burn status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

2AllyHealADragonGirlRegular.name: Dragon Breath
2AllyHealADragonGirlRegular.description:
Enrages 2 allies, grants them the burn status effect, and heals them for 100% of max HP. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

4ElementShield.name: Elemental Shield
4ElementShield.description: This unit cannot be defeated if it has not taken attack damage from Earth, Fire, Water and Storm units.

4ElementShieldGoldAngelEX.name: Elemental Shield
4ElementShieldGoldAngelEX.description: This unit cannot be defeated if it has not taken attack damage from Earth, Fire, Water and Storm units.

50DamageReductionIfHPAbove50PercentOrEne.name: Kirin's Strength
50DamageReductionIfHPAbove50PercentOrEne.description: This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has 50%+ of max HP, or if any enemy unit has 100TU or more.

50DamageReductionIfHPAbove50PercentOrEne.name: Kirin's Vigor
50DamageReductionIfHPAbove50PercentOrEne.description: This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has 50%+ of max HP, or if any enemy unit has 100TU or more.

50TUSuperModeElminaModernBoss.name: Unleashed
50TUSuperModeElminaModernBoss.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 1% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

75TUSuperModeElminaModern.name: Overclock
75TUSuperModeElminaModern.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 25% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

AccelerateAttackBoostAlliesAAstridBrideB.name: Go Fast
AccelerateAttackBoostAlliesAAstridBrideB.description: All allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 50%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills.

AccelerateAttackBoostBurningAlliesA.name: Intense Burn
AccelerateAttackBoostBurningAlliesA.description: All allies that have the Burn status effect will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills.

AcceleratedVigorA.name: Healing Quicken
AcceleratedVigorA.description: The user is healed for 30% of max HP and TU costs for all of their skills are reduced by 30% until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effect of previous Quicken skills.

AddingMyHairyFriendPassiveABeautyRegular.name: Dreams Entwined
AddingMyHairyFriendPassiveABeautyRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect. Whenever a Dark ally named Aigis enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

If there is not already a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit adds Aigis to next in line of allied reinforcements at the end of the turn whenever:
- Another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, so long as this unit is not defeated or sacrificed at the same time.
- This unit defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack.

Aigis's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

This unit cannot fall asleep or be stunned if there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

AddingMyHairyFriendPassiveABeautyRegular.name: Dreams Entwined
AddingMyHairyFriendPassiveABeautyRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect. Whenever a Dark ally named Aigis enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

If there is not already a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit adds Aigis to next in line of allied reinforcements at the end of the turn whenever:
- Another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, so long as this unit is not defeated or sacrificed at the same time.
- This unit defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack.

Aigis's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

This unit cannot fall asleep or be stunned if there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

AddSpiritAttackAIbarahimeSwimsuitBoss.name: Spirit Trick
AddSpiritAttackAIbarahimeSwimsuitBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield after this attack.

AfterSchoolPassiveAOniSchoolDarkBoss.name: Dark Cycle
AfterSchoolPassiveAOniSchoolDarkBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- A random ally on the battlefield is healed for 1% of max HP.
- A random ally on the battlefield is Enraged. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects.
- A random ally on the battlefield will have its TU costs for all of its skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of previous quicken skills.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

AfterSchoolPassiveAOniSchoolDark.name: Dark Divinity
AfterSchoolPassiveAOniSchoolDark.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

While there is a poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit is not affected by stun effects.

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, and Stun Ward.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- A random ally on the battlefield is healed for 30% of max HP.
- A random ally on the battlefield is Enraged. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects.
- A random ally on the battlefield will have its TU costs for all of its skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of previous quicken skills.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

airAtkLimit.description: <color=#00edf6>Storm Bane:</color> {0}% Attack increase against Storm units

AllAlliesStealthEntranceifAllyStealthed.name: Shadow Entry
AllAlliesStealthEntranceifAllyStealthed.description: This unit gains the Stealth status effect. All other allies also gain stealth if another ally already has stealth. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

AllAllyBuffABahamutGirlRegularBoss.name: Draconic Strength
AllAllyBuffABahamutGirlRegularBoss.description:
Grants all allies Piercing, and Intense Rage. A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn. Intense Rage increases a units Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be overwritten by Weak effects.

All allies that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill are granted the Burn status effect. Then the user is granted the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU.

Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 150TU after each use.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

AllAllyBuffABahamutGirlRegular.name: Draconic Intensity
AllAllyBuffABahamutGirlRegular.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack, grants them Piercing, and Intense Rage. A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn. Intense Rage increases a unit's Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be overwritten by Weak effects.

All allies that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill are granted the Burn status effect. Then the user is granted the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU.

Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 100TU after each use.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

AllAllyBuffAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Red Dragon Virtue
AllAllyBuffAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
Allies gain 2 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield. All allies on the battlefield heal for 1% of max HP, gain the Burn status effect, and are Enraged.

Then, immediately give all other burning allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. Usable once per battle.

Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

AllAllyBuffAElmKouhaiRegular.name: Inspiring Virtue
AllAllyBuffAElmKouhaiRegular.description:
Allies gain 2 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield. All allies on the battlefield heal for 500% of the user's attack, gain the Armor status effect, and Earthen Might. Then, immediately give all other allies that are at max HP the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, and if no ally has Earthen Might already. Usable once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units. A unit with Earthen Might has 0.5x of their original Attack added to their Attack while they are not burning. This does stack on top of Enrage effects, and other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.5x => 2.0x total), but cannot stack with itself. Earthen Might ends for all allies if the unit who granted it leaves the battlefield, and is removed from units that leave the battlefield.

AllAllyBuffARolotiaDarkBoss.name: Hazy Shroud
AllAllyBuffARolotiaDarkBoss.description:
All non-burning allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills on affected units. Then grants all allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a random ward (either Poison, Stun, or Sleep), and heals them for 1% of the user's attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

AllAllyBuffARolotiaDark.name: Dark Shroud
AllAllyBuffARolotiaDark.description:
All non-burning allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills on affected units. Then grants all allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a random ward (either Poison, Stun, or Sleep), and heals them for 500% of the user's attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

AllAttackABeastRegularBoss.name: Briar Barrage
AllAttackABeastRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. All enemies hit are randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Usable if there are 0 or 1 poisoned enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 30TU after use.

AllAttackABeastRegular.name: Briar Barrage
AllAttackABeastRegular.description:
500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. All enemies hit are randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Usable if there are 0 or 1 poisoned enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 30TU after use.

AllAttackAChopinRegularBoss.name: Grand Finale
AllAttackAChopinRegularBoss.description:
400% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

AllAttackAChopinRegular.name: Grand Finale
AllAttackAChopinRegular.description:
400% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

AllAttackACleopatraDarkBoss.name: Dread Serpent
AllAttackACleopatraDarkBoss.description: Damages all enemies, 600% damage instead to all Poisoned or Sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. All non-burning, non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

AllAttackACleopatraDark.name: Dread Serpent
AllAttackACleopatraDark.description: Damages all enemies, 600% damage instead to all Poisoned or Sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. All non-burning, non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

AllAttackADonQuixoteRegularBoss.name: Dangerous Path
AllAttackADonQuixoteRegularBoss.description:
Targets all enemies. 700% damage to 1 random enemy. 300% damage to all other targets. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

AllAttackADonQuixoteRegular.name: Burning Path
AllAttackADonQuixoteRegular.description:
Targets all enemies. 1500% damage to 1 random enemy. 500% damage to all other targets. Then all allies heal for 500% of the user's attack. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

AllAttackAKingArthurEvilBoss.name: Regal Spikes
AllAttackAKingArthurEvilBoss.description:
200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 500% total damage). The user and another random ally are granted Burn. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

AllAttackAKingArthurEvil.name: Regal Cataclysm
AllAttackAKingArthurEvil.description:
200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 500% total damage). The user and another random ally are granted Stealth and a Stealth Shield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

AllAttackALupinRegularBoss.name: The Ultimate Heist
AllAttackALupinRegularBoss.description:
600% damage to all enemies. 750% damage instead if the user has survived for 100TU or more on the battlefield. 900% damage instead if the user has survived for 200TU or more on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

AllAttackAMyshaKnightBoss.name: Quick Thrust
AllAttackAMyshaKnightBoss.description:
300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. If the user already has Stealth, all other allies will be granted Stealth and a Stealth Shield instead.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

AllAttackAMyshaKnight.name: Sweeping Thrust
AllAttackAMyshaKnight.description:
300% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead if the user has Stealth. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

The user is granted Super Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. If the user already has Stealth, all other allies will be granted Super Stealth and a Stealth Shield instead.

Super Stealth will overwrite other Status effects. Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

AllAttackARolotiaDarkBoss.name: Magical Barrage
AllAttackARolotiaDarkBoss.description:
200% damage to all enemies. If an enemy is poisoned or sleeping, deals 400% damage instead. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each poisoned and sleeping enemy hit. If no enemies are poisoned or sleeping already, each enemy hit is randomly granted either the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU or the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

AllAttackARolotiaDark.name: Magical Barrage
AllAttackARolotiaDark.description:
200% damage to all enemies. If an enemy is poisoned or sleeping, deals 400% damage instead. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each poisoned and sleeping enemy hit. If no enemies are poisoned or sleeping already, each enemy hit is randomly granted either the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU or the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

AllAttackASiegfriedRegularBoss.name: Snow Under
AllAttackASiegfriedRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to all enemies. 700% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU+ on the battlefield. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. All enemies hit are then granted Frostburn.

Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield. This lock is ignored while all enemies on the battlefield are sleeping, burning or frostburned. Usable once per battle.

When a unit has Frostburn and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping, then Frostburn is removed and that unit is granted the Burn status effect. Frostburn is not a status effect, but effects that remove negative status effects will also remove Frostburn. Frostburn will end if the affected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Frostburn cannot apply to boss units, and cannot stack. Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

AllAttackASiegfriedRegular.name: Snow Storm
AllAttackASiegfriedRegular.description:
500% damage to all enemies. 700% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU+ on the battlefield. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. All enemies hit are then granted Frostburn.

Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield or until a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Usable once per battle.

When a unit has Frostburn and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping, then Frostburn is removed and that unit is granted the Burn status effect. Frostburn is not a status effect, but effects that remove negative status effects will also remove Frostburn. Frostburn will end if the affected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Frostburn cannot apply to boss units, and cannot stack. Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

AllAttackAVictoriaRegularBoss.name: Downpour
AllAttackAVictoriaRegularBoss.description:
Targets all enemies. Deals either 900%, 600%, or 300% damage, chosen at random for each target. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if the user has used Étoile's Fury since this skill was last used. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

AllAttackAVictoriaRegular.name: Downpour
AllAttackAVictoriaRegular.description:
Targets all enemies. Deals either 900%, 600%, or 300% damage, chosen at random for each target. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if the user has used Étoile's Fury since this skill was last used. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

AllAttackAWashingtonRegularBoss.name: Missile Storm
AllAttackAWashingtonRegularBoss.description:
Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Each enemy hit is then randomly granted either the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU (even if they have already slept while on the battlefield), or Frostburn. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. When a unit has Frostburn and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping, then Frostburn is removed and that unit is granted the Burn status effect. Frostburn is not a status effect, but effects that remove negative status effects will also remove Frostburn. Frostburn will end if the affected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Frostburn cannot apply to boss units, and cannot stack. Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

AllAttackAWashingtonRegular.name: Missile Storm
AllAttackAWashingtonRegular.description:
Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Each enemy hit is then randomly granted either the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU (even if they have already slept while on the battlefield), or Frostburn. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. When a unit has Frostburn and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping, then Frostburn is removed and that unit is granted the Burn status effect. Frostburn is not a status effect, but effects that remove negative status effects will also remove Frostburn. Frostburn will end if the affected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Frostburn cannot apply to boss units, and cannot stack. Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

AllAttackLightningAKiringGirlRegularBoss.name: Divine Lightning
AllAttackLightningAKiringGirlRegularBoss.description:
Targets all enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, all non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemies hit that have 1HP remaining have a 25% chance each to be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Usable once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

AllAttackLightningAKiringGirlRegular.name: Divine Lightning
AllAttackLightningAKiringGirlRegular.description:
Targets all enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, all non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemies hit that have 1HP remaining have a 25% chance each to be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Usable once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

AllAttackSpiritGainANapoleonRegularBoss.name: Vive la Révolution!
AllAttackSpiritGainANapoleonRegularBoss.description: 50% damage to all enemies, 200% damage if user has survived on the battlefield for 200TU or more. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy hit above 50TU in the turn order, or 2 Spirit for each above 100TU. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

AllAttackSpiritGainANapoleonRegular.name: Revolution!
AllAttackSpiritGainANapoleonRegular.description: 50% damage to all enemies, 200% damage if user has survived on the battlefield for 200TU or more. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy hit at 50+ TU in the turn order, or 2 Spirit for each at 100+ TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

AllEnemyBuffAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Hot Flare
AllEnemyBuffAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
Targets all enemies. All burning targets are weakened and granted a Rage ward. All non-burning targets are stunned for 50TU.

Usable if at least 1 enemy on the battlefield is not burning. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

AllEnemyBuffAElmKouhaiRegular.name: Pacifying Flare
AllEnemyBuffAElmKouhaiRegular.description:
Targets all enemies. All burning targets are weakened and granted a Rage ward. All non-burning targets are granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. Then all non-sleeping targets are granted the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU, and all non-burning allies are granted Sleep Thorns.

Usable if at least 1 enemy on the battlefield is not burning. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects.

AllOutOffenseAHijikataRegular.name: Unwavering Demon
AllOutOffenseAHijikataRegular.description:
Poison cannot be applied to this unit while it has the Stealth status effect.

This unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements unless there is a non-Mori Guardian among allies on the battlefield.

Unless there is a non-Mori Guardian among allies on the battlefield, this unit has:
- Attack increased to 1.5x. This effect does not stack with Enrage skills.
- TU costs for all active skills reduced by 40%. This effect does not stack with Quicken skills.

AllPlagueARoundTableKnightDarkBoss.name: Unleash Hell
AllPlagueARoundTableKnightDarkBoss.description:
300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. 450% damage if the user has defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefield, 600% if the user has defeated 2+ units. Grants all Mega Poisoned enemies Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then, grants all Super Poisoned enemies Mega Poison for 200TU. Then grants Super Poison to all other enemies that were hit.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

AllPlagueARoundTableKnightDark.name: Unleash Hell
AllPlagueARoundTableKnightDark.description:
300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. 450% damage if the user has defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefield, 600% if the user has defeated 2+ units. Grants all Mega Poisoned enemies Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then, grants all Super Poisoned enemies Mega Poison for 200TU. Then grants Super Poison to all other enemies that were hit.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

AllUnitBuffAVenusRegularBoss.name: Last Chance At Love
AllUnitBuffAVenusRegularBoss.description:
All allies on the battlefield are granted the Armor status effect, and healed for 50% of max HP. Usable if the user is on or below 50% of max HP. Usable 1 time per battle.

Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units.

AllUnitBuffAVenusRegular.name: Overflowing Love
AllUnitBuffAVenusRegular.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1500% of the user's attack. Removes Sleep, Burn and Poison (including Deep Sleep, Mega Healing Burn, and Lethal Poison) from all allies. For each type of status effect removed, the user is granted an immunity to that status effect for 50TU.

Then all allies are Purified (any negative status effects are removed).

Usable if an ally on the battlefield is burning, sleeping or poisoned. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

AllyAndEnemyBuffAThorRegular.name: Thunder Shield
AllyAndEnemyBuffAThorRegular.description:
For each ally on the battlefield that is Sleeping or on or below 95% of max HP, Allies gain 1 Spirit, and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Then all allies on the battlefield heal for 1000% of the user's attack, are Purified (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and granted a Stun Ward and Sleep Ward.

Usable if any ally on the battlefield is on or below 95% of max HP. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

AllyBuffALudmillaBalletBoss.name: Dance Training
AllyBuffALudmillaBalletBoss.description:
Purifies (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison) all allies on the battlefield. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield.

Then if ally Spirit is:
- At least 5 but less than 10, a random ally is Enraged, and given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.
- 10, all allies are Enraged, and given the next turns by reducing their current TU.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

AllyBuffALudmillaBallet.name: Lead the Dance
AllyBuffALudmillaBallet.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 500% of the user's attack, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield.

Then if ally Spirit is:
- At least 5 but less than 10, a random ally is granted Intense Rage, and given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.
- 10, all allies are granted Intense Rage, and given the next turns by reducing their current TU.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. Intense Rage increases a units Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be by Weak effects.

AllyBuffAMyshaKnight.name: Stealth Alliance
AllyBuffAMyshaKnight.description:
Immediately give all other allies that have a Stealth Strike type active skill or Stealth the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Then heals all allies on the battlefield for 100% of their max HP, and grants them Super Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Usable if 2+ allies on the battlefield have Stealth. This skill is locked for 100TU after use. Usable 3 times per battle.

AllyBuffARyomaRegularBoss.name: Healing Leaves
AllyBuffARyomaRegularBoss.description:
Removes Poison (including Lethal Poison) and Sleep from all allies on the battlefield. For each status effect removed in this way, Allies steal up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team, and a random enemy is granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU.

Then all allies on the battlefield:
- Heal for 1% of the user's attack.
- Gain Stealth, a Stealth Shield, Poison Ward and Sleep Ward.
- Are granted Stun Resist Lv5 for 50TU (Reduce the amount of any stun effects against the unit by 50TU).

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

AllyBuffARyomaRegular.name: Dancing Leaves
AllyBuffARyomaRegular.description:
Removes Poison (including Lethal Poison) and Sleep from all allies on the battlefield. For each status effect removed in this way, Allies steal up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team, and a random enemy is granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU.

Then all allies on the battlefield:
- Heal for 800% of the user's attack.
- Gain Stealth, a Stealth Shield, Poison Ward and Sleep Ward.
- Are granted Stun Resist Lv5 for 50TU (Reduce the amount of any stun effects against the unit by 50TU).

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

AllyBuffASnowWhiteNewBoss.name: Deadly Snow
AllyBuffASnowWhiteNewBoss.description:
A random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on or below 25% of max HP and on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This health threshold is increased by 25% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 100% of max HP after being used 3 times or more). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable 10 times per battle.

AllyBuffASnowWhiteNew.name: Fateful Snow
AllyBuffASnowWhiteNew.description:
Removes Poison and Sleep (including Deep Sleep, and Lethal Poison) from all allies on the battlefield. All allies on the battlefield heal for 500% of the user's attack.

Then a random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on or below 25% of max HP and on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This health threshold is increased by 25% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 100% of max HP after being used 3 times or more). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user uses another active skill. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable 10 times per battle.

AllyBuffAVictoriaRegularBoss.name: Crown of Power
AllyBuffAVictoriaRegularBoss.description:
Grants all allies on the battlefield the Armor status effect. The user gains a Power Charge.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Usable once per battle. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units.

AllyBuffAVictoriaRegular.name: Height of Power
AllyBuffAVictoriaRegular.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 500% of the user's attack, and grants them the Armor status effect. The user gains a Power Charge.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Usable 10 times per battle. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units.

AllyBuffAZeusRegularBoss.name: Zeus's Whim
AllyBuffAZeusRegularBoss.description:
The user is granted 3 Charges, Sleep Immunity for 100TU, Stun Immunity for 100TU, and the Armor status effect. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units.

Then all allies on the battlefield have their current TU reduced by 50TU.

Unlocked each time the user defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use.

AllyBuffAZeusRegular.name: Zeus's Blessing
AllyBuffAZeusRegular.description:
The user is granted 3 Charges.

All non-fire and non-water allies on the battlefield are granted Sleep Immunity for 100TU, Stun Immunity for 100TU (this cannot apply to Stun Absorbers), and the Armor status effect. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units.

Then all allies on the battlefield heal for 1000% of the user's attack, and have their current TU reduced by 50TU.

Unlocked each time the user defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use.

AllyHealBuffAKongmingRegularBoss.name: Striking Heat
AllyHealBuffAKongmingRegularBoss.description: Targets 2 other allies. Those allies are healed for 1% of max HP, are granted the Burn status effect, and Sleep Wards. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with an attack. Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield.

AllyHealBuffAKongmingRegular.name: Piercing Heat
AllyHealBuffAKongmingRegular.description:
Targets 2 other random allies. Those allies are healed for 100% of max HP, are granted the Burn status effect, and Piercing. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with an attack. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield.

A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn.

AloneBuffAFrankensteinRegularDoll.name: Mary, Unstoppable
AloneBuffAFrankensteinRegularDoll.description:
This unit cannot be Stunned. This unit cannot fall asleep if "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" is among allies on the battlefield.

If "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" is not among allies on the battlefield, this unit has:
- Attack increased to 1.5x. This effect does not stack with Enrage skills.
- 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- TU costs for all active skills reduced by 50%. This effect does not stack with Quicken skills.

AngryChargingBlastACinderellaDarkBoss.name: Shatter Blast
AngryChargingBlastACinderellaDarkBoss.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield.

After damage is dealt the user becomes enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and has a 50% chance to immediately get the next turn. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

AngryChargingBlastACinderellaDark.name: Shatter Blast
AngryChargingBlastACinderellaDark.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield.

After damage is dealt the user becomes enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and has a 50% chance to immediately get the next turn. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

ArmorAllyA.name: Grant Armor
ArmorAllyA.description: Grants the Armor status effect to 1 ally. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

ArmorAllyDoubleA.name: Grant Armor
ArmorAllyDoubleA.description: Grants the Armor status effect to 2 allies. This will overwrite other status effects on these units. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

ArmorAttackA.name: Armor Attack
ArmorAttackA.description: Damage to 1 enemy. The user is also granted the Armor status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

Armor.name: Armor
Armor.description: Status Effect: 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then this effect is removed. Other status effects will overwrite this one. Armor has no effect on skills that don't deal damage.

ArmorHealAllyA.name: Healing Armor
ArmorHealAllyA.description: Heal 1 other ally for HP equal to 200% of the user's Attack. The target also gains the Armor status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

ArmorPoisonImmuneJointSpiritChargeAJeann.name: Holy Protection
ArmorPoisonImmuneJointSpiritChargeAJeann.description: Grants the Armor status effect and Poison Ward to the user and allied Light units named Mikaela. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those units. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Poison Ward prevents Poison from being applied once, then is removed. Poison Wards cannot stack.

ArmorSelfSpiritChargeA.name: Armor Charge
ArmorSelfSpiritChargeA.description: The user gains the Armor status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Usable only if the user does not have armor already.

ArmorSkinA.name: Armor Skin
ArmorSkinA.description: This unit gains the Armor status effect after taking damage from an attack while it does not have Armor. This will overwrite other status effects on the unit. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

ArmorStealthHPGateDoubleACowGirl.name: Defense Charm
ArmorStealthHPGateDoubleACowGirl.description: Grants 2 allies the Armor status effect. Grants the Stealth status effect instead if the ally has less than 50% of max HP. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. This skill becomes locked after use until the user activates another active skill. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.  Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

AstralCannonADaVinciRegularBoss.name: Cosmic Cannon
AstralCannonADaVinciRegularBoss.description:
Consumes a Power Charge. 400% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

If damage from this attack defeats a non-conjured enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

AstralCannonADaVinciRegular.name: Cosmic Cannon
AstralCannonADaVinciRegular.description:
Consumes a Power Charge. 400% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

If damage from this attack defeats a non-conjured enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

AstralSweepADaVinciRegularBoss.name: Shining Sweep
AstralSweepADaVinciRegularBoss.description: 250% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Steals up to 1 Spirit from enemies for each enemy hit.

AstralSweepADaVinciRegular.name: Star Sweep
AstralSweepADaVinciRegular.description: 250% damage to all enemies and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Steals up to 1 Spirit from enemies for each enemy hit.

AttackAndHasteUp50PercentLupinRegularBos.name: Phantom Form
AttackAndHasteUp50PercentLupinRegularBos.description: This unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x, and has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs. This alone will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.

AttackAndHPUp3Air.name: Storm ATK & HP Up
AttackAndHPUp3Air.description: Allied Storm element units have their Attack increased by 2% and max HP increased by 1%.

AttackAndHPUp3Death.description: Allied Dark element units have their Attack increased by 2% and max HP increased by 1%.

AttackAndHPUp3Water.description: Allied Water element units have their Attack increased by 2% and max HP increased by 1%.

AttackAndHPUp4Air.description: Allied Storm element units have their Attack increased by 4% and max HP increased by 3%.

AttackAndHPUp4Death.description: Allied Dark element units have their Attack increased by 4% and max HP increased by 3%.

AttackAndHPUp5Air.description: Allied Storm element units have their Attack increased by 7% and max HP increased by 5%.

AttackAndHPUp5Death.description: Allied Dark element units have their Attack increased by 7% and max HP increased by 5%.

AttackAndHPUp5Earth.description: Allied Earth element units have their Attack increased by 7% and max HP increased by 5%.

AttackAndHPUp5FireDojo.description: Allied Fire element units have their Attack increased by 7% and max HP increased by 5%.

AttackAndHPUp6Air.description: Allied Storm element units have their Attack increased by 10% and max HP increased by 7%.

AttackAndHPUp6Death.name: Dark ATK & HP Up
AttackAndHPUp6Death.description: Allied Dark element units have their Attack increased by 10% and max HP increased by 7%.

AttackAndHPUp6Water.name: Water ATK & HP Up
AttackAndHPUp6Water.description: Allied Water element units have their Attack increased by 10% and max HP increased by 7%.

AttackHasteUp4EnemiesHPBelow50Percent2.name: Offense Up
AttackHasteUp4EnemiesHPBelow50Percent2.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 50% or less of max HP.

AttackHasteUp4UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: Offense Up
AttackHasteUp4UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

AttackHasteUp4UserHpMax.name: Offense Up
AttackHasteUp4UserHpMax.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

AttackHasteUp5EnemiesHPBelow50Percent2.name: Offense Up
AttackHasteUp5EnemiesHPBelow50Percent2.description: 10% bonus to attacks and 8% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 50% or less of max HP.

AttackHasteUp5UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: Offense Up
AttackHasteUp5UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 10% bonus to attacks and 8% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

AttackHasteUp5UserHpMax.name: Offense Up
AttackHasteUp5UserHpMax.description: 10% bonus to attacks and 8% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

AttackHasteUp6EnemiesHPBelow50Percent2.name: Offense Up
AttackHasteUp6EnemiesHPBelow50Percent2.description: 15% bonus to attacks and 10% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 50% or less of max HP.

AttackHasteUp6UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: Offense Up

AutoHealLife.description: After each turn this unit takes, all Light units will be healed for 30% of their max HP.

AutoLifeFlipClonesOnMyTurnGyurelleBossB.name: Mass Auto Life Flip
AutoLifeFlipClonesOnMyTurnGyurelleBossB.description: When this unit gets the turn, all Evil Gyurelles with less than 50% HP exchange their current HP with the amount of HP they have currently lost.

AutoLifeFlipClonesOnMyTurnGyurelleBoss.name: Mass Auto Life Flip
AutoLifeFlipClonesOnMyTurnGyurelleBoss.description: When this unit gets the turn, all Mega Gyurelles with less than 50% HP exchange their current HP with the amount of HP they have currently lost.

AutoLifeFlipClonesOnMyTurnGyurelle.name: Mass Auto Life Flip
AutoLifeFlipClonesOnMyTurnGyurelle.description: When this unit gets the turn, all Earth ally Gyurelles with less than 50% HP exchange their current HP with the amount of HP they have currently lost.

AutoLifeFlipOnMyTurn.name: Auto Life Flip
AutoLifeFlipOnMyTurn.description: When this unit gets the turn with less than 50% HP, this unit exchanges its current HP with the amount of HP it has currently lost.

AutoProtectDamageReducWhileThorned.name: Thorn Wall
AutoProtectDamageReducWhileThorned.description: If this unit has Sleep Thorns, this unit will become a Guardian and will have 50% damage reduction from attacks until it loses Sleep Thorns. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

AutoProtect.name: Auto Guard
AutoProtect.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 60% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

AutoProtectIfAllyStealthedAfterTurn.name: Stealth Protect
AutoProtectIfAllyStealthedAfterTurn.description: This unit will gain Guard Once whenever another ally gains the Stealth status effect from an Active Skill during an ally turn. For the next enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the attacks is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This effect will go away only if this unit redirects an attack, targeting this unit directly will not remove it. This unit cannot have the Counter Stance status effect while it has guard once.

AutoProtectOnMyTurn.name: Auto Guard
AutoProtectOnMyTurn.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 60% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

AutoProtectSourcePlusAndStunAbsorberBoss.name: Lightning Rod
AutoProtectSourcePlusAndStunAbsorberBoss.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit is a Stun Absorber. Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead.

AutoProtectSourcePlusAndStunAbsorberEBB.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit is a Stun Absorber. Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead.

AutoProtectSourcePlus.name: Auto Guard+
AutoProtectSourcePlus.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

AutoProtectSourcePlusIcon.name: Auto Guard+
AutoProtectSourcePlusIcon.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

AutoProtectSourcePlusWithHeal3TimesBoost.name: Divine Guard+
AutoProtectSourcePlusWithHeal3TimesBoost.description:
If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

AutoProtectSourcePlusWithHealDamageReduc.name: Heavenly Guard
AutoProtectSourcePlusWithHealDamageReduc.description:
If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 5% of max HP. This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 60% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

AutoProtectSourcePlusWithHeal.name: Divine Guard
AutoProtectSourcePlusWithHeal.description: If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

AutoProtectSourceWithDamageReduceWhileEn.name: Unholy Guard
AutoProtectSourceWithDamageReduceWhileEn.description: 10% damage reduction from attacks if an enemy is poisoned. This increases by 10% for each enemy poisoned beyond the first, up to a maximum of 40% damage reduction if 4 enemies are poisoned. This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

AutoProtectWhileAngelPresent.name: Twin Guardian
AutoProtectWhileAngelPresent.description: If there is a Water ally named Mikaela on the battlefield this unit is a Guardian and has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

BadFriendSubstituteBoss.name: Dark Substitute
BadFriendSubstituteBoss.description:
While there is an Imposter among enemies on the battlefield:
- This unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage.
- If this unit would be defeated by an attack while it does not have Endure, this unit will be Purified and healed for 100% of max HP, and then an enemy Imposter will be sacrificed.

This unit enters battle with Endure.

A unit with Endure will endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

BadFriendSubstitute.name: Soul Substitute
BadFriendSubstitute.description:
While there is an Imposter among enemies on the battlefield:
- This unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage.
- If this unit would be defeated by an attack while it does not have Endure, this unit will be Purified and healed for 100% of max HP, and then an enemy Imposter will be sacrificed.

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Endure. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

A unit with Endure will endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

BadStatusEaterDoubleAMechaBrideBoss.name: Omni Devour
BadStatusEaterDoubleAMechaBrideBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned, sleeping or burned. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction.

BalanceChangesNews2.description:
We would like to announce some changes to existing characters that have been made in the latest update.

General Skill Adjustments:

-The passive skill "Crisis Armor" now activates when Spirit is 1 or less. (Crescent, Maxima, Fornaxos)
-The passive skill "Verge Focus" is now "Crisis Focus", and no longer requires any other Fire allies to activate. (Fornaxos, Antares)
-The active skill "Crisis Avenger" can now be used when Spirit is 1 or less, the TU cost is reduced to 130. The unconditional damage is now 250%. (Antares, Maxima)

Adjustments to SSR Characters:

Maxima:
-Maxima's active skill "Burn Command" can now give turn to non-burning allies, the TU cost is reduced to 130.

Fornaxos:
-Fornaxos's active skill "Energy Charge" has its TU cost reduced to 50.
-Fornaxos's active skill "Tribute Charge" has its Spirit cost reduced to -1.
-Fornaxos's active skill "Crisis Flare" is changed to "Charge Flare".

Oumei:
-Oumei's active skill "Spirit Reset" no longer requires any other Earth allies or costs any spirit to activate.

Merdain:
-Merdain's active skill "Poison Frenzy" has its TU cost reduced to 100.
-Merdain's passive skill "Augment: Armor" no longer requires any other Dark allies to activate.

Lucius:
-Lucius's active skill "Over Drive" no longer requires any other Light allies to activate. The TU cost is reduced to 160.
-Lucius's passive skill "Spirit Armor" now activates when Spirit is 7 or more, and no longer requires any other Light allies to activate.
-Lucius's passive skill "Augment: Counter" no longer requires any other Light allies to activate.

Artimeia:
-Artimeia's active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Purify".
-Artimeia's passive skill "Shocking Entry" no longer requires an enemy on 150TU or more to activate.
-Artimeia has gained the passive skill "Spirit+ Entry".

Grenzor:
-Grenzor's passive skill "Spirit+ Entry" no longer require any other Water allies to activate.

Vonn:
-Vonn's active skill "Attack" is changed to "Poison".
-Vonn's active skill "Blood Nova" has its TU cost reduced to 130.
-Vonn's passive skill "Summon Entry" no longer requires any other Dark allies to activate.

Adjustments to SR Characters:

Antares:
-Antares's passive skill "Verge Heal Entry" is now "Crisis Heal Entry". There is no change in the effect.

Crescent:
-Crescent's active skill "Crisis Frenzy" can now be used when Spirit is 1 or less.

Baltruk:
-Baltruk's Speed is increased to 371.
-Baltruk's active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Purify".

Adjustments to R Characters:

Lucija:
-Lucija's active skill "Vengeance Strike" is changed to "Payback Strike".

Sherry:
-Sherry's active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Sleep".

We hope you continue to enjoy playing Evertale!

BalanceChangesNews3.description:
We would like to announce some changes to existing characters that have been made in the latest update.

Adjustments to SSR Characters:

Alice:
-Alice's active skill "Dawn's Light" has had its Spirit cost reduced to -1.
-Tavun Rabbit's active skill "Sleep" has had its Spirit cost reduced to -3 and TU cost reduced to 130.
-Tavun Rabbit has gained the active skill "Sleep Bomb".

Rei:
-Rei's active skill "Dream Hunter" has its TU cost reduced to 130.
-Rei has gained the passive skill "Sleep Regeneration".

Voraxion:
-Voraxion's attack when Ultra Evolved has been increased.

We hope you continue to enjoy playing Evertale!

BalanceChangesNews4.description:
We would like to announce some changes to the SSR character "Rizette - Lightbearing Leader" (Light element) that have been made in the latest update.

-Rizette's active skill "Shock Wave" has been changed to a new skill with the same TU and Spirit costs named "Counter Shock":

"Damage to all enemies. Enemies damaged by this attack are stunned for 50TU. The user is also granted the Counter Stance status effect. This will overwrite any other status effect on the user. For 150TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Counter stance cannot be gained if the user already has the Counter Stance status effect or has gotten the current turn from Counter Stance. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use."

-Rizette has gained the new passive skill "Survivor's Power":

"This unit's Attack is increased by 25% if this unit has survived for 150TU on the battlefield. This increase becomes 50% if this unit has survived for 300TU on the battlefield. This effect does not stack with Enrage skills."

Thank you for playing Evertale.

BalanceChangesNews5.description:
We would like to announce some changes to existing SSR characters that have been made in the latest update:

Astrid - Hero of the West (Fire):
-Astrid's active skill "Attack Two" has been changed to "Brash Strike".
-Astrid's active skill "Burn Blast" has had its damage increased to 300%.
-Astrid's active skill "Quicken Burn" has been changed to the new skill "Intense Burn".
-Astrid's passive skill "Burn Regeneration" has been changed to "Regeneration".

Akatsuki:
-Akatsuki's active skill "Attack" has been changed to the new skill "Ignition Attack".


TU Cost Adjustments:

The TU Cost of the active skill "Poison Devour" has been reduced to 130 for the following characters:
-Vonn
-Le Fay
-Oumei

The TU Cost of the active skill "Dream Hunter" has been reduced to 130 for the following characters:
-Nagi
-Rizette - The Cerulean Crestbearer (Water)

The TU Cost of the active skill "Over Drive" has been reduced to 130 for the following characters:
-Nagi
-Grenzor

In addition, all SSR Characters listed in the above changes have had their Attack and HP increased.

Thank you for playing Evertale!

BalanceChangesNews.description:
We would like to announce some changes to existing characters that have been made in the latest update.

Adjustments to SSR Characters:
-Le Fay: Le Fay's passive skill "Poison Skin" no longer requires any other Dark allies to activate.
-Imran: Imran's passive skill "Stun Skin" no longer requires any other Storm allies to activate.
-Shirra: Shirra's active skill "Poison Devour" now targets two enemies.

Adjustments to SR Characters:
-Inanna: Inanna's active skill "Attack" is changed to "Poison", and her active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Poison Devour".
-Kemek: Kemek's active skill "Attack" is changed to "Poison Attack".
-Beryx: Beryx's active skill "Vengeance Strike" now targets two enemies, the TU cost is adjusted to 160.
-En Soldier: En Soldier's active skill "Stun Spark" now targets two enemies.
-Jedariel: Jedariel's active skill "Vengeance Strike" is changed to "Savage Force".

Adjustments to R Characters:
-Kavaat Merc: Kavaat Merc's active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Triumph Stun".
-Alina: Alina's active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Stun Bomb".
-Petra: Petra's active skill "Attack Two" is changed to "Poison", and her active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Poison Devour".
- Trevyn: Trevyn's active skill "Survivor's Fury" is changed to "Survival Bomb".
-Eves: Eves's active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Sleep". His active skill "Life Flip" is changed to "Dream Hunter".
-Luna: Luna's active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Sleep Bomb".
-Ludorié: Ludorié's active skill "Attack All" is changed to "Purify".

We hope you continue to enjoy playing Evertale!

BandsAllHerePassiveAMechaSisterBandBoss.name: Harmonic Beat
BandsAllHerePassiveAMechaSisterBandBoss.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 1% of its max HP.

BandsAllHerePassiveAMechaSisterBand.name: Harmonic Maiden
BandsAllHerePassiveAMechaSisterBand.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has Sleep immunity and Stun immunity.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 50% of its max HP.

Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit is healed for 100% of max HP.

BarrierBurstAMechaBride.name: Aegis Overload
BarrierBurstAMechaBride.description:
300% damage to all enemies and heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. All allies will become Enraged and all enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

The user will also have their Power Barrier passive skill reactivated and gain a Power Charge. Usable only if the user's Power Barrier passive skill is deactivated and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

- Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.
- Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.
- Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

BarrierPassiveABahamutGirlRegular.name: Radiant Heat
BarrierPassiveABahamutGirlRegular.description:
This unit has 35% damage reduction from attacks.

This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

When this unit enters battle, all allies will be granted Heated Barrier. A unit with Heated Barrier will gain 35% damage reduction from attacks if they are burning. Allies that enter from reinforcements will be granted a Heated Barrier as long as this unit is on the battlefield. Heated Barrier's effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as this passive skill's damage reduction effect, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills. Heated Barrier are removed from units that leave the battlefield.

Whenever a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, all allies are healed for 100% of max HP. Then all allies that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill are granted the Burn status effect.

BarrierUntilBlockDeathHealActive.name: Power Barrier
BarrierUntilBlockDeathHealActive.description:
