This unit's Barrier is activated. Until it is deactivated, the following effects are active:

- Allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.
- This unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage.
- If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP.
- If this unit would be defeated by an attack, this Barrier will be deactivated and this unit will be Purified and healed for 100% of max HP.

BasicAllAttackAKongmingRegularBoss.name: Disks of Fire
BasicAllAttackAKongmingRegularBoss.description:
200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% damage). The user is then granted the Burn status effect. Heals the user for 1% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user.  Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

BasicAllAttackAKongmingRegular.name: Rings of Fire
BasicAllAttackAKongmingRegular.description:
200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% damage). The user is then granted the Burn status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

BasicAttackAElizabethRegularBoss.name: Queen's Slash
BasicAttackAElizabethRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, this skill will randomly deal either 400% or 600% damage instead. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

BasicAttackAElizabethRegular.name: Queen's Slash
BasicAttackAElizabethRegular.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, this skill will randomly deal either 400% or 600% damage instead. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

BattlecruiserEntryPassiveYamatoRegular.name: Anchors Away
BattlecruiserEntryPassiveYamatoRegular.description:
When this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements and there are no other non-Mori ally Guardians on the battlefield, all allies:
- Are healed for 1000% of this unit's attack.
- Have their current TU reduced by 50TU.
- Gain the Armor status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

This unit has 10% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% per Awakening (up to 50% reduction if this unit has 4 Awakenings) until the end of its first turn since entering the battlefield.

BerserkAttackSingleADarkFinn.name: Wild Slash
BerserkAttackSingleADarkFinn.description: 150% damage to a random enemy. This attack ignores Guardians.

BigAttackAMechaSisterBandBoss.name: Disabling Music
BigAttackAMechaSisterBandBoss.description:
300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

All enemies hit have their Active Skills disabled for 10TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Spirited Tune. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

BigAttackAMechaSisterBand.name: Disabling Chorus
BigAttackAMechaSisterBand.description:
300% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has used Center Stage 3 times in this battle. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

All enemies hit have their Active Skills disabled for 10TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Spirited Beat. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

BigAttackUp4User2Kills.name: Attack Up
BigAttackUp4User2Kills.description: 15% bonus to attacks if this unit has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BigAttackUp5User2Kills.name: Attack Up
BigAttackUp5User2Kills.description: 25% bonus to attacks if this unit has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BigAttackUp6User2Kills.name: Attack Up
BigAttackUp6User2Kills.description: 35% bonus to attacks if this unit has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BigAttackUpTargetHighTU.name: Auto Time Strike
BigAttackUpTargetHighTU.description: 50% bonus to attacks against units that have a current TU of 130 or more. This bonus is increased to 100% against units that have a current TU of 200 or more.

BigAttackUpTargetProtector.name: Auto Guard Breaker
BigAttackUpTargetProtector.description: 50% bonus to attacks against units that are Guardians.

BigBuffAKintaroRegularBoss.name: Golden Prize
BigBuffAKintaroRegularBoss.description:
Grants all allies Sleep Thorns.

Then the user is granted 3 Charges.

Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

BigBuffAKintaroRegular.name: Golden Will
BigBuffAKintaroRegular.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 500% of the user's attack, and grants each of them a Sleep Ward, Poison Ward, and Sleep Thorns.

Then the user is granted 3 Charges, cannot be defeated for the next 100TU, and has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50% for 100TU. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs. This alone will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.

Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

BigHeal1Icon.name: Divine Guard+
BigHeal1Icon.description:
75% Healing triggers left: 1

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield. This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

BigHeal2Icon.name: Divine Guard+
BigHeal2Icon.description:
75% Healing triggers left: 2

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield. This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

BigHeal3Icon.name: Divine Guard+
BigHeal3Icon.description:
75% Healing triggers left: 3

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield. This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

BigHeartPassiveAVenusRegular.name: Boundless Beauty
BigHeartPassiveAVenusRegular.description:
This unit enters battle with 2 Charges. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

This unit will gain a Charge at the end of the turn each time:
- an ally gets the turn.
- a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

If this unit has at least:
- 2 Charges, it will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target all allies will not be ignored.
- 3 Charges at the start of its turn, this unit will Enrage all allies on the battlefield at the end of that turn. An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 50% of its max HP. This heal is increased to 100% if this unit has any allies on the battlefield or in reinforcements.

BigSelfBuffALupinRegularBoss.name: Contingency Plan
BigSelfBuffALupinRegularBoss.description:
The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and will enter Phantom Form.

Usable if at least 1 ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP or if a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield. Usable once per battle.

While in Phantom Form, the user's Attack is increased to 1.5x, and has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs. This alone will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

BigSingleAttackABeautyRegular01.name: Belle of the Ball
BigSingleAttackABeautyRegular01.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. Then grants that enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This attack ignores Guardians, and damage reduction effects.

Usable only if there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 25TU.

BigSingleAttackABeautyRegularBoss01.name: Belle of the Ball
BigSingleAttackABeautyRegularBoss01.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU. Then grants that enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This attack ignores Guardians, and damage reduction effects.

Usable only if there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 25TU.

BigSingleAttackACalKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Combo Scorch
BigSingleAttackACalKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if all allies on the battlefield are burning. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

BigSingleAttackACalKouhaiRegular.name: Combo Blaze
BigSingleAttackACalKouhaiRegular.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if all allies on the battlefield are burning. This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, and ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

BigSingleAttackAMusashiDarkBoss.name: Absolute Slaughter
BigSingleAttackAMusashiDarkBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

Usable 10 times per battle.

BigSingleAttackAMusashiDark.name: Absolute Slaughter
BigSingleAttackAMusashiDark.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

Usable 10 times per battle.

BigSingleAttackAPeachGirlRegularBoss.name: Unstoppable Love
BigSingleAttackAPeachGirlRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted a Power Charge. 600% damage instead if the target is poisoned. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

BigSingleAttackAPeachGirlRegular.name: Inescapable Love
BigSingleAttackAPeachGirlRegular.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted a Power Charge. 700% damage instead if the target is sleeping or burning. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

If this damage does not defeat the target, the user exchanges that enemy with an Imposter. The exchanged enemy will be sent to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. This will not trigger if the target is Immovable or if there are less than 4 enemies on the battlefield (no Imposter will be added), and cannot trigger more than 3 times per battle.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

BigSlamAGokuBrideBoss.name: Finishing Slam
BigSlamAGokuBrideBoss.description: Targets 1 enemy. Deals 200% damage for each time the user has used Stealth Rampage while on the battlefield, up to 600% max after 3 uses. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user uses Stealth Rampage. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

BigSlamAGokuBride.name: Finishing Slam
BigSlamAGokuBride.description: Targets 1 enemy. Deals 200% damage for each time the user has used Stealth Rampage while on the battlefield, up to 600% max after 3 uses. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user uses Stealth Rampage. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

BigStrongKintaroAKintaroRegularBoss.name: Golden Dynamo
BigStrongKintaroAKintaroRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with 3 Charges.

After entering battle, this unit cannot be defeated for 100TU.

This unit's attacks:
- will not wake sleeping enemies.
- grant the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU to non-sleeping units hit after damage is dealt. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

This unit has 50% damage reduction, plus 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with attacks while on the battlefield (max of 80% after defeating 3+ enemies with attacks).

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be granted Counter Stance for 150TU. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

BigStrongKintaroAKintaroRegular.name: Golden Powerhouse
BigStrongKintaroAKintaroRegular.description:
This unit enters battle with 3 Charges, and an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

After entering battle, this unit cannot be defeated for 100TU.

This unit's attacks:
- will not wake sleeping enemies.
- heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.
- grant the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU to non-sleeping units hit after damage is dealt. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

This unit has 50% damage reduction, plus 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with attacks while on the battlefield (max of 80% after defeating 3+ enemies with attacks).

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be granted Counter Stance for 150TU, then become Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and heal for 50% of its max HP. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

BirdRegenerationOdinBoss.name: Odin's Will
BirdRegenerationOdinBoss.description:
If this unit is not conjured, this unit's max HP is multiplied by 2 and it gains the Hold Ground+ passive skill.

If this unit is conjured, it immediately gets the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

Whenever an ally Mega Winged Shade gets the turn or enters the battlefield, this unit will be healed for 10% of max HP.

BirdRegenerationOdin.name: Supreme Will
BirdRegenerationOdin.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Sleep Ward.

If this unit is conjured, it immediately gets the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

Whenever an ally Winged Shade gets the turn or enters the battlefield, this unit will be healed for 50% of max HP, will wake up if it is Sleeping, and will gain a Sleep Ward.

-Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.

BirdSplitterAOdinRegularBoss01.name: God Spear
BirdSplitterAOdinRegularBoss01.description: Sacrifices the ally Berserk Winged Shade on the battlefield with the highest current TU for 600% damage to 1 enemy, then adds 2 Berserk Winged Shades to random places in ally reinforcements. The user is healed for 10% of max HP and is purified. This does not prevent new status effects from applying to the user. Usable only if there is an ally Berserk Winged Shade on the battlefield.

BirdSplitterAOdinRegularBoss.name: God Spear
BirdSplitterAOdinRegularBoss.description: Sacrifices the ally Mega Winged Shade on the battlefield with the highest current TU for 600% damage to 1 enemy, then adds 2 Mega Winged Shades to random places in ally reinforcements. The user is healed for 10% of max HP and is purified. This does not prevent new status effects from applying to the user. Usable only if there is an ally Mega Winged Shade on the battlefield.

BlackFlamePassiveAKongmingRegularBoss.name: Blaze of Vengeance
BlackFlamePassiveAKongmingRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, immediately give 1 other random burning ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This will not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will:
- Grant a random non-burning ally and non-burning enemy the Burn status effect. This is not a Skin passive skill.

BlackFlamePassiveAKongmingRegular.name: Blazing Vengeance
BlackFlamePassiveAKongmingRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, immediately give 1 other random burning ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This will not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will:
- Grant a random non-burning ally and non-burning enemy the Burn status effect. This is not a Skin passive skill.
- Then heal for 10% of max HP (up to 80% max) for each burning unit on the battlefield.

BlackMagicPassiveARolotiaDarkBoss.name: Time Warp
BlackMagicPassiveARolotiaDarkBoss.description:
Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Until the end of this unit's first turn while on the battlefield, this unit will become a Guardian.
- All allies are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- All other allies that are at max HP have their TUs reduced to 0. This has no effect on allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills. These extra turns may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

After each enemy turn, a random sleeping or poisoned ally will have their Sleep or Poison (including Lethal Poison) removed and be granted a ward for the effect removed (a Poison Ward or Sleep Ward).

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

BlackMagicPassiveARolotiaDark.name: Time Warp
BlackMagicPassiveARolotiaDark.description:
Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Until the end of this unit's first turn while on the battlefield, this unit will become a Guardian.
- All allies are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- All other allies that are at max HP have their TUs reduced to 0. This has no effect on allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills. These extra turns may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

After each enemy turn, a random sleeping or poisoned ally will have their Sleep or Poison (including Lethal Poison) removed and be granted a ward for the effect removed (a Poison Ward or Sleep Ward).

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

BladedWingsPassiveANikeRegularBoss.name: Blades of Victory
BladedWingsPassiveANikeRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, they will immediately get the next turn. This cannot trigger again until TU advances. This unit cannot become a Guardian or Stun Absorber.

BladedWingsPassiveANikeRegular.name: Wings of Victory
BladedWingsPassiveANikeRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Whenever this unit takes damage from an attack by an enemy unit that has defeated 0 units with attacks while on the battlefield, and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and will get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

BladePassiveALudmillaDarkNewBoss.name: Dark Marshal
BladePassiveALudmillaDarkNewBoss.description:
This unit's attacks:
- Ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent their targets from being defeated.
- Weaken all enemies hit. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

New enemies entering the battlefield will be Weakened.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 1% of max HP and be granted Stealth.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on this unit. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

BladePassiveALudmillaDarkNew.name: Diabolic Knight
BladePassiveALudmillaDarkNew.description:
This unit's attacks:
- Ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent their targets from being defeated.
- Heal the user for 100% of total damage dealt.
- Weaken all enemies hit. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

New enemies entering the battlefield will be Weakened.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP and be granted Stealth. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers either after entering the battlefield or after using Unleash Chaos.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on this unit. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

Blind1EnemyEntranceA.name: Weakening Entry
Blind1EnemyEntranceA.description:
Weakens 1 random enemy. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

BlindAllEnemiesEntranceA.name: Weakening Presence
BlindAllEnemiesEntranceA.description:
All enemies become Weakened. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Triggered whenever this unit enters battle, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

BlindStrikeARavenBoss.name: Go for the Eyes!
BlindStrikeARavenBoss.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn). This attack cannot be redirected by enemy Guardians. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

BlindStrikeARaven.name: Go for the Eyes!
BlindStrikeARaven.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy and Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn). This attack cannot be redirected by enemy Guardians. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

BlindStrikeDoubleALudmillaYukataBoss.name: Weakening Drain
BlindStrikeDoubleALudmillaYukataBoss.description:
Damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage if the user has survived for 200TU on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

BlindStrikeDoubleALudmillaYukata.name: Weakening Drain
BlindStrikeDoubleALudmillaYukata.description:
100% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead if the user has survived for 200TU on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

BlockDeathIf3AlliesBurningBoss.name: Burning Friendship
BlockDeathIf3AlliesBurningBoss.description: Whenever there are 3 or more burning allies on the battlefield, this unit will survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

BlockDeathIf3AlliesBurning.name: Burning Bond
BlockDeathIf3AlliesBurning.description: Whenever there are 3 or more burning allies on the battlefield, this unit will survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

BloodfuryBusterA.name: Savage Assassin
BloodfuryBusterA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BloodfuryBusterAllASnowBlackBride.name: Little Dark Garden
BloodfuryBusterAllASnowBlackBride.description: 500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth status effect and enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BloodfuryBusterDoubleA.name: Savage Assassin
BloodfuryBusterDoubleA.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BloodfuryBusterDoubleSLudmillaSchoolBoss.name: Savage Knockout
BloodfuryBusterDoubleSLudmillaSchoolBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Forces those enemies to Sleep for 200TU if they are left with 25% or less of max HP and are not already sleeping, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and the Stealth status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BloodfuryBusterDoubleSLudmillaSchool.name: Savage Knockout
BloodfuryBusterDoubleSLudmillaSchool.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Forces those enemies to Sleep for 200TU if they are left with 25% or less of max HP and are not already sleeping, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and the Stealth status effect. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BloodfuryChargeStormACinderellaDarkBoss.name: Crimson Storm
BloodfuryChargeStormACinderellaDarkBoss.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also gain a power charge. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with another attack.

BloodfuryDrainA.name: Savage Drain
BloodfuryDrainA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

BloodfuryHealChargeStormACinderellaDark.name: Savage Storm
BloodfuryHealChargeStormACinderellaDark.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also gain a power charge and Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with another attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

BloodSpeedPassiveAKojiroRegular.name: Killer Focus
BloodSpeedPassiveAKojiroRegular.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit cannot be Stunned until it has defeated 1 enemy with an attack while on the battlefield.

This unit has 25% reduction to TU Costs if it has defeated 1 enemy with an attack while on the battlefield. This increases by 25% per additional enemy defeated, up to 75% max TU Cost reduction after this unit has defeated 3+ enemies.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be granted Counter Stance for 300TU, and heal for 30% of its max HP.

BondingBuffARizetteBrave.name: Restore Link
BondingBuffARizetteBrave.description:
Grants Rizette's Link to another random non-conjured ally that does not already have a Link.

Then that ally and the user:
- are healed for 100% max HP.
- have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills.
- are granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward and Instant Death Ward.

Usable only if no other ally on the battlefield has Rizette's Link already, and there is a valid target. Usable 3 times per battle.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored. Identical Wards cannot stack.

BondingModeBuffRizetteBrave.name: Rizette's Link
BondingModeBuffRizetteBrave.description:
Each time an ally with Rizette's Link gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 50% of its max HP.

This unit has 0.25x of their original Attack added to their Attack while they are not Enraged. This increase will stack with other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.25x => 1.75x total).

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, if the defeated enemy is:
- Fire or Light, 2 random non-sleeping enemies gain the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- Storm or Earth, 2 random non-burning enemies gain the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU.
- Water or Dark, 2 random enemies that have a current TU of 50 or less are stunned for 100TU.
These effects may trigger before or after other effects.

This Link is removed if this unit or the unit that granted it leaves the battlefield. This unit cannot gain other Links.

BoomAndBustQuickenedLethal.name: Berserker's Requiem
BoomAndBustQuickenedLethal.description:
Every time an ally starts their turn with 10 Spirit, or an enemy starts theirs with 0 Spirit, this unit enters Berserker Form at the end of that turn.

While in Berserker Form, this unit's active skill TU costs are reduced by 40%, and this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Berserker Form ends when this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, and can then be triggered again.

Whenever this unit is defeated by an enemy, steals Spirit from the enemy team until either ally Spirit reaches 10, or enemy Spirit reaches 0.

BraveLastStandBusterAllAMechaBrideBoss.name: Brave Stand
BraveLastStandBusterAllAMechaBrideBoss.description: 300% damage to all enemies. 500% damage if the user is alone on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable if there are no allied reinforcements.

BraveLastStandLethalA.name: Mage's Stand
BraveLastStandLethalA.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy and then poisons them. 500% damage if the user is alone on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable if there are no allied reinforcements.

BrideHealFullOnce.name: Bridal Swiftslash
BrideHealFullOnce.description: If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 100% of max HP.

BuffABeautyRegularBoss.name: Budding Toxins
BuffABeautyRegularBoss.description:
All non-burning allies are Enraged. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

If 2 or more enemies on the battlefield are poisoned, all allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%, this will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills. Otherwise, if less than 2 enemies on the battlefield are poisoned, all enemies on the battlefield are randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

BuffABeautyRegular.name: Budding Gifts
BuffABeautyRegular.description:
All non-burning allies are healed for 500% of the user's attack, and Enraged. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

If 2 or more enemies on the battlefield are poisoned, all allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%, this will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills. Otherwise, if less than 2 enemies on the battlefield are poisoned, all enemies on the battlefield are randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

BuffACalKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Infectious Ignition
BuffACalKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
Enrages all burning allies. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

Then 1 random ally and 1 random enemy are granted the Burn status effect and become infected with it.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Burn to a random non-burning unit on the infected unit's team. Each infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

BuffACalKouhaiRegular.name: Roaring Ignition
BuffACalKouhaiRegular.description:
Heals all burning allies for 800% of the user's attack, and Enrages them. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

Then 1 random ally and 1 random enemy are granted the Burn status effect and become infected with it.

Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Burn to a random non-burning unit on the infected unit's team. Each infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected unit is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

BuffAFreyaNew.name: Infernal Blaze
BuffAFreyaNew.description:
Grants all enemies the Burn status effect. The user is healed for 100% of max HP,  granted an Instant Death Ward, Burn, and a Burn Shield.

Then if the user is in War Frenzy, all burning enemies on the battlefield are Stunned for 50TU.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. Burn Shields prevent the next non-burn status effect a unit would gain while Burning from applying.

BuffAlliesAOniSchoolDarkBoss.name: Demonic Dissent
BuffAlliesAOniSchoolDarkBoss.description:
Grants all allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, Poison Ward, and Burn Ward. Unlocks at random either Destructive Reign or Oni Blast. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses the Toxic Finish skill or leaves battlefield.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

BuffAlliesAOniSchoolDark.name: Demonic Defiance
BuffAlliesAOniSchoolDark.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. Then grants all allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, Poison Ward, Stun Ward and Burn Ward. Unlocks at random either Toxic Reign or Demon Blast. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses the Toxic Finale skill or leaves the battlefield.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

BuffedEnemyPassiveAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Battle Tactics
BuffedEnemyPassiveAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they have a 50% chance to be granted the Burn status effect.

Each time a Burning unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 1% of its max HP.

Whenever another non-conjured Ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, all allies:
- are healed for 1% of max HP.
- are granted the Burn status effect.
- are Enraged.

BuffedEnemyPassiveAElmKouhaiRegular.name: Red Dragon Tactics
BuffedEnemyPassiveAElmKouhaiRegular.description:
Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they have a 50% chance to be granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. Then they have a 50% chance to be granted the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.

Each time a Poisoned or Sleeping unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP.

Whenever another non-conjured Ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source:
- this unit gains the Armor status effect, and is healed for 100% of max HP.
- all non-burning allies on the battlefield are granted Sleep Thorns.
- 2 random allies on the battlefield have their current TU reduced by 50TU.

When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

BunnyAllyBuffAKaguyahimeSwimsuitBoss.name: Lantern Party
BunnyAllyBuffAKaguyahimeSwimsuitBoss.description: Grants all allies the Stealth status effect and Enrage them. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on that ally. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This effect will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. Usable if the user is not Stealthed.

BunnySamuraiBossLeaderSkill.name: Desperate Speed
BunnySamuraiBossLeaderSkill.description: Allies have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced as their HP decreases (Max 50% reduction when below 25% of max HP).
BunnySamuraiBossLeaderSkill.affected: Allies have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced as their HP decreases (Max 50% reduction when below 25% of max HP).

BurnAccelerateAttackBoostSelfA.name: Inspired Ignition
BurnAccelerateAttackBoostSelfA.description: The user gains the Burn status effect, the user's TU costs for all of their skills are reduced by 20%, and until the end of its next turn, its Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills on the user. Usable if the user is the only non-burning ally.

BurnAllUnitsADonQuixoteRegular.name: Overflowing Burn
BurnAllUnitsADonQuixoteRegular.description:
Burns all units on the battlefield, and grants them a Burn Shield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units.

Then the user is granted Healing Burn for 300TU, all other allies heal for 1000% of the user's attack, and Allies gain 1 Spirit for each unit on the battlefield that is burning. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Burn Shields prevent the next non-burn status effect a unit would gain while Burning from applying. A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

BurnAllyAccelerateAttackBoostBurningAlli.name: Raging Ignition
BurnAllyAccelerateAttackBoostBurningAlli.description: All non-sleeping allies are granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then all allies that already had the Burn status effect will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills. The user is healed for 200% of the user's attack. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

BurnAllyAccelerateAttackBoostBurningAlli.name: Ignite All+
BurnAllyAccelerateAttackBoostBurningAlli.description: All non-sleeping allies are granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. All allies that already had the Burn status effect will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills.

BurnAllyHealA.name: Ignition Heal
BurnAllyHealA.description: Heal 1 ally for HP equal to 200% of the user's Attack. The target also gains the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

BurnBlastDoublePlusAAstridNewBoss.name: Burning Blaze
BurnBlastDoublePlusAAstridNewBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, the effects of Skin passive skills, and Revenge passive skills. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

BurnBlastDoublePlusAAstridNew.name: Burning Blaze
BurnBlastDoublePlusAAstridNew.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, the effects of Skin passive skills, and Revenge passive skills. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

BurnBlastDrainA.name: Burn Drain
BurnBlastDrainA.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

BurnBlastDrainDoubleA.name: Burn Drain
BurnBlastDrainDoubleA.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

BurnBlastForceASchoolGirlWarriorBoss.name: Burn Blast Drive
BurnBlastForceASchoolGirlWarriorBoss.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect. 500% damage if there are at least 4 units with the Burn status effect. 600% damage if there are at least 6 units with burn. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

BurnBlastMegaRecoilA.name: Burning Phoenix
BurnBlastMegaRecoilA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, reduces the user's current HP by 40% of max and removes Burn from the user. This HP reduction will not reduce the user's HP below 1. The Hold Ground+ passive skill is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect and more than 25% of max HP remaining.

BurnDevourHealSelfA.name: Blood Burn
BurnDevourHealSelfA.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements to grant the Burn status effect to the user and then heal its HP for 200% of its Attack. This will overwrite other status effects on this unit. Cannot be used if the user already has Burn or there are no allied reinforcements left.

BurnDevourHealSelfAInstantBoss.name: Blood Burn
BurnDevourHealSelfAInstantBoss.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements to grant the Burn status effect to the user and then heal its HP for 600% of its Attack. This will overwrite other status effects on this unit.

BurnDrainHealAllyAllAAstridBride.name: Flame of Rigland
BurnDrainHealAllyAllAAstridBride.description: 150% damage to all enemies, this attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. All allies are healed for 150% of the user's attack. All allies will become burned. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

BurnDrainHealAllyAllAAstridNewBoss.name: Sweeping Flames
BurnDrainHealAllyAllAAstridNewBoss.description: 150% damage to all enemies, this attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. All allies are healed for 150% of the user's attack. All allies will become burned. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. This skill becomes locked for 300TU after use.

BurnDrainPlusA.name: Burn Drain+
BurnDrainPlusA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

BurnForceAllyDrainA.name: Healing Burn Drive
BurnForceAllyDrainA.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies. Usable only if there are at least 4 units with the Burn status effect. 500% damage if there are at least 6 units with burn. All burning allies are healed for 300% of the user's attack if damage is dealt.

BurnForceDrainATwinGod.name: Sunlight Arrow
BurnForceDrainATwinGod.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. If damage is dealt, the user is healed for 100% of max HP and gains a Stun Ward. Usable only if there are at least 4 units with the Burn status effect. 600% damage if there are at least 6 units with burn. Stun Ward prevents Stun from being applied once, then is removed. Stun Wards cannot stack.

BurningGoddessPassiveAFreyaNewBoss.name: Yggdrasil's Favor
BurningGoddessPassiveAFreyaNewBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit has Stun immunity.

This unit has 50% damage reduction.

The first time damage from one of this unit's attacks defeats a non-conjured enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.This effect is reset so it can trigger again whenever a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated while this unit is on the battlefield.

BurningGoddessPassiveAFreyaNew.name: Spark of Yggdrasil
BurningGoddessPassiveAFreyaNew.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit has Stun immunity. Whenever this unit gets the turn, if this unit's Active Skills are not disabled, this unit can't have its Active Skills disabled until the end of its turn.

This unit has 50% damage reduction, plus 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with attacks while on the battlefield (max of 80% after defeating 3+ enemies with attacks).

If this unit takes damage from an attack while not sleeping, and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of max HP.

The first time damage from one of this unit's attacks defeats a non-conjured enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (this unit is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated. This effect is reset so it can trigger again whenever a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated while this unit is on the battlefield.

BurningJourneyPassiveADonQuixoteRegular.name: Hero's Journey
BurningJourneyPassiveADonQuixoteRegular.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit cannot be defeated if it has the Mega Healing Burn status effect.

This unit enters battle with Mega Healing Burn for 100TU, and an Instant Death Ward.

At the end of each of the first 3 turns this unit gets on the battlefield:
- Burn all units on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Then this unit is granted Mega Healing Burn for 100TU.
- Then this unit is granted an Instant Death Ward.

An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

BurningMoonAKaguyahimeSwimsuit.name: Burning Moon
BurningMoonAKaguyahimeSwimsuit.description:
Grants a random enemy the Burn status effect. Triggers after each enemy turn if no enemy is burning already. When this unit or a Burning ally gets a turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

All allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills gain the Burn status effect. Then if all allies have the burn status effect, this unit gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies.

If this unit is burning and has defeated 3+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

BurningPassiveALuciferRegular.name: Bathe in Flames
BurningPassiveALuciferRegular.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects. If this unit is burning, this unit has a 100% chance to ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements, it will gain Endure. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while burning and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

BurningSpiritAKaguyahimeSwimsuit.name: Lantern Flare
BurningSpiritAKaguyahimeSwimsuit.description: Damage to 1 Enemy, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

BurningVigorMordredRegular.name: Burning Blood
BurningVigorMordredRegular.description:
The user is granted the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU, and is healed for 100% of max HP. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. Consumes all Charges on the user.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. Mega Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

BurnRegenerationOnMyTurn.name: Burn Regeneration
BurnRegenerationOnMyTurn.description: When this unit gets the turn while having the Burn status effect, they heal 30% of their max HP.

BurnSelfAndAllyHealA.name: Ignition Heal
BurnSelfAndAllyHealA.description: Heal 1 ally for 200% of the user's Attack, then heal the user for 200% of the user's Attack. Both gain the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Usable only if the user is not burning already.

BurnSelfHealRageA.name: Ignition Rage Heal
BurnSelfHealRageA.description: Heals the user for 50% of max HP. The user becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. The user also gains the Burn status effect. Usable only if the user does not have burn already. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

BurnSelfHealSpiritChargeA.name: Ignition Heal
BurnSelfHealSpiritChargeA.description: Heal the user for HP equal to 250% of the user's Attack. The user also gains the Burn status effect. Usable only if the user does not have burn already. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

BurnStunEntranceALuBuRegularBoss.name: Fuel to the Flames
BurnStunEntranceALuBuRegularBoss.description:
This unit and all enemies are granted the Burn status effect, then all burning non-Water enemies are stunned for 100TU. All of these effects are triggered when this unit begins on the battlefield at the very start of battle.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured unit on the battlefield with an attack, this unit gains Endure and a Poison Ward.

Poison Ward prevents Poison from being applied once, then is removed. Poison Wards cannot stack.

BurnStunEntranceALuBuRegular.name: Fuel to the Fire
BurnStunEntranceALuBuRegular.description:
This unit and all enemies are granted the Burn status effect, then all burning non-Water enemies are stunned for 100TU. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured unit on the battlefield with an attack, this unit gains Endure, a Poison Ward and becomes fully healed.

Poison Ward prevents Poison from being applied once, then is removed. Poison Wards cannot stack.

BurnTimestrikeALuBuRegularBoss.name: Hellfire
BurnTimestrikeALuBuRegularBoss.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, 600% damage if the target has 100TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

BurnTimestrikeALuBuRegular.name: Hellfire
BurnTimestrikeALuBuRegular.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, 600% damage if the target has 100TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

BusterAttackA.name: Sneak Attack
BusterAttackA.description: Damage to 1 enemy and allies gain 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

BusterDrainSingleKillerYandereMaidRQ.name: Fatal Frenzy
BusterDrainSingleKillerYandereMaidRQ.description: 250% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any passive skills or effects of active skills of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

CallBirdsSacAOdinRegularBoss.name: Call Ravens
CallBirdsSacAOdinRegularBoss.description: Sacrifices the user to add up to 20 Mega Winged Shades to random places in ally reinforcements. This number will be reduced depending on Mega Odin's remaining HP when activated, to a minimum of 5 when Mega Odin has less than 25% of max HP remaining. Usable if there are no Mega Winged Shades in the user's team, including reinforcements.

ChainStunChanceAttackSingleAHimikoBoss.name: Thunder Blast
ChainStunChanceAttackSingleAHimikoBoss.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 30% chance of stunning another random enemy for 100TU if the target is not defeated by this attack. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

ChainStunChanceAttackSingleAHimiko.name: Thunder Blast
ChainStunChanceAttackSingleAHimiko.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead and the user gains a Power Charge every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 30% chance of stunning another random enemy for 100TU if the target is not defeated by this attack. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

ChainStunGuardBusterAHimikoBoss.name: Thunder Breaker
ChainStunGuardBusterAHimikoBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Stuns another random enemy for 200TU if the target was a Guardian and survives this attack with 35% or less of max HP. This skill will be locked after use until the end of the user's next turn.

ChainStunGuardBusterAHimiko.name: Thunder Breaker
ChainStunGuardBusterAHimiko.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Stuns another random enemy for 200TU if the target was a Guardian and survives this attack with 35% or less of max HP. This skill will be locked after use until the end of the user's next turn.

ChampionSlayerBanePercivalRegularBoss.name: Piercing Void
ChampionSlayerBanePercivalRegularBoss.description: Targets 1 enemy. 500% damage to targets that have survived on the battlefield for 200TU, or to any target if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

ChampionSlayerBanePercivalRegular.name: Royal Void
ChampionSlayerBanePercivalRegular.description: Targets 1 enemy. 500% damage to targets that have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, or to any target if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

ChannelTideBarrierAMermaidRegularBoss.name: Breaking Current
ChannelTideBarrierAMermaidRegularBoss.description:
Whenever this unit gets the turn, if all enemies are sleeping, the next damage this unit deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated. This effect cannot trigger again until 100TU advances and cannot stack.

When this unit enters battle, all allies will be granted Coral Barrier for 100TU. A unit with Coral Barrier will gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

While this unit is on the battlefield, at the end of this unit or an ally Suimori's turn, all allies will:
- Gain Coral Barrier for 100TU.
- have Burn and Poison status effects (including Lethal Poison) removed.

ChannelTideBarrierAMermaidRegular.name: Breaking Tide
ChannelTideBarrierAMermaidRegular.description:
Whenever this unit gets the turn, if all enemies are sleeping, the next damage this unit deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated. This effect cannot trigger again until 100TU advances and cannot stack.

When this unit enters battle, all allies will be granted Coral Barrier for 100TU. A unit with Coral Barrier will gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

While this unit is on the battlefield, at the end of this unit or an ally Suimori's turn, all allies will:
- Gain Coral Barrier for 100TU.
- have Burn and Poison status effects (including Lethal Poison) removed.
- be healed for 30% of their max HP.

If this unit is not alone on the battlefield and has Coral Barrier, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Chapter1AttackAMurasakiRegularBoss.name: Last Word
Chapter1AttackAMurasakiRegularBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses Enraged Words. This lock may be ignored if user is alone on the battlefield.

Chapter1AttackAMurasakiRegular.name: Last Word
Chapter1AttackAMurasakiRegular.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses Healing Words. This lock may be ignored if user is alone on the battlefield.

Chapter2AttackAMurasakiRegularBoss.name: Enraged Words
Chapter2AttackAMurasakiRegularBoss.description:
Enrage 2 allies, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on that ally. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

Chapter2AttackAMurasakiRegular.name: Healing Words
Chapter2AttackAMurasakiRegular.description:
Heals 2 allies for 800% of the user's attack, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on that ally. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

ChargeAttackALudmillaNew.name: Divine Strike
ChargeAttackALudmillaNew.description:
75% Damage to 1 enemy. Damage doubles for each charge the user has stored (600% max). Then the user is granted 1 charge and the Counter Stance status effect for 300TU.

Counter Stance will overwrite other status effects on the user. For 300TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

ChargeBlastANapoleonRegular.name: Glorious Cannon
ChargeBlastANapoleonRegular.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% per Awakening the user has (800% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges. This skill becomes locked for 75TU after use.

ChargedAllianceANapoleonRegularBoss.name: War Games
ChargedAllianceANapoleonRegularBoss.description:
This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has no Charges and is not alone on the battlefield.

This unit will gain a Charge and be healed for 1% of its max HP each time another ally gets the turn.
If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 1% of its max HP.

ChargedAllianceANapoleonRegular.name: Flanking Maneuver
ChargedAllianceANapoleonRegular.description:
This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has no Charges and is not alone on the battlefield.

This unit will gain a Charge and be healed for 30% of its max HP each time another ally gets the turn.
Each time a Storm ally (including this unit) gets the turn, they will heal for 30% of their max HP.

If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

ChargedUpPassiveAZeusRegularBoss.name: Thunder God
ChargedUpPassiveAZeusRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time an ally gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 1% of its max HP.

After entering battle, this unit cannot be burned for 200TU.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

ChargedUpPassiveAZeusRegular.name: Omnipotence
ChargedUpPassiveAZeusRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP.

After entering battle, this unit cannot be burned for 200TU.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

This unit's attack has 0.25x of their original Attack added to their Attack for each enemy on the battlefield that has a current TU of 50 or less (max of 1.0x if 4 enemies have a current TU of 50 or less). This does stack on top of Enrage effects, and other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.25x => 1.75x total).

Charmed50TUBuff50PercentChance.name: Charmed
Charmed50TUBuff50PercentChance.description: This unit's Attack is greatly decreased for another {0}TU. This unit cannot be Enraged or Weakened. Charmed is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills. Charmed units are less likely to target the unit that Charmed them with most active skills.

CharmedBuffAVenusRegular.name: Goddess Charm
CharmedBuffAVenusRegular.description:
All enemies on the battlefield have their Stealth, Poison Wards, Sleep Wards and Stun Wards removed.

Then all enemies on the battlefield have a 50% chance each to be Charmed for 50TU. A Charmed unit has their attack greatly reduced (e.g. to 0.5x of their original Attack for a unit with no other Attack modifiers. The effect of Charmed may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects). Charmed overwrites Enrage and Weaken effects, and units that are Charmed cannot be Enraged or Weakened. Charmed units are less likely to target the unit that Charmed them with most active skills. Charmed is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will end if the Charmed unit leaves the battlefield.

This skill cannot be used if an enemy is already Charmed or if the user is alone on the battlefield.

CloneAttackAGokuDarkBoss.name: Combined Forces
CloneAttackAGokuDarkBoss.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. Damage doubles for each other Mega Dark Sun Wukong in the ally team, including reinforcements (800% max). Enrages each other ally Mega Dark Sun Wukong on the battlefield. This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

CloneAttackAGokuDark.name: Combined Forces
CloneAttackAGokuDark.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. Damage doubles for each other "Dark Sun Wukong, The Great Menace, Hell's Equal" in the ally team, including reinforcements (800% max). Enrages each other ally "Dark Sun Wukong, The Great Menace, Hell's Equal" on the battlefield. This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

CloneEscapeAGokuDarkBoss.name: Doubling
CloneEscapeAGokuDarkBoss.description:
Adds another Mega Dark Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements. This Mega Dark Sun Wukong's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user. Conjured Mega Dark Sun Wukongs have less max HP.

Then if 4 allies are on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the Mega Dark Sun Wukong added to allied reinforcements, even if the user is immovable.
