Usable only if the user doesn't have the Counter Stance status effect. This skill is locked if there are 4 conjured copies of Mega Dark Sun Wukong among allies on the battlefield and allied reinforcements or if the original Mega Dark Sun Wukong is defeated.

CloneResolvePassiveAGokuBride01.name: Clone Mastery
CloneResolvePassiveAGokuBride01.description:
If this unit is not conjured, this unit enters battle with 3 Charges, and Counter Stance for 150TU. If this unit is conjured, this unit enters battle with 1 Charge and the Armor status effect.

If this unit is charged, not burning, and there are 2+ non-conjured allies on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with less than 50% of max HP, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 100% of max HP and add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements.

Add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. This effect triggers if this unit is not conjured and has a Charge. This is not considered a revenge passive skill.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack while charged, this unit will spend a charge to get another turn. This effect can trigger again against the same unit. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

All Sun Wukongs created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

CloneResolvePassiveAGokuBrideBoss.name: Clone Expertise
CloneResolvePassiveAGokuBrideBoss.description:
If this unit is not conjured, this unit enters battle with 3 Charges, and Counter Stance for 150TU. If this unit is conjured, this unit enters battle with 1 Charge and the Armor status effect.

If this unit is charged, not burning, and there are 2+ non-conjured allies on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with less than 50% of max HP, this unit will will spend a Charge to add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements.

Add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. This effect triggers if this unit is not conjured and has a Charge. This is not considered a revenge passive skill.

All Sun Wukongs created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

CloneResolvePassiveAGokuBride.name: Clone Mastery
CloneResolvePassiveAGokuBride.description:
If this unit is not conjured, this unit enters battle with 3 Charges, and Counter Stance for 150TU. If this unit is conjured, this unit enters battle with 1 Charge and the Armor status effect.

If this unit is charged, not burning, and there are 2+ non-conjured allies on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with less than 50% of max HP, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 100% of max HP and add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements.

Add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. This effect triggers if this unit is not conjured and has a Charge. This is not considered a revenge passive skill.

All Sun Wukongs created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

ColdSleepAttackAPerryRegularBoss.name: Powerful Slam
ColdSleepAttackAPerryRegularBoss.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. Grants the target the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

ColdSleepAttackAPerryRegular.name: Concussive Blow
ColdSleepAttackAPerryRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield, and heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified.

ColdWindsPassiveAAnastasiaRegularBoss.name: Frozen Vigor
ColdWindsPassiveAAnastasiaRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be burned or fall asleep.

Until the end of this unit's third turn while on the battlefield, this unit cannot be defeated by damage and heals for 1% of max HP at the end of every turn.

At the start of every turn while this unit is on the battlefield, if there is a frozen or burning unit on the battlefield:
- this unit heals for 1% of max HP.
- Allies gain 1 Spirit at the end of the turn.

ColdWindsPassiveAAnastasiaRegular.name: Cold Winds
ColdWindsPassiveAAnastasiaRegular.description:
This unit cannot be burned or poisoned.

Whenever another Water or Fire ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements:
- 2 random non-sleeping enemies are granted Frostburn.
- 2 random non-burning allies on the battlefield are Purified (negative status effects like sleep or poison are removed).

Until the end of this unit's third turn while on the battlefield, this unit cannot be defeated by damage and heals for 25% of max HP at the end of every turn.

At the start of every turn while this unit is on the battlefield, if there is a sleeping, burning or frostburned unit on the battlefield:
- this unit heals for 25% of max HP.
- this unit will have its TU reduced to 0 at the end of the turn. This effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.
- Allies gain 1 Spirit at the end of the turn.

ColorfulDefeatPassiveAADaVinciRegularBos.name: Explosive Assault
ColorfulDefeatPassiveAADaVinciRegularBos.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. Whenever an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit is Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and loses a Power Charge.

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack this unit gains the Armor status effect and all other allies gain the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU. A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn deals damage. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

ColorfulDefeatPassiveAADaVinciRegular.name: Adaptive Assault
ColorfulDefeatPassiveAADaVinciRegular.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. Whenever an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit is Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and loses a Power Charge.

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water, this unit gains Sleep Immunity and all other allies gain Sleep Wards.
- Fire, this unit gains Burn Immunity and all other allies gain Burn Wards.
- Storm, this unit gains Stun Immunity and all other allies gain Stun Wards.
- Earth, this unit gains Poison Immunity and all other allies gain Poison Wards.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

ConfidentBusterBounceA.name: Vigor Launcher
ConfidentBusterBounceA.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. If that enemy is not defeated and has any reinforcements, pushes the enemy away from the battlefield to be next in line of the enemy reinforcements, or to the very back of the enemy reinforcements if they survived the attack with 1HP remaining. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

ConfidentKnockbackAOniSGBoss.name: Vigor Banish
ConfidentKnockbackAOniSGBoss.description: Sends 1 enemy to the very back of the enemy reinforcements. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+ and there are 1 or more enemy reinforcements left.

ConfidentStrikeA2.name: Vigor Impact
ConfidentStrikeA2.description: 250% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

ConfidentStrikeA3.name: Vigor Impact
ConfidentStrikeA3.description: 250% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

ConfidentStrikeA4.name: Vigor Impact
ConfidentStrikeA4.description: 250% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

ConfidentStrikeA.name: Vigor Impact
ConfidentStrikeA.description: 250% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

ConfidentStrikeDoubleA.name: Vigor Impact
ConfidentStrikeDoubleA.description: 250% damage to 2 enemies. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

ConfidentStrikeSingleSMegaPoison.name: Mega Poison Crush
ConfidentStrikeSingleSMegaPoison.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy and Mega Poisons them for 100TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+

CostAttackSingleAOniSGBoss.name: Reduction Attack
CostAttackSingleAOniSGBoss.description: 150% damage to 1 enemy and allies lose 3 Spirit.

CriticalChanceKillReset.name: Ultimate Defiance
CriticalChanceKillReset.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack, it has a 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to instead enter Battle Trance for 150TU. While in Battle Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by attacks. If this unit defeats an enemy with an attack while in Battle Trance, it will lose Battle Trance and recover full HP. Otherwise, once Battle Trance ends, this unit will be defeated.

This unit cannot enter Battle Trance while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills on the battlefield.

CriticalFurySingleARtkBride.name: Bonds of Agony
CriticalFurySingleARtkBride.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. The user becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills. Usable only if this unit is in Battle Trance.

CrossingDelawarePassiveAWashingtonRegula.name: Shining Liberty
CrossingDelawarePassiveAWashingtonRegula.description:
After this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all allies on the battlefield are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed). Then all enemies on the battlefield are granted Frostburn.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 1% of its max HP.

When this unit enters battle, all allies will be granted Naval Barrier for 100TU. A unit with Naval Barrier will gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

While this unit has Naval Barrier, this unit will survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

CrossingDelawarePassiveAWashingtonRegula.name: Unyielding Liberty
CrossingDelawarePassiveAWashingtonRegula.description:
This unit enters battle with an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

After this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all allies on the battlefield are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and healed for 100% of max HP. Then there is a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) for this unit to grant Frostburn to all enemies on the battlefield.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified, and heal for 25% of its max HP.

When this unit enters battle, all allies will be granted Naval Barrier for 200TU. A unit with Naval Barrier will gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

While this unit has Naval Barrier, this unit will survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

CursedBladeACrossSwordKnightDarkBoss.name: Cursed Blade
CursedBladeACrossSwordKnightDarkBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. If not burning, that enemy will also be granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, and the user will be granted Sleep Thorns. This attack ignores Guardians and damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This lock may be ignored if allies have 0 Spirit.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying.

CursedBladeACrossSwordKnightDark.name: Cursed Blade
CursedBladeACrossSwordKnightDark.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. If not burning, that enemy will also be granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, and the user will be granted Sleep Thorns. This attack ignores Guardians and damage reduction effects. This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses another active skill. This lock may be ignored if allies have 0 Spirit.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills. When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying.

CursedEndARyomaRegular.name: Autumn's End
CursedEndARyomaRegular.description:
20% chance to immediately defeat 1 non-boss enemy, plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings). The user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

The user can no longer be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU, and Purify them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Locked for 250TU after the user has entered the battlefield. This lock is ignored while all enemies on the battlefield have the Cursed Sleep status effect. Usable once per battle.

CursedRootsBuffAPinocchioRegularBoss.name: Burned Roots
CursedRootsBuffAPinocchioRegularBoss.description:
Steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team for each burning enemy on the battlefield. Then heals all allies for 1% of max HP, and Burns them. This skill locks after use, and unlocks each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

CursedRootsBuffAPinocchioRegular.name: Cursed Roots
CursedRootsBuffAPinocchioRegular.description:
Steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team for each non-burning enemy on the battlefield, and all non-burning allies are granted Sleep Thorns. Then heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). This skill locks after use, and unlocks each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

CursedSleepEntryAGokuBrideBoss.name: Heaven's Robe
CursedSleepEntryAGokuBrideBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Grants all non-burning allies Stun Wards and Poison Wards. 1 random non-burning enemy is granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. These effects are triggered when this unit enters the battlefield as a conjured unit. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack:

- if charged, this unit spends a charge to add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements.
- this unit will grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the next enemy that enters the battlefield.

CursedSleepEntryAGokuBride.name: Heaven's Robe
CursedSleepEntryAGokuBride.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Grants all non-burning allies Stun Wards and Poison Wards. 1 random non-burning enemy is granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. These effects are triggered when this unit enters the battlefield as a conjured unit. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack:

- if charged, this unit spends a charge to add another Sun Wukong to the next in line of allied reinforcements.
- this unit will grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the next enemy that enters the battlefield.

DamageAllEnemyRevengeAForRetribution.name: Bomb Revenge
DamageAllEnemyRevengeAForRetribution.description: Whenever this unit is defeated by an enemy, all enemies are damaged for 200% of this unit's attack at the end of the turn.

DamageReduc4EnemiesLowSpirits.name: Damage Down
DamageReduc4EnemiesLowSpirits.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as the enemy will have 2 or less Spirit after their attack.

DamageReduc4UserHighHP.name: Damage Down
DamageReduc4UserHighHP.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit's HP is at 90%+.

DamageReduc5EnemiesLowSpirits.name: Damage Down
DamageReduc5EnemiesLowSpirits.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 10% as long as the enemy will have 2 or less Spirit after their attack.

DamageReduc5UserHighHP.name: Damage Down
DamageReduc5UserHighHP.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 10% if this unit's HP is at 90%+.

DamageReduc6EnemiesLowSpirits.name: Damage Down
DamageReduc6EnemiesLowSpirits.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 15% as long as the enemy will have 2 or less Spirit after their attack.

DamageReduc6UserHighHP.name: Damage Down
DamageReduc6UserHighHP.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 15% if this unit's HP is at 90%+.

DamageReducAndHealWhenHurtFor150TU.name: Recovery Stance
DamageReducAndHealWhenHurtFor150TU.description: For another {0}TU, this unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks, and heals for 40% of max HP at the end of each turn. Whenever this unit is healed to max HP this way, it will be Purified and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

DamageReduceAndRegenerateWhenAtMostHP.name: Song of Vigor
DamageReduceAndRegenerateWhenAtMostHP.description: While this unit's HP is at 50%+, it has 50% damage reduction from attacks and will heal 25% of its max HP when it gets the turn.

DamageReduceIfPoisoned.name: Vigor Armor
DamageReduceIfPoisoned.description: When this unit is dealt damage while at full HP, reduce that damage by 50%.

DamageReduceWhenAtLowHP.name: Desperate Armor
DamageReduceWhenAtLowHP.description: 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit's HP is at 75% or less. 75% damage reduction instead if this unit's HP is at 25% or less.

DamageReduceWhenAtMaxHP.name: Vigor Armor
DamageReduceWhenAtMaxHP.description: 50% less attack damage taken by the user while at max HP.

DamageReducStunImmunityAndHoldGroundIfBu.name: Heroic Focus
DamageReducStunImmunityAndHoldGroundIfBu.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has the Burn status effect.

If this unit would be defeated while it has the Burn status effect, it instead survives with 1 HP, then burn is removed from this unit.

DamageReducWhenAllyDefeatedPercivalRegul.name: Forsaken Knight
DamageReducWhenAllyDefeatedPercivalRegul.description: When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks for 150TU, is healed to max HP and becomes Enraged.

DamageReducWhileGuardingAttackUpDodgeWhi.name: Dual Prodigies
DamageReducWhileGuardingAttackUpDodgeWhi.description:
While this unit is a Guardian, it has 65% damage reduction from attacks.

While this unit is not a Guardian, its Attack is increased to 1.5x (this will not stack with Enrage effects) and it will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

DamageStunTrapABoss.name: Auto Snare
DamageStunTrapABoss.description: New enemies entering the battlefield are stunned for 100TU and damaged for 200% of this unit's attack. If this damage would defeat an enemy, they survive on 1 HP instead.

DarkDrainALudmillaDarkNew.name: Dark Drain
DarkDrainALudmillaDarkNew.description:
Grants all allies Stealth, and a Burn Ward. Grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team for each Poisoned enemy on the battlefield. The user will immediately get the next turn, then this additional turn effect cannot trigger again until TU advances.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Burn Wards prevent Burn from being applied once, then are removed. Burn Wards cannot stack.

DarkModeFor150TUMusashiDark.name: Dark Heaven Stance
DarkModeFor150TUMusashiDark.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target all allies will not be ignored), and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

DarkTimePassiveARolotiaDarkBoss.name: Bad Timeline
DarkTimePassiveARolotiaDarkBoss.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Until the end of this unit's third turn while on the battlefield:
- This unit is immune to Poison and Sleep status effects.
- This unit is immune to Stun effects unless it is burning.
- Unless it is burning, this unit has 80% damage reduction and has a 100% chance to survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Until the end of this unit's second turn while on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack, a random non-burning enemy is immediately granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, then a random non-burning enemy immediately becomes Lethal Poisoned for 999TU. This is not a Skin passive skill.

DarkTimePassiveARolotiaDark.name: Dark Timeline
DarkTimePassiveARolotiaDark.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

Until the end of this unit's third turn while on the battlefield:
- This unit is immune to Poison and Sleep status effects.
- This unit is immune to Stun effects unless it is burning.
- Unless it is burning, this unit has 80% damage reduction and has a 60% chance, plus 10% chance per Awakening (up to 100% if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Until the end of this unit's second turn while on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack, a random non-burning enemy is immediately granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, then a random non-burning enemy immediately becomes Lethal Poisoned for 999TU. This is not a Skin passive skill.

DawnStrikeSingleAMechaBrideBoss.name: Dream Weaver
DawnStrikeSingleAMechaBrideBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if there is a sleeping enemy (even if the target is not sleeping). If there are no sleeping enemies, 50% damage instead and allies gain an additional 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill.

DawnStrikeSingleAMechaBride.name: Dream Weaver
DawnStrikeSingleAMechaBride.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if there is a sleeping enemy (even if the target is not sleeping). If there are no sleeping enemies, 50% damage instead and allies gain an additional 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill.

deathAtkLimit.description: <color=#00edf6>Dark Bane:</color> {0}% Attack increase against Dark units

DeathKissAYandereMaidDarkBoss.name: Death's Kiss
DeathKissAYandereMaidDarkBoss.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 50% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if all enemies on the battlefield are poisoned. Usable 3 times per battle.

DeathKissAYandereMaidDark.name: Death's Kiss
DeathKissAYandereMaidDark.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 50% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if all enemies on the battlefield are poisoned. Usable 3 times per battle.

DeathUnleashedALudmillaDarkNewBoss.name: Unleash Rage
DeathUnleashedALudmillaDarkNewBoss.description:
Heals all allies for 1% of max HP. Steals all Spirit from the enemy team. The Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Then the user enters Chaos Rage for 100TU. While in Chaos Rage, the user's attack is increased by 1.5x (this does not stack with Enrage effects), and the user cannot fall asleep, or be stunned.

Usable if the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill has been triggered while on the battlefield and only once per battle.

DeathUnleashedALudmillaDarkNew.name: Unleash Chaos
DeathUnleashedALudmillaDarkNew.description:
Heals all allies for 1000% of the user's attack. Steals all Spirit from the enemy team. The Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again. Then the user enters Chaos Rage for 100TU. While in Chaos Rage, the user's attack is increased by 1.5x (this does not stack with Enrage effects), and the user cannot fall asleep, or be stunned. The user cannot enter Chaos Rage while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills on the battlefield.

This skill is locked until the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and is locked again after each use. This skill can be used only three times per battle.

Decay.name: Dread
Decay.description: Status effect: This unit cannot act, instead taking 40% of their max HP in damage when they would get the turn.

DecayDrainA.name: Dread Drain
DecayDrainA.description: Gives an enemy with the Dread status effect the turn by reducing their TU to 0, then heals the user for 15% of max HP.

DecayTouchA.name: Dread
DecayTouchA.description: Grants the Dread status effect to 1 enemy. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Units affected by dread cannot act, instead taking 40% of their max HP in damage when they would get the turn.

DefeatAnEnemyPassiveARizetteBrave.name: Instant Link
DefeatAnEnemyPassiveARizetteBrave.description:
This unit starts with Rizette's Link. When this unit enters battle it grants Rizette's Link to another random non-conjured ally that does not have a Link already. Then that ally and this unit have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30% (This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills), and are granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward and Instant Death Ward.

A unit with Rizette's Link has these effects:

Each time an ally with Rizette's Link gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 50% of its max HP.

This unit has 0.25x of their original Attack added to their Attack while they are not Enraged. This increase will stack with other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.25x => 1.75x total).

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, if the defeated enemy is:
- Fire or Light, 2 random non-sleeping enemies gain the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- Storm or Earth, 2 random non-burning enemies gain the Lethal Poison status effect.
- Water or Dark, 2 random enemies that have a current TU of 50 or less are stunned for 100TU.
These effects may trigger before or after other effects.

This Link is removed if this unit or the unit that granted it leaves the battlefield. This unit cannot gain other Links.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, lasts 999 TU, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison, and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning or Boss units.

DefeatBuffAKenshinRegular.name: Rashomon
DefeatBuffAKenshinRegular.description:
All non-boss, non-ephemeral enemies on the battlefield have a 50% chance each of being immediately defeated. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated. The user is considered to have defeated with attacks as many units as are defeated by this effect.

After this skill is used, when the user is defeated by damage from an attack, a copy of the user is added to next in line of ally reinforcements with full health, and will then be considered a conjured unit. The copy's Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match the user.

Unlocked after 5 or more non-conjured units on the battlefield are defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield. Usable once per battle.

DefeatedEnemyAndEntranceStunAKingArthurS.name: Absolute Monarch
DefeatedEnemyAndEntranceStunAKingArthurS.description:
Until the end of this unit's first turn while on the battlefield, this unit cannot be defeated. Afterwards, if this unit would be defeated while it has a Power Charge, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. The Power Charge will be consumed when this effect is triggered.

At the end of each of this unit's turns, or when a non-conjured enemy is defeated, a random enemy with more than 50TU will be stunned for 50TU plus 50TU for each other Storm ally on the battlefield.

When this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Stuns 2 random enemies for 100TU.
- This unit will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills.

DefeatedEnemyBuffPercivalRegular.name: Unyielding Warrior
DefeatedEnemyBuffPercivalRegular.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, and cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or other status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Fire or Light, 2 random enemies gain the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- Storm or Earth, 2 random enemies that are not sleeping gain the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.
- Water or Dark, 2 random enemies are stunned for 200TU.

DefeatedUnitBuffMordredRegularBoss.name: Blood Harvest
DefeatedUnitBuffMordredRegularBoss.description:
Whenever a non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit becomes Enraged and grants a non-sleeping enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.

This will overwrite other Status Effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

DefeatedUnitBuffMordredRegular.name: Blood Reaping
DefeatedUnitBuffMordredRegular.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

Whenever a non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit heals 100% of its max HP, becomes Enraged, gains 1 charge and the Healing Burn status effect.

This will overwrite other Status Effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

DesperateAssassinBombSingleA.name: Last Resort Crush
DesperateAssassinBombSingleA.description: Sacrifices the user for 600% damage to 1 target. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateBiteA2.name: Desperate Drain
DesperateBiteA2.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 50% of its own max if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateBiteA3.name: Desperate Drain
DesperateBiteA3.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 50% of its own max if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateBiteA.name: Desperate Drain
DesperateBiteA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 50% of its own max if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateBiteAllABoss.name: Desperate Drain
DesperateBiteAllABoss.description: 400% damage to all enemies, and heals the user for 5% of damage dealt. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateBiteBoss1.name: Beast Bite
DesperateBiteBoss1.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 5% of its own max. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

DesperateBiteBoss2.name: Desperate Drain
DesperateBiteBoss2.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 10% of their own max if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less. Removes poison and burn from the user.

DesperateBiteBusterA.name: Desperate Assassin
DesperateBiteBusterA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 100% of its own max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateBiteDoubleA.name: Desperate Drain
DesperateBiteDoubleA.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies, and the user recovers their HP by 50% of its own max if damage is dealt. This skill can only be used if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateBiteDoubleBoss01.name: Desperate Drain
DesperateBiteDoubleBoss01.description: 450% damage to 2 enemies, and the user recovers their HP by 15% of its own max if damage is dealt. This skill can only be used if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateBombDoubleA.name: Last Resort Bomb
DesperateBombDoubleA.description: Sacrifices the user for 500% damage to 2 enemies. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateDrainTwiceARtkBride.name: Bridal Swiftslash
DesperateDrainTwiceARtkBride.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 100% of its own max HP if damage is dealt. The user will also recover HP by 100% of its own max the next time it survives an attack. (The user must survive until after the end of the turn it is attacked for this to trigger.) This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less and the user is not in Battle Trance.

DesperateGainSpiritA.name: Desperate Spirit
DesperateGainSpiritA.description: Allies are granted 4 spirit. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

DesperateGainSpiritB.name: Desperate Spirit
DesperateGainSpiritB.description: Allies are granted 3 spirit. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

DesperateIgnoreDeathASnowWhiteMaidBoss.name: Deadly Spell
DesperateIgnoreDeathASnowWhiteMaidBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if at least 1 ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP.

DesperateIgnoreDeathASnowWhiteMaid.name: Deadly Magic
DesperateIgnoreDeathASnowWhiteMaid.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Heals all allies below 50% of max HP for 100% of their max HP. Usable if at least 1 ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP.

DesperateMegaPoisonBombDoubleA.name: Last Resort Poison
DesperateMegaPoisonBombDoubleA.description: Sacrifices the user to grant 2 enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.  Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateMegaPoisonTouchHealSelfA.name: Poison Heart
DesperateMegaPoisonTouchHealSelfA.description: Grants the Mega Poison status effect to 1 enemy for 200TU. The user is healed for 100% of own max HP. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This will overwrite other status effects on the enemy target. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateSleepBombDoubleA.name: Last Resort Sleep
DesperateSleepBombDoubleA.description: Sacrifices the user to grant 2 enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less. Sleep cannot be applied to a unit that Has Slept while on the battlefield.

DesperateSpiritHealSelfA.name: Spirit Heart
DesperateSpiritHealSelfA.description: The user is healed for 100% of own max HP. Allies gain 3 Spirit. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStrikeA2.name: Desperate Strike
DesperateStrikeA2.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. 500% damage if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStrikeA3.name: Desperate Strike
DesperateStrikeA3.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. 500% damage if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStrikeA.name: Desperate Strike
DesperateStrikeA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. 500% damage if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStrikeB2Boss.name: Desperate Strike
DesperateStrikeB2Boss.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. 500% damage if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStrikeB2.name: Desperate Blow
DesperateStrikeB2.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. 400% damage if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStrikeB.name: Desperate Blow
DesperateStrikeB.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. 400% damage if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStrikeDoubleA.name: Desperate Strike
DesperateStrikeDoubleA.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. 400% damage if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStrikeDoubleARizetteNew.name: Desperate Surge
DesperateStrikeDoubleARizetteNew.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. 400% damage if the user's HP is at 25% or less. Enemies damaged by this attack are stunned for 50TU.

DesperateStrikeFastA.name: Desperate Impact
DesperateStrikeFastA.description: 250% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

DesperateStunAllDrainA.name: Storm Heart
DesperateStunAllDrainA.description: Stuns all enemies for 50TU. The user is healed for 100% of own max HP. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStunBombDoubleA.name: Last Resort Stun
DesperateStunBombDoubleA.description: Sacrifices the user to Stun 2 enemies for 200TU. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateStunDrainA.name: Thunder Heart
DesperateStunDrainA.description: Stuns 1 enemy for 150TU. The user is healed for 100% of own max HP. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DesperateTeamTurnBombA.name: Last Resort Turns
DesperateTeamTurnBombA.description: Sacrifices the user to immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Usable only if the user's HP is at 25% or less.

DeusExBarrierPassiveAMurasakiRegularBoss.name: Toxin Barrier
DeusExBarrierPassiveAMurasakiRegularBoss.description:
Allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks while this unit is on the battlefield. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

Whenever an ally takes damage from an attack, a random non-sleeping enemy becomes Mega Poisoned for 200TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

DeusExBarrierPassiveAMurasakiRegular.name: Venom Barrier
DeusExBarrierPassiveAMurasakiRegular.description:
Unless this unit is burning, this unit is immune to Stun effects.

Allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks while this unit is on the battlefield. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

Whenever an ally takes damage from an attack, a random non-burning enemy becomes Mega Poisoned for 200TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

DevilImmunityASatanRegularBoss.name: Ruler of the Wicked
DevilImmunityASatanRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU.

If all units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills, this unit has a 50% bonus to attacks.

Whenever a Fire ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source:

- All allies become Enraged.
- All enemies are granted the Burn status effect and become Weakened. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn deals damage. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

DevilImmunityASatanRegular.name: Ruler of the Damned
DevilImmunityASatanRegular.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit enters battle with the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU and an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

If all units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills, this unit has a 50% bonus to attacks.

Whenever a Fire ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source:

- All allies become Enraged.
- All enemies are granted the Burn status effect and become Weakened. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

DevourHealA.name: Blood Heal
DevourHealA.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements to heal 1 ally for HP equal to 450% of the user's Attack. Cannot be used if there are no allied reinforcements left.

DevourHealAllA.name: Blood Heal
DevourHealAllA.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements to heal all allies on the battlefield for HP equal to 250% of the user's Attack. Cannot be used if there are no allied reinforcements left.

DevourHealEnrageDoubleA.name: Blood Treat
DevourHealEnrageDoubleA.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements to heal 2 allies each for HP equal to 350% of the user's Attack. Those allies become Enraged, having their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turns. This will overwrite the effect of previous Enrage skills. Cannot be used if there are no allied reinforcements left.

DivineWindsBuffAKirinGirlRegularBoss.name: Divine Storms
DivineWindsBuffAKirinGirlRegularBoss.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit, then ally Spirit is doubled. Enemy Spirit is halved (rounded down) then enemies lose 1 Spirit. (e.g. Enemies have 7 Spirit -> 3 then minus 1 = 2).

All allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and a random enemy is Stunned for 50TU. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

DivineWindsBuffAKirinGirlRegular.name: Divine Winds
DivineWindsBuffAKirinGirlRegular.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit, then ally Spirit is doubled. Enemy Spirit is halved (rounded down) then enemies lose 1 Spirit. (e.g. Enemies have 7 Spirit -> 3 then minus 1 = 2).

All allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

DollExtraTurnEntryAFrankensteinRegular.name: Pulling the Strings
DollExtraTurnEntryAFrankensteinRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit enters the battlefield, an ally "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" on the battlefield will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0 and will be Purified.

DollShieldAFrankensteinRegular.name: Sister Substitute
DollShieldAFrankensteinRegular.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep. This unit cannot be Stunned or defeated by non-attack damage if "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" is among allies on the battlefield.

While there is a "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" among allies on the battlefield, if this unit would be defeated by an attack, this unit will be healed for 100% of max HP, and then the ally "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" will be sacrificed.

DoppelBusterAGyurelleBoss.name: Doppelganger Raid
DoppelBusterAGyurelleBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there is another Mega Gyurelle on the battlefield.

DoppelBusterAGyurelle.name: Doppelganger Raid
DoppelBusterAGyurelle.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there is another Earth ally Gyurelle on the battlefield.

DoubleAttackAAnastasiaRegularBoss.name: Ice Shatter
DoubleAttackAAnastasiaRegularBoss.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are frozen or burning. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

DoubleAttackAAnastasiaRegular.name: Cold Decree
DoubleAttackAAnastasiaRegular.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are sleeping, burning or frostburned. All non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

DoubleAttackABahamutGirlRegularBoss.name: Bahamut Blast!
DoubleAttackABahamutGirlRegularBoss.description:
400% damage to 2 enemies, plus 100% for each burning unit on the battlefield (max of 800% total damage if 4 or more units on the battlefield are burning). All non-burning enemies hit are then granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This is considered a Burn Drive type skill.

Unlocked each time a unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use unless it defeats an enemy.

DoubleAttackABahamutGirlRegular.name: Bahamut Blast!
DoubleAttackABahamutGirlRegular.description:
400% damage to 2 enemies, plus 100% for each burning unit on the battlefield (max of 800% total damage if 4 or more units on the battlefield are burning). All non-burning enemies hit are then granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This is considered a Burn Drive type skill.

Unlocked each time a unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use unless it defeats an enemy.

DoubleAttackAChopinRegularBoss.name: Broken Chord
DoubleAttackAChopinRegularBoss.description:
250% damage to 2 enemies, and the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

If Ally Spirit is less than 5, raises Ally Spirit to 5. If Enemy Spirit is more than 5, lowers Enemy Spirit to 5.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Sharp Note. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

DoubleAttackAChopinRegular.name: Broken Chord
DoubleAttackAChopinRegular.description:
250% damage to 2 enemies, and the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

If Ally Spirit is less than 5, raises Ally Spirit to 5. If Enemy Spirit is more than 5, lowers Enemy Spirit to 5.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Sharp Note. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

DoubleAttackADragonGirlRegularBoss.name: Dragon Fang
DoubleAttackADragonGirlRegularBoss.description:
Damage to 2 Enemies, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Incinerate since this skill was last used.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Burn will gain the Burn status effect.

DoubleAttackADragonGirlRegular.name: Dragon Fang
DoubleAttackADragonGirlRegular.description:
Damage to 2 Enemies, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Incinerate since this skill was last used.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Burn will gain the Burn status effect.

DoubleAttackAElminaModernBoss.name: Photon Cut
DoubleAttackAElminaModernBoss.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies, plus 150% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 650% total damage). This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, and skin passive skills.

DoubleAttackAElminaModern.name: Photon Splitter
DoubleAttackAElminaModern.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies, plus 150% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 650% total damage). This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, and skin passive skills. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

DoubleAttackAFreyaNewBoss.name: Meteor Call
DoubleAttackAFreyaNewBoss.description:
400% damage to 2 enemies. Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, this skill will randomly deal either 800% or 1000% damage instead. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

DoubleAttackAFreyaNew.name: Meteor Call
DoubleAttackAFreyaNew.description:
400% damage to 2 enemies. Every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield, this skill will randomly deal either 800% or 1000% damage instead. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

DoubleAttackAKenshinRegularBoss.name: Toxic Burst
DoubleAttackAKenshinRegularBoss.description:
1000% damage to 2 enemies. Minus 100% damage for each Spirit the enemy team has (max of -500% if the enemy team has 5+ Spirit). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the targets hit have burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn). Then grants all hit Mega Poisoned enemies Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then grants Mega Poison for 200TU to all other enemies that were hit.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on the affected enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

DoubleAttackAKenshinRegular.name: Toxic Burst
DoubleAttackAKenshinRegular.description:
1000% damage to 2 enemies. Minus 100% damage for each Spirit the enemy team has (max of -500% if the enemy team has 5+ Spirit). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the targets hit have burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn). Then grants all hit Mega Poisoned enemies Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then grants Mega Poison for 200TU to all other enemies that were hit.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on the affected enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

DoubleAttackAMyshaKnightBoss.name: Earthen Smite
DoubleAttackAMyshaKnightBoss.description:
400% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are poisoned or sleeping. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

Then non-burning targets hit are randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

DoubleAttackAMyshaKnight.name: Groundbreaker
DoubleAttackAMyshaKnight.description:
400% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are poisoned or sleeping. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

Then non-burning targets hit are randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

DoubleAttackANikeRegularBoss.name: Divine Blast
DoubleAttackANikeRegularBoss.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. If at least one of the hit enemies is not defeated by this attack, the user gains a Power Charge. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

DoubleAttackANikeRegular.name: Divine Blast
DoubleAttackANikeRegular.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. If at least one of the hit enemies is not defeated by this attack, the user gains a Power Charge. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

DoubleAttackAPerryRegularBoss.name: Water Blast
DoubleAttackAPerryRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. If an enemy on the battlefield is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead to both targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

DoubleAttackAPerryRegular.name: Water Barrage
DoubleAttackAPerryRegular.description: 200% damage to 2 enemies. If an enemy on the battlefield is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead to both targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt.

DoubleAttackARizKouhaiBoss.name: Deadly Burn Blast
DoubleAttackARizKouhaiBoss.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

DoubleAttackARizKouhai.name: Deadly Burn Blast
DoubleAttackARizKouhai.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

DoubleAttackARyomaRegularBoss.name: One Thousand Cuts
DoubleAttackARyomaRegularBoss.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead to targets that do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

DoubleAttackARyomaRegular.name: One Thousand Cuts
DoubleAttackARyomaRegular.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead to targets that do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

DoubleAttackASatanRegularBoss.name: Devil's Anger

Usable if the user has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield or if all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills. A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn deals damage. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

DoubleAttackASatanRegular.name: Devil's Fury

200% damage to 2 enemies, plus 200% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 800% damage). This attack ignores the Stealth status effect, and effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated. The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU.

This will overwrite other status effects on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

DoubleAttackASiegfriedRegularBoss.name: Chilling Geyser

This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

DoubleAttackASiegfriedRegular.name: Chilling Geyser

1000% damage to 2 enemies. The user will grant Frostburn to the next enemy that enters the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Unlocked each time the user defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use unless it defeats an enemy. Usable twice per battle.

DoubleAttackAWashingtonRegular.name: Tactical Overkill

1000% damage to 2 enemies. The user will grant Frostburn to the next enemy that enters the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

DoubleHelioslashACrossSwordKnightDarkBos.name: Cursed Helioslash

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

DoubleHelioslashACrossSwordKnightDark.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and the Stealth Status Effect. DoubleNoMomentumExtraTurnALuBuRegularBos.name: Dragonfire Dance

DoubleNoMomentumExtraTurnALuBuRegular.name: Dragonfire Dance

DragonEntryADragonGirlRegularBoss.name: Fiery Thunder
DragonEntryADragonGirlRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU, and has 80% damage reduction from attacks until it damages an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield.

Stun a random burning enemy for 50TU. This effect triggers once for each burning unit on the battlefield when this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn deals damage. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Until this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, this unit:

- is immune to Poison status effects.
- has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU and a Burn Shield.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

DragonHeartPassiveASiegfriedRegular.name: Dragonslayer

Until this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, this unit:

Whenever another ally that is either Fire element or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

DreamHuntDrainC.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they are sleeping. If damage is dealt to a sleeping target, the user recovers HP to 100% of its own max.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with Sleep Thorns. Unless this unit is burning, this unit is immune to Stun effects.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while it has Sleep Thorns and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 100% of its max HP, and will have its TU reduced to 0.

This unit's attacks:
- will not wake sleeping enemies.
- heal this unit fully when they deal damage to a target with Cursed Sleep.
- grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to non-burning units hit after damage is dealt. This effect cannot trigger if Ryoma has no other allies on the battlefield.

ElementPowerAMechaSisterNew.name: Modular Shot
ElementPowerAMechaSisterNew.description:
1250% damage to 2 enemies. Unlocked each time an ally on the battlefield is defeated by an attack while this unit is on the battlefield. If that ally was:
- Water, this attack grants hit targets Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
- Fire, this attack grants all allies the Burn status effect.
- Storm, this attack grants hit targets Stun for 200TU.
- Earth, this attack grants hit targets Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
- Light, this attack heals all allies for 100% of max HP and Purifies them.
- Dark, this attack grants hit targets Mega Poison for 200TU.
Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. The Elemental effect will be determined at the time this skill unlocks. When multiple allies are defeated at the same time, only one Element will be considered.

EmergencyProtectAlliesA.name: Emergency Guard
EmergencyProtectAlliesA.description: If there is another ally at 50% or less of max HP and no other ally Guardian, this unit will become a Guardian and will have 50% damage reduction from attacks until there is another ally Guardian. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

EmergencyProtectAlliesAForReversal.name: Emergency Guard

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

Usable if 2 or more enemies have 300TU or more and only once per battle.
