EnergyAttackSingleAStealth.name: Vanishing Burst
EnergyAttackSingleAStealth.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. The user is also granted the Stealth status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Usable only if the user has stored at least one charge. Consumes 1 charge on the user.

EnGardeBuffAZoroRegularBoss.name: En Garde
EnGardeBuffAZoroRegularBoss.description:
Weakens all enemies. The user is Enraged, granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, Counter Stance for 150TU and 80% damage reduction from attacks until the end of its next turn. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Weak or Enrage skills on affected units, and other status effects on the user. For 150TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

EnGardeBuffAZoroRegular.name: En Garde
EnGardeBuffAZoroRegular.description:
Weakens all enemies. The user is Enraged, granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, Counter Stance for 150TU and 80% damage reduction from attacks until the end of its next turn. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Weak or Enrage skills on affected units, and other status effects on the user. For 150TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

EnrageArmorHealAllyAGyurelle.name: Dark Blessing
EnrageArmorHealAllyAGyurelle.description: Heal 1 other ally for HP equal to 200% of the user's Attack. The target also gains the Armor status effect and becomes Enraged, having their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite other status effects, and the effects of any previous Enrage skills on that unit. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed.

EscalatingAttackA.name: Chain Attack
EscalatingAttackA.description: 75% damage to 1 enemy, then the user gains a Chain Mark. This damage is doubled for each chain mark on this unit, up to 300% damage total. All chain marks are removed from the user if it takes damage from an enemy attack. A unit can have no more than 2 chain marks.

EvasionPassiveAYandereMaidDark.name: Relentless Killer
EvasionPassiveAYandereMaidDark.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 10% of its max HP.

If no enemy is Poisoned at the start of an enemy turn, then at the end of that turn this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and will have its TU reduced to 0. Then this effect cannot trigger again until 100TU advances (minus 20TU per Awakening).

After entering battle, for 200TU, this unit:
- Cannot be burned
- Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 100TU.
- Will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target all allies will not be ignored).

EvilAuraPassiveAKingArthurEvilBoss.name: Returned King
EvilAuraPassiveAKingArthurEvilBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect. This effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

This unit enters battle with 1% HP Regen for 100TU. A unit with 1% HP Regen will heal for 1% of their max HP after every turn. HP Regen effects will overwrite existing HP Regen effects.

EvilAuraPassiveAKingArthurEvil.name: Tainted King
EvilAuraPassiveAKingArthurEvil.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated or stunned until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

This unit enters battle with 10% HP Regen for 200TU, and an Instant Death Ward.

An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. A unit with 10% HP Regen will heal for 10% of their max HP after every turn. HP Regen effects will overwrite existing HP Regen effects.

FabledSwordPassiveAMasamuneRegularBoss.name: Killing Storm
FabledSwordPassiveAMasamuneRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit gains 20% damage reduction from attacks for each ally on the battlefield (up to 80% max).

Whenever this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack, a random enemy will be stunned for 100TU.

If this unit has survived on the battlefield for 300TU or more, this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

FabledSwordPassiveAMasamuneRegular.name: Undying Storm
FabledSwordPassiveAMasamuneRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit gains 20% damage reduction from attacks for each ally on the battlefield (up to 80% max). Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack, a random enemy will be stunned for 100TU.

If this unit has survived on the battlefield for 300TU or more, this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

FafnirsBanePassiveASiegfriedRegularBoss.name: Returning Hero
FafnirsBanePassiveASiegfriedRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with 1 Charge, 1% HP Regen for 100TU, and will Endure the first damage that would defeat it with 1HP. A unit with 1% HP Regen will heal for 1% of their max HP after every turn. HP Regen effects will overwrite existing HP Regen effects.

This unit cannot be stunned if there is a unit on the battlefield that is Fire element, or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill.

This unit's active skills all cost 25% less TU for each charge it has stored, up to 75% less max with 3 charges. Other effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this is in effect.

At the end of each enemy turn, if no enemies had frostburn at the start of the turn, a random non-sleeping enemy is granted frostburn. This effect cannot trigger if Siegfried has no other allies on the battlefield.

FafnirsBanePassiveASiegfriedRegular.name: Returning Legend
FafnirsBanePassiveASiegfriedRegular.description:
This unit enters battle with 1 Charge, 10% HP Regen for 200TU, and will Endure the first damage that would defeat it with 1HP. A unit with 10% HP Regen will heal for 10% of their max HP after every turn. HP Regen effects will overwrite existing HP Regen effects.

This unit cannot be stunned if there is a unit on the battlefield that is Fire element, or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill.

This unit's active skills all cost 25% less TU for each charge it has stored, up to 75% less max with 3 charges. Other effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this is in effect.

At the end of each enemy turn, if no enemies had frostburn at the start of the turn, a random non-sleeping enemy is granted frostburn. This effect has a 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to trigger and cannot trigger if Siegfried has no other allies on the battlefield.

FakeOutDeathAMurasakiRegular01.name: Red Herring
FakeOutDeathAMurasakiRegular01.description:
The user becomes a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

After this skill is used, whenever the user is hit by an attack and is defeated or survives with 25% or less of max HP until after the end of the turn:
- They are sacrificed if they were not defeated.
- A copy of the user is added to next in line of ally reinforcements. The copy's Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match the user.
- All allies become Enraged and have their current TU reduced by 100. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those allies. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

These effects won't trigger if defeated by the burn status effect.

Unlocked the first time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

FakeOutDeathAMurasakiRegularBoss.name: Fake Out
FakeOutDeathAMurasakiRegularBoss.description:
The user becomes a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

After this skill is used, whenever the user is hit by an attack and is defeated or survives with 5% or less of max HP until after the end of the turn:
- They are sacrificed if they were not defeated.
- A copy of the user is added to next in line of ally reinforcements.
- All allies become Enraged and have their current TU reduced by 100. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those allies. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

These effects won't trigger if defeated by the burn status effect.

Unlocked the first time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

FakeOutDeathAMurasakiRegular.name: Red Herring
FakeOutDeathAMurasakiRegular.description:
The user becomes a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

Unlocked the first time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield or if this unit is on the battlefield at the very start of the battle. This skill is locked again if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

FallenAllyBuffPercivalRegular.name: Forsaken Knight
FallenAllyBuffPercivalRegular.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects until its first turn since entering the battlefield.
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 800% of this unit's attack when this unit is defeated by an enemy.

When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks for 150TU, is healed to max HP and becomes Enraged. Then all other allies gain the Armor status effect and become Enraged. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time.

FeedbackLoopPassiveAMechaSisterNew.name: Ultimate Firewall
FeedbackLoopPassiveAMechaSisterNew.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements, it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

When this unit is damaged by an enemy attack, that enemy's Active Skills are disabled for 30TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if this unit is defeated.

Until this unit has survived for 1000TU on the battlefield, every second time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 100% of max HP, and be Purified.

FinalHuntABoss.name: Final Hunt
FinalHuntABoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the enemy has no reinforcements remaining. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

FinalVerdictAChronosRegularBoss.name: Sands of Time
FinalVerdictAChronosRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

FinalVerdictAChronosRegular.name: Sands of Time
FinalVerdictAChronosRegular.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

FinishingWaveAMermaidRegularBoss.name: Royal Trident
FinishingWaveAMermaidRegularBoss.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy and adds 1 Super Suimori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Removes any Sleep Wards from the target.

This skill becomes locked after use until an ally Suimori gets the turn, or until there are no Suimori's in the ally team.

FinishingWaveAMermaidRegular.name: Royal Trident
FinishingWaveAMermaidRegular.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy and adds 1 Super Suimori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Removes any Sleep Wards from the target.

This skill becomes locked after use until an ally Suimori gets the turn, or until there are no Suimoris in the ally team.

FireFocusPassiveADragonGirlRegularBoss.name: Dragon's Focus
FireFocusPassiveADragonGirlRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects, and cannot be Stunned. If this unit is burning, this unit has Hold Ground (if this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP).

Add a Super Himori to the end of allied reinforcements whenever:
- this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield.
- a non-conjured Fire ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

Whenever a Himori ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source (even if Ephemeral), a random burning enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Whenever an ally Himori enters the battlefield from reinforcements, stun a random enemy for 50TU.

FireFocusPassiveADragonGirlRegular.name: Dragon's Focus
FireFocusPassiveADragonGirlRegular.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects, and cannot be Stunned. If this unit is burning, this unit has Hold Ground (if this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP).

Add a Super Himori to the end of allied reinforcements whenever:
- this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield.
- a non-conjured Fire ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

Whenever a Himori ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source (even if Ephemeral), a random burning enemy is Stunned for 100TU. Whenever an ally Himori enters the battlefield from reinforcements, stun a random enemy for 50TU.

FirewallALuciferRegular.name: Flame Sweep
FirewallALuciferRegular.description: 100% damage to all enemies, 250% damage instead if the user is burning, or to targets that are burning. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This is not considered a Burn Blast type skill.

FirstTurnSuperManRolotiaDark1Awakening.name: Dark Timeline
FirstTurnSuperManRolotiaDark1Awakening.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

Until the end of this unit's third turn while on the battlefield:
- This unit is immune to Poison and Sleep status effects.
- This unit is immune to Stun effects unless it is burning.
- Unless it is burning, this unit has 80% damage reduction and has a 60% chance, plus 10% chance per Awakening (up to 100% if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Until the end of this unit's second turn while on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack, a random non-burning enemy is immediately granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, then a random non-burning enemy immediately becomes Lethal Poisoned for 999TU. This is not a Skin passive skill.

FirstTurnSuperManRolotiaDark2Awakenings.name: Dark Timeline
FirstTurnSuperManRolotiaDark2Awakenings.description:

Until the end of this unit's third turn while on the battlefield:

- This unit is immune to Stun effects unless it is burning.
- Unless it is burning, this unit has 80% damage reduction and has a 60% chance, plus 10% chance per Awakening (up to 100% if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Until the end of this unit's second turn while on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack, a random non-burning enemy is immediately granted Cursed Sleep for 200TU, then a random non-burning enemy immediately becomes Lethal Poisoned for 999TU. This is not a Skin passive skill.

ForceSleepAttackAOtohimeBoss.name: Knockout Wave
ForceSleepAttackAOtohimeBoss.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to deal 400% damage instead. If no enemies are sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

ForceSleepAttackAOtohime.name: Knockout Hit
ForceSleepAttackAOtohime.description: 100% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user's Drowning Blossom active skill has reached its usage limit. If no enemies are sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

ForceSleepAttackPlusSingleAIbarahimeSwim.name: Hypno Blast+
ForceSleepAttackPlusSingleAIbarahimeSwim.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 25% chance of granting that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. If Sleep is applied, it will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

ForceSleepAttackPlusSingleAIbarahimeSwim.name: Hypno Blast+
ForceSleepAttackPlusSingleAIbarahimeSwim.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. 25% chance of granting that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. If Sleep is applied, it will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

ForceSleepHighLowEntranceAndKnockbackImm.name: Turning Tides
ForceSleepHighLowEntranceAndKnockbackImm.description:
Sleeps the non-sleeping enemy with the highest current TU for 200TU, then Sleeps the non-sleeping enemy with the lowest current TU for 200TU, even if those targets have already slept while on the battlefield. This unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. These effects are triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements.

Until this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, or if this unit is conjured:
-This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
-When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

ForestBear02.name: Noctursus
ForestBear02.description: While not generally known to attack humans, Noctursus will look for food wherever they can get it. On the other hand, this means they will make dedicated, fierce allies if given a reliable food source. Some woodland people even rely on them as hunting companions.

FudgeAugmentDrainIsAPassive.description: When this unit deals damage to an enemy with an attack, this unit is healed for 100% of total damage dealt.

FullForceALudmillaDarkNewBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user is not a Guardian.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP. This healing is increased to 100% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

FullRechargeA.name: Full Charge
FullRechargeA.description: The user gains 3 Charges and is healed for 100% of max HP. Usable only if the user has no charges stored. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges.

GainAttackSingleAttackBoostABurnedGirlBo.name: Raging Charge
GainAttackSingleAttackBoostABurnedGirlBo.description:
75% damage to 1 enemy, the user is granted 1 Charge and becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

GainAttackSingleAttackBoostABurnedGirl.name: Raging Charge
GainAttackSingleAttackBoostABurnedGirl.description:
75% damage to 1 enemy, the user is granted 1 Charge and becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

GainAttackSingleStanceFastA.name: Swift Counter
GainAttackSingleStanceFastA.description: 75% damage to 1 enemy. The user is also granted the Counter Stance status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. For 150TU, the next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn. Counter stance cannot be gained if the user already has the Counter Stance status effect or has gotten the current turn from Counter Stance.

GainAttackSingleStealthA.name: Swift Stealth
GainAttackSingleStealthA.description: 75% damage to 1 enemy. The user is also granted the Stealth status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

GainNinjaTurnAGoemonRegularBoss.name: Art of Invisibility
GainNinjaTurnAGoemonRegularBoss.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be granted Stealth, and will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0.

When this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, it grants an ally with the lowest TU and a Stealth Strike type skill:

- Stealth
- a Stealth Shield
- the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.

GainNinjaTurnAGoemonRegular.name: Art of Invisibility
GainNinjaTurnAGoemonRegular.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be granted Stealth, and will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0.

When this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, it grants an ally with the lowest TU and a Stealth Strike type skill:

- Stealth
- a Stealth Shield
- the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.

GainTurnAFrankensteinRegularDollBoss.name: Pulled Strings
GainTurnAFrankensteinRegularDollBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit enters the battlefield:
- it will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0 if Frankenstein is in the ally team, including reinforcements.
- this unit will become a Guardian if Frankenstein is not among allies on the battlefield. This effect will be lost if an ally Frankenstein enters the battlefield.

GainTurnAFrankensteinRegularDoll.name: Pulled Strings
GainTurnAFrankensteinRegularDoll.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit enters the battlefield:
- it will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0 if "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" is in the ally team, including reinforcements.
- this unit will become a Guardian if "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" is not among allies on the battlefield. This effect will be lost if an ally "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" enters the battlefield.

GainTurnPassiveAMusashiDarkBoss.name: Unstoppable Musashi
GainTurnPassiveAMusashiDarkBoss.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Until the end of this unit's first turn while on the battlefield, this unit has Stun Immunity and Sleep Immunity. Afterwards, this unit has Stun Immunity and Sleep Immunity for 150TU.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit will immediately get the next turn if either that enemy had 100% of their max HP at the start of the turn, or if the damage leaves them on or below 25% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack).
- This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.
- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

GainTurnPassiveAMusashiDark.name: Merciless Musashi
GainTurnPassiveAMusashiDark.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Until the end of this unit's first turn while on the battlefield, this unit has Stun Immunity and Sleep Immunity. Afterwards, this unit has Stun Immunity and Sleep Immunity for 100TU.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit will immediately get the next turn if either that enemy had 100% of their max HP at the start of the turn, or if the damage leaves them on or below 25% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack).
- This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.
- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

GetRegenerateAllSpiritGainA.name: Song of Rejuvenation
GetRegenerateAllSpiritGainA.description: Allies heal for 20% of their own max HP when they get a turn, and allies gain 1 Spirit after each ally turn. These effects will trigger for 250TU each time this unit enters the battlefield, and will end if this unit leaves the battlefield.

GetRegenerateFor300TU.name: Survival Regeneration
GetRegenerateFor300TU.description: When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP unless Survivor's Fury is unlocked by this unit.

GetSurvivalStunSkinAllA.name: Survival Storm Skin
GetSurvivalStunSkinAllA.description: All enemy units get stunned for 50TU whenever this unit is damaged by an enemy attack, unless Survivor's Fury is unlocked by this unit.

GetTurnEnrageAllyGainSpiritEntranceA.name: Meet Morphie!
GetTurnEnrageAllyGainSpiritEntranceA.description:
When this unit enters battle all allies become Enraged, having their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turns, and allies gain 3 Spirit.

This unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield.

GiantShieldYamatoRegular.name: Ironclad
GiantShieldYamatoRegular.description: The user is Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) and healed for 100% of max HP. For 100TU, the user cannot be defeated and is immune to Poison, Burn and Sleep status effects. When this effect expires, all other allies will be healed for 100% of their max HP and be Purified. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield, and only if there is no other non-Mori Guardian on the battlefield.

GilgameshRegularPassive.name: Explosive Velocity
GilgameshRegularPassive.description:
After this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all other units on the battlefield are stunned for 150TU. Ally Stun Absorbers do not redirect this stun, and allies will not be stunned by this effect if there is an enemy Stun Absorber on the battlefield.

Other burning allies will have their TU costs reduced by 20% while this unit is on the battlefield. This effect can stack with Quicken effects and weapon skills with diminishing returns, but will not apply to allies that have other TU reduction passive skills.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, all other allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will become Enraged, this will overwrite previous Enrage effects on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

GiveTurnASatanRegularBoss.name: Deal with the Devil
GiveTurnASatanRegularBoss.description:
Enrages 1 other ally, grants them the burn status effect, and immediately gives them the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with an attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

GiveTurnASatanRegular.name: Deal with the Devil
GiveTurnASatanRegular.description:
Enrages 1 other ally, grants them the burn status effect, and immediately gives them the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with an attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

GiveTurnAttackAZoroRegularBoss.name: Tandem Takedown
GiveTurnAttackAZoroRegularBoss.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if another ally on the battlefield has 50TU or less. Then immediately give an ally with the lowest TU (excluding the user) the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn. The given turn is granted after Counter Stance or Counter Skin type effects triggered by this attack, and so the affected ally will act before a countering enemy. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

GiveTurnAttackAZoroRegular.name: Tandem Takedown
GiveTurnAttackAZoroRegular.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if another ally on the battlefield has 50TU or less. Then immediately give an ally with the lowest TU (excluding the user) the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn. The given turn is granted after Counter Stance or Counter Skin type effects triggered by this attack, and so the affected ally will act before a countering enemy. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

GodPassiveModeBuffZeusStryBoss.name: A God's Power
GodPassiveModeBuffZeusStryBoss.description:
This unit has their Attack increased by 25% of its base. This does not stack with Enrage effects, but will stack with other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.25x => 1.75x total).

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Fire or Light, 2 random non-sleeping enemies gain the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- Storm or Earth, 2 random non-burning enemies gain the Lethal Poison status effect for 999TU.
- Water or Dark, 2 random enemies that have a current TU of 50 or less are stunned for 100TU.
These effects may trigger before or after other effects.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, lasts 999 TU, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison, and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning or Boss units.

GrandDesignBuffADaVinciRegular.name: Grand Design
GrandDesignBuffADaVinciRegular.description:
Heals all allies for 500% of the user's attack. The user is granted a Power Charge.

The user gains one of the following effects at random:
- The user's next attack to hit while on the battlefield ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target(s) from being defeated.
- The user's next attack to hit while on the battlefield immediately gives the user the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

Usable only if the user has no Power Charge. Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

GrantProtectOnceOtherAlliesA.name: Endless Aegis
GrantProtectOnceOtherAlliesA.description: Grants Guard Once to all other allies. For enemy attacks that target 1 or 2 allies, each ally with guard once will redirect 1 hit that does not target a Guardian. This will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This effect will go away on an ally only if they redirect an attack, targeting the ally unit directly will not remove it. Units with guard once cannot have the Counter Stance status effect.

GrantProtectSelfA.name: Gain Guard Once
GrantProtectSelfA.description: The user gains Guard Once. For the next enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the attacks is instead redirected to the user. This will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This effect will go away only if the user redirects an attack, targeting the user directly will not remove it. Units with guard once cannot have the Counter Stance status effect.

GrantProtectTeammatesA.name: Grant Guard
GrantProtectTeammatesA.description: Grants Guard Once to 1 ally. For the next enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the attacks is instead redirected to the ally with guard once. This will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This effect will go away only if that ally redirects an attack, targeting the ally unit directly will not remove it. Units with guard once cannot have the Counter Stance status effect.

GrantProtectTeammatesAFire.name: Grant Guard
GrantProtectTeammatesAFire.description: Grants Guard Once to 1 Fire ally. For the next enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the attacks is instead redirected to the ally with guard once. This will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This effect will go away only if that ally redirects an attack, targeting the ally unit directly will not remove it. Units with Guard Once cannot have the Counter Stance status effect.

GuardAllAttackAKaguyahimeSwimsuitBoss.name: Trail of Lanterns
GuardAllAttackAKaguyahimeSwimsuitBoss.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 600% damage instead to each target that is a Guardian. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield.

GuardAllAttackAKaguyahimeSwimsuit.name: Trail of Flames
GuardAllAttackAKaguyahimeSwimsuit.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead to each burning target. 600% damage instead to each target that is a Guardian. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield.

GuardBlockadePassiveYamatoRegular.name: Unsinkable Guard
GuardBlockadePassiveYamatoRegular.description:
This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

Whenever this unit or another non-Guardian ally takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn and this unit has any other allies left (even in reinforcements), this unit will:
- Heal for 25% of max HP.
- Gain a Charge.

Whenever this unit would gain a charge while already having 3 Charges, an Imposter is added to the next in line of enemy reinforcements, and a random enemy is granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Then all Charges are removed from this unit, and it cannot gain any more charges until the following turn. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

GuardDestroyerAHijikataRegularBoss.name: Veil of Dread
GuardDestroyerAHijikataRegularBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield, and there is a Guardian among enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use.

GuardDestroyerAHijikataRegular.name: Veil of Dread
GuardDestroyerAHijikataRegular.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield, and there is a Guardian among enemies on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use.

GuardianEvasionLudmillaYukataBoss.name: Elusive Guard
GuardianEvasionLudmillaYukataBoss.description:
This unit is a Guardian if no other allies on the battlefield are Guardians. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

If this unit isn't a Guardian, its Attack is increased to 1.25x and this unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.

GuardianEvasionLudmillaYukata.name: Evasive Guard
GuardianEvasionLudmillaYukata.description:
This unit has a 20% chance to ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets, plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings). Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored. If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield for 200TU after entering battle.

GuardPassiveALudmillaDarkNewBoss.name: Dark Guard
GuardPassiveALudmillaDarkNewBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

This unit will become a Guardian:
- When this unit enters the battlefield, if there is no ally Guardian on the battlefield

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit stops being a Guardian each time it activates Unleash Rage.

GuardPassiveALudmillaDarkNew.name: Corrupted Guard
GuardPassiveALudmillaDarkNew.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated or stunned until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit has 25% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% per Awakening (up to 65% if this unit has 4 Awakenings). This unit will be healed for 50% of its max HP each time an enemy gets the turn while the enemy team's Spirit is at 2 or less.

This unit will become a Guardian:
- When this unit enters the battlefield, if there is no ally Guardian on the battlefield
- Each time this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, and has any other allies left.

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit stops being a Guardian each time it activates Unleash Chaos.

GuardSweepAllMegaPoisonALokiRegularBoss.name: Devil's Dance
GuardSweepAllMegaPoisonALokiRegularBoss.description: 300% damage to all enemies, this attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Each target hit has a 50% chance to be granted the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

GuardSweepAllMegaPoisonALokiRegular.name: Devil's Dance
GuardSweepAllMegaPoisonALokiRegular.description:
300% damage to all enemies, and each enemy hit has a 50% chance to be Mega Poisoned for 200TU. This attack ignores skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield.

HardToDefeatACthulhuGirlRegularBoss.name: Cult of Madness
HardToDefeatACthulhuGirlRegularBoss.description:
Enemies damaged by an attack from this unit are Mega Poisoned for 200TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

If this unit is on 1HP at the end of a turn, it is healed for 5% max HP and Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.

This unit gains 3 charges. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges.

HardToDefeatACthulhuGirlRegular.name: Cult of Cthulhu
HardToDefeatACthulhuGirlRegular.description:
Enemies damaged by an attack from this unit are Mega Poisoned for 200TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

If this unit is on 1HP at the end of a turn, it is healed for 100% max HP and Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.

This unit gains 3 charges. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges.

HardToKillRapunzelRegular.name: Golden Shield
HardToKillRapunzelRegular.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or other status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit will heal 30% of max HP on every ally turn.

Each time a sleeping enemy gets the turn, removes Sleep status effects from this unit and this unit is Enraged.

HasBurnedBlastANobunagaBoss.name: Stroke of Death
HasBurnedBlastANobunagaBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 10% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Unlocked each time this unit gains the Burn status effect. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

HasBurnedBlastANobunaga.name: Stroke of Death
HasBurnedBlastANobunaga.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Unlocked each time this unit gains the Burn status effect. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

HasSleptDrainA.name: Dawn's Drain
HasSleptDrainA.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy if they are awake after having fallen asleep while on the battlefield, and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. No healing will occur if the target is not awake after having fallen asleep while on the battlefield.

HasSleptEaterADoubleCatIdolGirlBoss.name: Dawn Raid
HasSleptEaterADoubleCatIdolGirlBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are awake after having fallen asleep while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

HasSleptSlayerARapunzelRegularBoss.name: Crackling Smite
HasSleptSlayerARapunzelRegularBoss.description: This attack ignores Guardians. 600% damage to 1 enemy if they are awake after having fallen asleep while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

HasSleptSlayerARapunzelRegular.name: Crackling Smite
HasSleptSlayerARapunzelRegular.description: This attack ignores Guardians. 600% damage to 1 enemy if they are awake after having fallen asleep while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

HasteUp0UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp0UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 1% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

HasteUp0UserHpMax.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp0UserHpMax.description: 1% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUp1UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp1UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 3% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

HasteUp1UserHpMax.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp1UserHpMax.description: 3% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUp2UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp2UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 5% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

HasteUp2UserHpMax.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp2UserHpMax.description: 5% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUp3UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp3UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 7% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

HasteUp3UserHpMax.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp3UserHpMax.description: 7% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUp4UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp4UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 15% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

HasteUp4UserHpMax.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp4UserHpMax.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUp5UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp5UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 15% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

HasteUp5UserHpMax.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp5UserHpMax.description: 15% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUp6UserHp50PercentOrLess.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp6UserHp50PercentOrLess.description: 20% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

HasteUp6UserHpMax.name: TU Cost Down
HasteUp6UserHpMax.description: 20% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUpDamageReduc4UserHpMax.name: Finesse Up
HasteUpDamageReduc4UserHpMax.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUpDamageReduc5UserHpMax.name: Finesse Up
HasteUpDamageReduc5UserHpMax.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 8% and 8% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUpDamageReduc6UserHpMax.name: Finesse Up
HasteUpDamageReduc6UserHpMax.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 10% and 10% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

HasteUpStealthStealthHealSpiritEntrance.name: Shadow Dash
HasteUpStealthStealthHealSpiritEntrance.description:
Allies gain 3 Spirit. This unit is healed for 99.9% of Max HP, gains the Stealth status effect, and will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. These effects are all triggered whenever this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 40% while this unit has the Stealth status effect. Other allies on the battlefield with Stealth Strike type active skills are Quickened by 30% whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken effects on those allies.

-Other effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU Cost reduction is in effect.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

HealAllEntranceLowSpiritA.name: Crisis Heal Entry
HealAllEntranceLowSpiritA.description: Heals all allies for 30% of their max HP. Triggered if ally Spirit is 1 or less when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

HealAllSacA.name: Last Heal
HealAllSacA.description: Sacrifices the user to heal all allies for HP equal to 250% of the user's Attack.

HealAllStealthAllyOnTurnA.name: Shadow Regeneration
HealAllStealthAllyOnTurnA.description: When this unit gets a turn, all allies with the Stealth status effect heal 15% of their max HP.

HealAllyIfEnemyPoisonedA.name: Poison Heal
HealAllyIfEnemyPoisonedA.description: Heals 1 other ally for HP equal to 100% of this unit's attack if an enemy is poisoned. This increases by 100% for each enemy poisoned beyond the first, up to a max of 400%. Usable only if an enemy is poisoned.

HealAllyIfEnemyPoisonedDoubleA.name: Poison Heal
HealAllyIfEnemyPoisonedDoubleA.description: Heals 2 allies for HP equal to 150% of this unit's attack if an enemy is poisoned. This increases by 150% for each enemy poisoned beyond the first, up to a max of 600%. Usable only if an enemy is poisoned.

HealAndPurifyBuffAGenieRegularBoss.name: Limited Healing
HealAndPurifyBuffAGenieRegularBoss.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and heal for 1% of its max HP.

Purifies all allies on the battlefield when another ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

HealAndPurifyBuffAGenieRegular.name: Unlimited Healing
HealAndPurifyBuffAGenieRegular.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and heal for 75% of its max HP.

Purifies and heals all allies on the battlefield for 800% of this unit's attack when another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time.

HealArmorSelfA.name: Healing Armor
HealArmorSelfA.description: The user is healed for 30% of max HP and gains the Armor status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

HealArmorSelfFullEntranceABoss.name: Armor Heal Entry
HealArmorSelfFullEntranceABoss.description: This unit gains the Armor status effect and is fully healed. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

HealArmorSelfFullEntranceA.name: Armor Heal Entry
HealArmorSelfFullEntranceA.description: This unit gains the Armor status effect and is fully healed. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

HealAttackA.name: Attack & Heal
HealAttackA.description: Damage to 1 enemy, and heals 1 random ally that does not have max HP for 25% of that ally's max HP.

HealBombSingleAlly25PercentHealABoss.name: Small Heal Bomb
HealBombSingleAlly25PercentHealABoss.description: Sacrifices the user to heal 1 other ally on the battlefield for 25% of max HP.

HealBombSingleAllyA.name: Heal Bomb
HealBombSingleAllyA.description: Sacrifices the user to heal 1 other ally on the battlefield for 100% of max HP.

HealDoubleA.name: Heal
HealDoubleA.description: Heals 2 allies for HP equal to 350% of the user's Attack.

HealDoubleSacA.name: Last Heal
HealDoubleSacA.description: Sacrifices the user to heal 2 allies for HP equal to 350% of the user's Attack. Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

HealEndureWhenHurtBelow50Percent.name: Godly Endurance
HealEndureWhenHurtBelow50Percent.description:
When this unit enters battle (whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements) it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP.

Whenever this unit takes damage and survives until after the end of the turn with below 50% of max HP, this unit will be healed fully, will gain Endure, and this effect will become locked for 100TU or until this unit defeats an enemy with an attack.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this unit will be healed fully and gain Endure. Endure effects cannot stack.

HealEnrageSelfA.name: Healing Rage
HealEnrageSelfA.description: Heals the user for 50% of max HP and the user's Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effect of previous Enrage skills. Usable only if the user's HP is not at max.

HealFrozenAllyOnTurnA.name: Frozen Regeneration
HealFrozenAllyOnTurnA.description: When this unit gets a turn, any Frozen ally will heal 30% of their max HP.

HealFullWhenHoldGroundTrigger.name: Mikaela's Rescue
HealFullWhenHoldGroundTrigger.description:
The first time this unit would be defeated by an attack while on the battlefield, it will instead survive the turn on 1HP.

Then since this unit has used Survivor's Rush while on the battlefield, it will heal to full HP, gain the Stealth status effect (this will overwrite other status effects on this unit), and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, Endure effects cannot stack.

This passive skill will be disabled if there is another ally "Dark Jeanne, Summertime Fallen Angel" on the battlefield or in ally reinforcements.

HealingAilmentsACleopatraDark.name: Plague Queen
HealingAilmentsACleopatraDark.description:
This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, Stealth, and Stealth Shield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

This unit will have their TU costs reduced by 40% while there is a poisoned or sleeping enemy. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

Each time an enemy with Cursed Sleep, Mega Poison or Lethal Poison gets the turn:

- this unit heals for 30% of its max HP.
- this unit steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team at the end of the turn.

HealLowestHPRevengeA.name: Heal Revenge
HealLowestHPRevengeA.description: When this unit defeated by an enemy, the ally with the lowest HP recovers medium HP.

HealPurifyAllRevengeA.name: Elixir Revenge
HealPurifyAllRevengeA.description: Whenever this unit is defeated by an enemy, all allies on the battlefield are healed for 30% of their own max HP and any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed from them once TU next advances. The timing of these effects in relation to any other effects or skills triggering or expiring at any time between turns is not guaranteed, and they will only apply to units that have been on the battlefield since this unit was defeated.

HealPurifyAllRevengeB.name: Mega Elixir Revenge
HealPurifyAllRevengeB.description: Whenever this unit is defeated by an enemy, all allies on the battlefield are granted the Armor status effect, are Quickened (TU costs for all of their skills are reduced by 20%), and are Enraged (their Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn). This will overwrite other status effects, and the effects of any previous Quicken and Enrage skills on those units. Then, once TU next advances, those allies are healed for 30% of their own max HP (the timing of this heal in relation to any other effects or skills triggering or expiring at any time between turns is not guaranteed, and it will only apply to units that have been on the battlefield since this unit was defeated).

HealSelf10PercentEntranceBoss.name: Healing Entry
HealSelf10PercentEntranceBoss.description: Whenever this unit enters the battlefield it heals for 10% of max HP.

HealSingleA.name: Heal
HealSingleA.description: Heals 1 ally for HP equal to 350% of the user's Attack.

HealSingleB2.name: Heal
HealSingleB2.description: Heals 1 ally for HP equal to 250% of the user's Attack.

HealSingleB.name: Heal
HealSingleB.description: Heals 1 ally for HP equal to 250% of the user's Attack.

HealSingleBoss1.name: Heal
HealSingleBoss1.description: Heals 1 ally for HP equal to 250% of the user's Attack.

HealSingleBoss2.name: Heal
HealSingleBoss2.description: Heals 1 ally for HP equal to 400% of the user's Attack.

HealSingleSacA.name: Last Heal
HealSingleSacA.description: Sacrifices the user to heal 1 ally for HP equal to 250% of the user's Attack.

HealSingleSuperA.name: Super Heal
HealSingleSuperA.description: Heals 1 ally for HP equal to 600% of the user's Attack.

HealStealthTurnRepriseAHijikataRegular.name: Demonic Resolve
HealStealthTurnRepriseAHijikataRegular.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while its TU is 100 or less and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Then this unit will heal for 30% of max HP, and gain Stealth, even if it survived with 1HP. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

This unit enters battle with 3 Charges. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Whenever a Stealthed ally gets the turn, this unit gains 1 charge at the end of the turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

HealWhenHurtCinderellaSwimsuit.name: Cinderella's Resolve
HealWhenHurtCinderellaSwimsuit.description: If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP.

HealWhenHurtCSKDark.name: Killer Thorns
HealWhenHurtCSKDark.description: Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while it has Sleep Thorns and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

HealWhenHurt.name: Divine Healing
HealWhenHurt.description: If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP.

HealWhenHurtForEnterLimit.name: Divine Healing
HealWhenHurtForEnterLimit.description: If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP.

HealWhenHurtGainStealth.name: Shroud of Artemis
HealWhenHurtGainStealth.description: If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 20% of max HP and then gain the Stealth status effect if it is not Poisoned or Sleeping. This will overwrite any other status effect on this unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth, but it may be regained by this unit if this skill is triggered by attack damage.

HealWhenHurtKnockbackImmunityBlockDeathO.name: Divine Immovability
HealWhenHurtKnockbackImmunityBlockDeathO.description: When this unit enters battle, it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, Endure effects cannot stack. If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 20% of max HP. This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

HealWhenHurtNapoleonRegularBoss.name: War Games
HealWhenHurtNapoleonRegularBoss.description: Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 1% of its max HP.

HealWhenHurtNapoleonRegular.name: Flanking Maneuver
HealWhenHurtNapoleonRegular.description: Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP.

HeartyProtectionATristanRegularBoss.name: Symphony of Strength
HeartyProtectionATristanRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. While this unit has 50% or more of max HP, it has 65% damage reduction from attacks.

Each time a sleeping enemy gets the turn, all allies become Enraged.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit becomes Enraged, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, Endure effects cannot stack. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

HeartyProtectionATristanRegular.name: Symphony of Vigor
HeartyProtectionATristanRegular.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. While this unit has 50% or more of max HP, it has 65% damage reduction from attacks.

Each time a sleeping enemy gets the turn, all allies heal for 30% of max HP.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit becomes Enraged, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP, Endure effects cannot stack. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

HeatingUpARizKouhaiBoss.name: Heating Up
HeatingUpARizKouhaiBoss.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user has survived for 150TU on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the user has survived for 300TU on the battlefield. 800% damage instead if the user has survived for 450TU on the battlefield. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

HeatingUpARizKouhai.name: Heating Up
HeatingUpARizKouhai.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the user has survived for 150TU on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the user has survived for 300TU on the battlefield. 800% damage instead if the user has survived for 450TU on the battlefield. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

HiddenDrainA.name: Assassin's Drain
HiddenDrainA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Unlocked each time this unit gains the Stealth status effect. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

HigherSpiritGroundPlus.name: Oppressive Ground
HigherSpiritGroundPlus.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can be triggered once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever this unit uses Spirit Crash, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Steals 1 Spirit from the enemy team whenever this unit deals damage with an attack. Attacks that target multiple enemies will trigger this once for each enemy they damage.

This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks unless this unit has defeated an enemy while on the battlefield.

HighSpiritBusterADoubleMyshaIdolGirlBoss.name: Over Drive Raid
HighSpiritBusterADoubleMyshaIdolGirlBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies. Usable only if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

HighSpiritBusterAllSAliceMagicGirl.name: Magical Starshower
HighSpiritBusterAllSAliceMagicGirl.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance and Stealth status effects, revenge passive skills, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable only if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

HighSpiritDrainA.name: Over Drain
HighSpiritDrainA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user's party has 7 or more Spirit.

HighSpiritDrainAllA.name: Over Drain
HighSpiritDrainAllA.description: 150% damage to all enemies and heals the user for 25% of its own max HP for each enemy damaged. Usable only if the user's party has 7 or more Spirit.

HighSpiritFrenzyDoubleACrossSwordKnight.name: Royal Helioslash
HighSpiritFrenzyDoubleACrossSwordKnight.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. 500% damage if the user has defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefield, 600% if the user has defeated 2+ units. Usable if the user has not defeated any units while on the battlefield, or if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

HighSpiritHealDoubleA.name: Over Heal
HighSpiritHealDoubleA.description: Heal 2 allies for HP equal to 400% of the user's Attack. Usable only if the user's party has 7 or more Spirit.

HighSpiritHealDoubleAMoonGoddess.name: Over Heal
HighSpiritHealDoubleAMoonGoddess.description: Heal 2 allies for HP equal to 400% of the user's Attack. Usable only if the user's party has 7 or more Spirit.

HighSpiritHealthyBlastASnowWhiteBride.name: Little Bright Garden
HighSpiritHealthyBlastASnowWhiteBride.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit or if all allies on the battlefield are at max HP.

HighSpiritIgnitionStrikeANobunagaBoss.name: Demon Hellfire
HighSpiritIgnitionStrikeANobunagaBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, this attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of skin passive skills. The user and the target are immediately granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on both units. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

HighSpiritIgnitionStrikeANobunaga.name: Demon Hellfire
HighSpiritIgnitionStrikeANobunaga.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, this attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of skin passive skills. The user and the target are immediately granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on both units. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit.

HighSpiritOnslaughtAOtohimeBoss.name: Rapid Blossom
HighSpiritOnslaughtAOtohimeBoss.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, this damage will not wake up the enemy. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit or if 2 or more enemies are sleeping. This attack ignores skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect. This skill activates 3 times in succession before its TU cost is applied. User gains a power charge every third time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

HighSpiritOnslaughtAOtohime.name: Drowning Blossom
HighSpiritOnslaughtAOtohime.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy, this damage will not wake up the enemy. Usable if the user's party has 6 or more Spirit or if 2 or more enemies are sleeping. This attack ignores skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect. Usable 3 times per battle.

HighToleranceAKojiroRegularBoss.name: Great Resolve
HighToleranceAKojiroRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Endure, and Counter Stance for 150TU. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction is lowered by 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with attacks while on the battlefield (to a minimum of 50% after defeating 3+ enemies).

When this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack while on the battlefield:

- this unit gains a Charge. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.
- all allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

HighToleranceAKojiroRegular.name: Legendary Resolve
HighToleranceAKojiroRegular.description:
This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Endure and Counter Stance for 300TU. Counter Stance will overwrite status effects on this unit. The next time the unit with counter stance takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction is lowered by 10% for each enemy this unit has defeated with an attack while on the battlefield (to a minimum of 50% after defeating 3+ enemies).

When this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack while on the battlefield:

- this unit gains a Charge. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.
- this unit gains Recovery Mist for 100TU. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.
- all allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

HimikoRegularPassive.name: The Power of Rice!
HimikoRegularPassive.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit deals damage to an enemy with an attack, this unit is healed for 100% of total damage dealt.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit has a 60% chance to heal for 30% of max HP.

HoldGoundPlusPassiveASatanRegularBoss.name: Demon Charges
HoldGoundPlusPassiveASatanRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with 2 Charges. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever this unit defeats any number of units with an attack, this unit gains a Charge and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

When this unit has:
- 2+ Charges stored, this unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- 3 Charges stored, this unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.

Whenever a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit loses 1 Charge.

HoldGoundPlusPassiveASatanRegular.name: Infernal Charges
HoldGoundPlusPassiveASatanRegular.description:
This unit enters battle with 2 Charges. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever this unit defeats any number of units with an attack, this unit is healed for 100% of its max HP, gains a Charge and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

When this unit has:
- 1+ Charges stored at the start of this unit's turn, it will quicken all burning allies by 30% at the end of its turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills.
- 2+ Charges stored, this unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- 3 Charges stored, this unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.

Whenever a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit loses 1 Charge.

HoldGroundAElizabethRegularBoss.name: The Queen
HoldGroundAElizabethRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if allies have 6 or more Spirit.

Whenever this unit damages any number of units with an attack, ally Spirit is doubled at the end of the turn, if ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.
