Then if allies have 10 Spirit, remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from 1 random non-poisoned enemy and grant them Mega Poison for 200TU.

Whenever ally Spirit is at 10 at the end of any turn, all allies will be healed for 1% of max HP and be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed). This effect cannot trigger again until 100TU advances.

HoldGroundAElizabethRegular.name: Long Live The Queen
HoldGroundAElizabethRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has 75% damage reduction from attacks if allies have 6 or more Spirit.

Whenever this unit damages any number of units with an attack, ally Spirit is doubled at the end of the turn, if ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead. Then if allies have 10 Spirit, remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from 1 random non-sleeping enemy and grant them Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.

Whenever ally Spirit is at 10 at the end of any turn, all allies will be healed for 1000% of this unit's attack and be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed). This effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

HoldGroundBurnAKaguyahimeSwimsuit.name: Lunar Focus
HoldGroundBurnAKaguyahimeSwimsuit.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit is not burning or sleeping.

If this unit is burning, this unit has:
- Hold Ground (if this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP)
- 100% chance to ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.
- TU costs for all active skills reduced by 40%. This effect does not stack with Quicken skills.

HoldGroundFullHeal100TUALock.name: Shield of Aldyne
HoldGroundFullHeal100TUALock.description: The user cannot be defeated for 100TU. Heals all allies on the battlefield for HP equal to 600% of the user's Attack. All allies are granted the Armor status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Usable once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

HoldGroundGetTurn.name: Final Spite
HoldGroundGetTurn.description: The first time this unit would be defeated by an attack while on the battlefield, it will instead survive with 1HP and become Enraged, then get a turn immediately by having its TU reduced to 0. This unit will be sacrificed at the end of that turn, and cannot be defeated by damage until that turn is taken. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effect of other Enrage skills.

HoldGroundGoodBurnCerberusRegularBoss.name: Heavy Defense
HoldGroundGoodBurnCerberusRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will:
- Gain Healing Burn if it does not have Healing Burn, or a Sleep status effect (excluding Cursed or Noxious).
- Heal for 5% of max HP.
If this unit isn't a Guardian, its Attack is increased to 1.25x and this unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.

HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.name: Ultimate Defiance
HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack, it has a 100% chance to instead enter Battle Trance for 150TU. While in Battle Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by attacks. If this unit defeats an enemy with an attack while in Battle Trance, it will lose Battle Trance and recover full HP. Otherwise, once Battle Trance ends, this unit will be defeated.

This unit cannot enter Battle Trance while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type skills on the battlefield.

HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.name: Ultimate Defiance
HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack, it has a 20% chance to instead enter Battle Trance for 150TU. While in Battle Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by attacks. If this unit defeats an enemy with an attack while in Battle Trance, it will lose Battle Trance and recover full HP. Otherwise, once Battle Trance ends, this unit will be defeated.

This unit cannot enter Battle Trance while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type skills on the battlefield.

HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.name: Ultimate Defiance
HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack, it has a 40% chance to instead enter Battle Trance for 150TU. While in Battle Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by attacks. If this unit defeats an enemy with an attack while in Battle Trance, it will lose Battle Trance and recover full HP. Otherwise, once Battle Trance ends, this unit will be defeated.

This unit cannot enter Battle Trance while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type skills on the battlefield.

HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.name: Ultimate Defiance
HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack, it has a 60% chance to instead enter Battle Trance for 150TU. While in Battle Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by attacks. If this unit defeats an enemy with an attack while in Battle Trance, it will lose Battle Trance and recover full HP. Otherwise, once Battle Trance ends, this unit will be defeated.

This unit cannot enter Battle Trance while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type skills on the battlefield.

HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.name: Ultimate Defiance
HoldGroundOnceForCriticalChanceKillReset.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack, it has a 80% chance to instead enter Battle Trance for 150TU. While in Battle Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by attacks. If this unit defeats an enemy with an attack while in Battle Trance, it will lose Battle Trance and recover full HP. Otherwise, once Battle Trance ends, this unit will be defeated.

This unit cannot enter Battle Trance while there are any allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type skills on the battlefield.

HoldGroundPassiveADaVinciRegularBoss.name: Genius Inventor
HoldGroundPassiveADaVinciRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP, then until its next turn:
- this unit cannot be defeated
- this unit heals for 1% of max HP at the end of every turn.
This is a Hold Ground+ effect, and ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, all allies gain the Armor status effect, and become Enraged. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed.

HoldGroundPassiveADaVinciRegular.name: Master Inventor
HoldGroundPassiveADaVinciRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP, then until its next turn:
- this unit cannot be defeated or Stunned
- this unit heals for 10% of max HP at the end of every turn.
This is a Hold Ground+ effect, and ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this unit is healed for 100% of its max HP and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, all allies gain the Armor status effect, heal for 30% of max HP and become Enraged. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed.

HoldGroundPassiveAKenshinRegularBoss.name: Keeper Of The Gate
HoldGroundPassiveAKenshinRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison status effects.

While there is a poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit has Stun Immunity.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP, then until its next turn:
- this unit cannot be defeated.
- this unit heals for 1% of max HP at the end of every turn.
This is a Hold Ground+ effect, and ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

HoldGroundPassiveAKenshinRegular.name: Gatekeeper
HoldGroundPassiveAKenshinRegular.description:
This unit enters battle with Super Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison status effects.

While there is a poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit has Stun Immunity and Burn Immunity.

Whenever a unit (ally or enemy) enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit will be healed for 100% of max HP and Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP, then until its next turn:
- this unit cannot be defeated.
- this unit heals for 10% of max HP at the end of every turn.
This is a Hold Ground+ effect, and ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.
Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack or Rashomon, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

HoldGroundPlusKillResetKingArthur.name: Cursed Hold Ground+
HoldGroundPlusKillResetKingArthur.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack or Regal Eclipse, this unit is healed for 100% of its max HP and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Whenever a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains 1 Charge. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

HoldGroundPlusPassiveAThorRegularBoss.name: Reckless Power
HoldGroundPlusPassiveAThorRegularBoss.description:
The first time this unit is damaged by an enemy attack, that enemy's Active Skills are disabled for 100TU, and this unit has its current TU reduced by 50TU. Whenever this unit uses Thundering Wrath, this effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, 2 random enemies are Weakened and granted Rage Wards. Then all non-burning allies are Purified. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This effect will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

HoldGroundPlusPassiveAThorRegular.name: Unshackled Power
HoldGroundPlusPassiveAThorRegular.description:
The first time this unit is damaged by an enemy attack, that enemy's Active Skills are disabled for 20TU, plus 20TU per Awakening (up to 100TU if this unit has 4 Awakenings), and this unit has its current TU reduced by 50TU. Whenever this unit uses Thundering Wrath, this effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, 2 random enemies are Weakened and granted Rage Wards. Then all non-burning allies are Purified. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This effect will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again, then all allies become Purified and gain the Armor status effect. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. Armor will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed.

HoldGroundPoisonKillSleepHeal.name: Plague Annihilator
HoldGroundPoisonKillSleepHeal.description:
50% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned.

This unit heals 30% of its max HP whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

HoldGroundPullBackKaguyahimeBoss.name: Bounce Back
HoldGroundPullBackKaguyahimeBoss.description: If this unit would be defeated by an attack while there are any allies on the battlefield, it instead survives the turn on 1HP and all allies are purified. Then this unit will be sent away from the battlefield to be next in line of allied reinforcements.

HoldGroundPullBackOrHealFull.name: Mikaela's Rescue
HoldGroundPullBackOrHealFull.description:
The first time this unit would be defeated by an attack while on the battlefield, it will instead survive the turn on 1HP. Then if this unit has not used Survivor's Rush while on the battlefield and there are any other non-conjured allies on the battlefield, this unit will be sent away from the battlefield to be next in line of allied reinforcements. If there are no allied reinforcements to replace this unit, enough Kuromoris (up to 3) will be added to the ally team so that it can still return to reinforcements.

If this unit survives on 1HP in this way and has used Survivor's Rush while on the battlefield, it will instead heal to full HP, gain the Stealth status effect (this will overwrite other status effects on this unit), and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, Endure effects cannot stack.

This passive skill will be disabled if there is another ally "Dark Jeanne, Summertime Fallen Angel" on the battlefield or in ally reinforcements.

HoldGroundRegenerationOnMyTurn.name: Regeneration Heart
HoldGroundRegenerationOnMyTurn.description: When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

HoldGroundSacHeal.name: Auto Blood Heal
HoldGroundSacHeal.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements to prevent this unit from being defeated, instead healing 30% of max HP. Triggered when this unit would be defeated while it has any reinforcements remaining.

HoldGroundSacHealForMultiple.name: Blood Barrier
HoldGroundSacHealForMultiple.description: This unit cannot be defeated if there are any ally reinforcements. If this unit has 1HP after any turn, the last unit in allied reinforcements will be sacrificed to heal this unit for 30% of max HP.

HolyExtraTurnALudmillaNew.name: Light's Embrace
HolyExtraTurnALudmillaNew.description: Immediately give all other allies that are below 50% of max HP the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Then heals those allies for 100% of their max HP, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison). The user is granted 1 charge for each affected ally. Usable if at least 1 other ally on the battlefield has less than 50% of max HP and if the user has no ally Guardian on the battlefield.

HPRegen10PercentMaxHPEndEveryTurnFor200T.name: 10% HP Regen
HPRegen10PercentMaxHPEndEveryTurnFor200T.description: For another {0}TU, this unit will heal for 10% of their max HP after every turn.

HPRegen1PercentMaxHPEndEveryTurnFor100TU.name: 1% HP Regen
HPRegen1PercentMaxHPEndEveryTurnFor100TU.description: For another {0}TU, this unit will heal for 1% of their max HP after every turn.

HPUpAirA.name: Storm HP Up
HPUpAirA.description: Allied Storm element units have their max HP increased by 2%.

HPUpAirB.name: Storm HP Up
HPUpAirB.description: Allied Storm element units have their max HP increased by 4%.

HPUpAirC.name: Storm HP Up
HPUpAirC.description: Allied Storm element units have their max HP increased by 7%.

HPUpAirD.name: Storm HP Up
HPUpAirD.description: Allied Storm element units have their max HP increased by 10%.

HPUpDeathA.name: Dark HP Up
HPUpDeathA.description: Allied Dark element units have their max HP increased by 2%.

HPUpDeathB.name: Dark HP Up
HPUpDeathB.description: Allied Dark element units have their max HP increased by 4%.

HPUpDeathBDojo.name: HP Up
HPUpDeathBDojo.description: Allied Dark element units have their max HP increased by 4%.

HPUpDeathC.name: Dark HP Up
HPUpDeathC.description: Allied Dark element units have their max HP increased by 7%.

HPUpDeathD.name: Dark HP Up
HPUpDeathD.description: Allied Dark element units have their max HP increased by 10%.

HPUpEarthA.name: Earth HP Up
HPUpEarthA.description: Allied Earth element units have their max HP increased by 2%.

HPUpEarthB.name: Earth HP Up
HPUpEarthB.description: Allied Earth element units have their max HP increased by 4%.

HPUpEarthC.name: Earth HP Up
HPUpEarthC.description: Allied Earth element units have their max HP increased by 7%.

HPUpEarthD.name: Earth HP Up
HPUpEarthD.description: Allied Earth element units have their max HP increased by 10%.

HPUpFireA.name: Fire HP Up
HPUpFireA.description: Allied Fire element units have their max HP increased by 2%.

HPUpFireB.name: Fire HP Up
HPUpFireB.description: Allied Fire element units have their max HP increased by 4%.

HPUpFireC.name: Fire HP Up
HPUpFireC.description: Allied Fire element units have their max HP increased by 7%.

HPUpFireD.name: Fire HP Up
HPUpFireD.description: Allied Fire element units have their max HP increased by 10%.

HPUpLifeA.name: Light HP Up
HPUpLifeA.description: Allied Light element units have their max HP increased by 2%.

HPUpLifeB.name: Light HP Up
HPUpLifeB.description: Allied Light element units have their max HP increased by 4%.

HPUpLifeC.name: Light HP Up
HPUpLifeC.description: Allied Light element units have their max HP increased by 7%.

HPUpLifeD.name: Light HP Up
HPUpLifeD.description: Allied Light element units have their max HP increased by 10%.

HPUpWaterA.name: Water HP Up
HPUpWaterA.description: Allied Water element units have their max HP increased by 2%.

HPUpWaterB.name: Water HP Up
HPUpWaterB.description: Allied Water element units have their max HP increased by 4%.

HPUpWaterC.name: Water HP Up
HPUpWaterC.description: Allied Water element units have their max HP increased by 7%.

HPUpWaterCDojo.name: HP Up
HPUpWaterCDojo.description: Allied Water element units have their max HP increased by 7%.

HPUpWaterD.name: Water HP Up
HPUpWaterD.description: Allied Water element units have their max HP increased by 10%.

HugeBuffARizetteBraveBoss.name: Elemental Refresh
HugeBuffARizetteBraveBoss.description:
If at least 1 enemy on the battlefield is:
- Water, remove sleep (including Deep Sleep) from all allies on the battlefield and grant them Sleep Wards.
- Fire, remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from all units on the battlefield and grant them Burn Wards.
- Earth, remove poison (including Lethal Poison) from all allies on the battlefield and grant them Poison Wards.
- Storm, all allies who have a current TU of 100 or more have their current TU reduced by 50TU. This effect repeats once for each additional Storm enemy on the battlefield. Then grant all allies Stun Wards.
- Dark, grant all allies Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies.
- Light, all allies will be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed). Then if there is no Purify Chain among allies a random ally is granted a Purify Chain.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. A unit with a Purify Chain will Purify another random ally after their turn, then they will pass the Purify Chain to that ally. Purify Chains will end only if the unit with the Purify Chain is defeated, leaves the battlefield, or falls asleep.

HugeBuffARizetteBrave.name: Elemental Cure
HugeBuffARizetteBrave.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 800% of the user's attack. Allies gain 2 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield with Rizette's Link.

Then if at least 1 enemy on the battlefield is:
- Water, remove sleep (including Deep Sleep) from all allies on the battlefield and grant them Sleep Wards.
- Fire, remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from all units on the battlefield and grant them Burn Wards.
- Earth, remove poison (including Lethal Poison) from all allies on the battlefield and grant them Poison Wards.
- Storm, all allies who have a current TU of 100 or more have their current TU reduced by 50TU. This effect repeats once for each additional Storm enemy on the battlefield. Then grant all allies Stun Wards.
- Dark, grant all allies Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.
- Light, all allies will be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed). Then if there is no Purify Chain among allies a random ally is granted a Purify Chain.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on affected units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. A unit with a Purify Chain will Purify another random ally after their turn, then they will pass the Purify Chain to that ally. Purify Chains will end only if the unit with the Purify Chain is defeated, leaves the battlefield, or falls asleep.

HurtByAir.name: Damaged by Storm
HurtByAir.description: This unit has taken attack damage from a Storm unit.

HurtByEarth.name: Damaged by Earth
HurtByEarth.description: This unit has taken attack damage from an Earth unit.

HurtByFire.name: Damaged by Fire
HurtByFire.description: This unit has taken attack damage from a Fire unit.

HurtByWater.name: Damaged by Water
HurtByWater.description: This unit has taken attack damage from a Water unit.

IamtheBEASTPassiveABeastRegularBoss.name: Belle's Companion
IamtheBEASTPassiveABeastRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

This unit becomes a Guardian and cannot be defeated. These effects begin when this unit enters the battlefield, and end after this unit's third turn on the battlefield. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

IamtheBEASTPassiveABeastRegular.name: Belle's Protector
IamtheBEASTPassiveABeastRegular.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, or be immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy.

This unit becomes a Guardian and cannot be defeated. These effects begin when this unit enters the battlefield, and end after this unit's third turn on the battlefield. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP and be granted Super Stealth. This healing is increased to 100% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers after entering the battlefield.

Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth.

IamtheQueenPassiveAVictoriaRegularBoss.name: Étoile Queen
IamtheQueenPassiveAVictoriaRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies, and heal this unit for 1% of total damage dealt.

Whenever another ally takes damage from an attack, this unit will have its TU reduced to 0. Then this effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

If this unit has another ally on the battlefield, whenever this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit grants a random enemy the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This is not a Skin passive skill.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified.

IamtheQueenPassiveAVictoriaRegular.name: Crowned Étoile
IamtheQueenPassiveAVictoriaRegular.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

This unit cannot fall asleep or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies, and heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Whenever another ally takes damage from an attack, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Then this effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

If this unit has another ally on the battlefield, whenever this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit grants a random enemy the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This is not a Skin passive skill.

Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified.

ICanDoStuffAlonePassiveABeautyRegular.name: Unshackled Strength
ICanDoStuffAlonePassiveABeautyRegular.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit cannot be poisoned, or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

Each time this unit damages a poisoned enemy with an attack, this unit will get another turn. This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

When this unit enters battle, this unit is granted an Instant Death Ward, Sleep Ward, and Stun Ward. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored. Identical Wards cannot stack.

IceBreakerAWater.name: Ice Breaker
IceBreakerAWater.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are Frozen, otherwise 150% damage instead. This attack ignores damage reduction from frozen, and removes frozen from the target.

IcyBladePassiveAAnastasiaRegularBoss.name: Frozen Gaze
IcyBladePassiveAAnastasiaRegularBoss.description:
Whenever this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack, a random non-frozen enemy on the battlefield is granted the Frozen status effect for 120TU.

Each time this unit damages a frozen or burning enemy with an attack, a random ally has their current TU reduced by 10TU.

IcyBladePassiveAAnastasiaRegular.name: Icy Princess
IcyBladePassiveAAnastasiaRegular.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack, an Imposter is added to the next in line of enemy reinforcements.

Each time an ally with a Monarch token is damaged by an enemy attack (even if defeated), this unit will immediately have its TU reduced to 0.

Each time this unit damages:
- a non-sleeping enemy with an attack, a random ally has their current TU reduced by 10TU.
- a sleeping, burning or frostburned enemy with an attack, this unit heals for 100% of max HP, and it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

IfThornedHealWhenHurt100PercentMaxHP.name: Pacifying Blade
IfThornedHealWhenHurt100PercentMaxHP.description: Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while it has Sleep Thorns and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 100% of its max HP, and will have its TU reduced to 0.

IgnitionAttackFastANobunagaBoss.name: Spark Blast
IgnitionAttackFastANobunagaBoss.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. 

25% chance of reducing the user's active skill TU costs by 50% on its next turn. Effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU cost reduction is in effect.

Also grants the user the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user.

IgnitionAttackFastANobunaga.name: Spark Blast
IgnitionAttackFastANobunaga.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. 

25% chance of reducing the user's active skill TU costs by 50% on its next turn. Effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU cost reduction is in effect.

Also grants the user the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user.

IgnitionAttackSpiritAAstridNewBoss.name: Burning Spirit
IgnitionAttackSpiritAAstridNewBoss.description: Damage to 1 Enemy. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

IgnitionAttackSpiritAAstridNew.name: Burning Spirit
IgnitionAttackSpiritAAstridNew.description: Damage to 1 Enemy. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

IgnitionAttackSpiritACerberusRegularBoss.name: Scorching Spirit
IgnitionAttackSpiritACerberusRegularBoss.description:
Damage to 1 Enemy. The user is then granted the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

IgnitionAttackSpiritACerberusRegular.name: Scorching Spirit
IgnitionAttackSpiritACerberusRegular.description:
Damage to 1 Enemy. The user is then granted the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

IgnoreDeathAGoemonRegularBoss01.name: Assassin Strike
IgnoreDeathAGoemonRegularBoss01.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable once per battle.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

IgnoreDeathAGoemonRegularBoss.name: Assassinate
IgnoreDeathAGoemonRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user enters the battle from reinforcements. This skill is locked again after each use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

IgnoreDeathAGoemonRegular.name: Assassinate
IgnoreDeathAGoemonRegular.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time the user enters the battle from reinforcements. This skill is locked again after each use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

IgnoreDefeatBurnForceADragonGirlRegularB.name: Incinerate
IgnoreDefeatBurnForceADragonGirlRegularB.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 800% damage instead if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

IgnoreDefeatBurnForceADragonGirlRegular.name: Incinerate
IgnoreDefeatBurnForceADragonGirlRegular.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 800% damage instead if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

IgnoreSkinSweepPercivalRegularBoss.name: Blastwave
IgnoreSkinSweepPercivalRegularBoss.description: 100% damage to all enemies. 250% damage instead and stuns each enemy for 100TU if they are dealt damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

IgnoreSkinSweepPercivalRegular.name: Blastwave
IgnoreSkinSweepPercivalRegular.description: 100% damage to all enemies. 250% damage instead and stuns each enemy for 100TU if they are dealt damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

IgnoreStealthBurnBlastAllMordredRegular.name: Royal Crimsonsting
IgnoreStealthBurnBlastAllMordredRegular.description: 300% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each each charge stored by the user (600% max). This attack does not consume charges and ignores the Stealth status effect. The user is granted 1 Charge after damage is dealt. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect or if the user is alone on the battlefield.

IgnoreStealthPoisonEaterAllMordredRegula.name: Royal Sting
IgnoreStealthPoisonEaterAllMordredRegula.description: 300% damage to all enemies if they are poisoned, 600% damage if this unit is alone on the battlefield. This attack ignores the Stealth status effect.

ImpendingDoomPassiveALuciferRegularBoss.name: Hellish Purification
ImpendingDoomPassiveALuciferRegularBoss.description:
At the end of each turn, this unit Purifies a random sleeping or poisoned, ally on the battlefield. Then a random non-poisoned ally will be Enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

At the end of each other ally turn, if no allies are poisoned, this unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this effect cannot trigger again until 20TU advances.

ImpendingDoomPassiveALuciferRegular.name: Hellish Wildfire
ImpendingDoomPassiveALuciferRegular.description:
At the end of each turn, this unit grants a random non-burning, non-water ally on the battlefield the burn status effect. Then a random burning ally will heal for 30% of their max HP.

At the end of each other ally turn, if all ally units are burning, this unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this effect cannot trigger again until 20TU advances.

All Fire Allies and Allies with Burn Blast and Burn Drive type active skills are Quickened by 30% when this unit enters the battlefield, or when those allies enter from reinforcements while this unit is on the battlefield. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills on affected units.

ImposterPassiveAMusashiDarkBoss.name: Shadow Oni
ImposterPassiveAMusashiDarkBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, an Imposter is added to the next in line of enemy reinforcements.

At the start of each turn, if there are any Imposters (ally or enemy) on the battlefield, this unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage until the end of that turn.

Whenever an imposter on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit will be healed for 5% max HP and Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

ImposterPassiveAMusashiDark.name: Blood of the Oni
ImposterPassiveAMusashiDark.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, an Imposter is added to the next in line of enemy reinforcements.

At the start of each turn, if there are any Imposters (ally or enemy) on the battlefield, this unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage until the end of that turn.

Whenever an imposter on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit will be healed for 100% max HP and Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

InfernoAttackALuciferRegularBoss.name: Hell's Punishment
InfernoAttackALuciferRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies, and the user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

At the end of the turn, purifies all allies, and grants all enemies Mega Poison for 200TU.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

InfernoAttackALuciferRegular.name: Hell's Judgement
InfernoAttackALuciferRegular.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies, and the user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

At the end of the turn, allies that are either Fire element or have Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will gain the Burn status effect, and all other allies will have Burn removed. Unlocked each time a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

InstantBattlecryACrossSwordKnightDarkBos.name: Cursed Battlecry
InstantBattlecryACrossSwordKnightDarkBos.description:
All non-burning allies are granted the Armor status effect, Sleep Thorns and become Enraged. Each non-burning, non-sleeping enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU. At the end of the turn, allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy with Mega Poison or Cursed Sleep on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite other status effects and previous Enrage skills on affected units.

InstantBattlecryACrossSwordKnightDark.name: Cursed Battlecry
InstantBattlecryACrossSwordKnightDark.description:
All non-burning allies are granted the Armor status effect, Sleep Thorns and become Enraged. Each non-burning, non-sleeping enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU. At the end of the turn, allies gain 1 Spirit for each enemy with Mega Poison or Cursed Sleep on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then Armor is removed. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite other status effects and previous Enrage skills on affected units.

InstantDesperateBiteBusterSingleAAliceMa.name: Magical Drain
InstantDesperateBiteBusterSingleAAliceMa.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 100% of its own max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

InstantDoubleAttackAOniSchoolDarkBoss.name: Oni Blast
InstantDoubleAttackAOniSchoolDarkBoss.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Demonic Dissent, and unlocks Toxic Finish upon use. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

InstantDoubleAttackAOniSchoolDark.name: Demon Blast
InstantDoubleAttackAOniSchoolDark.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Demonic Defiance, and unlocks Toxic Finale upon use. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

InstantDrainBurningSingleAJeanneDarkBoss.name: Burn Devour
InstantDrainBurningSingleAJeanneDarkBoss.description: 750% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 10% of max HP if the target is burning. Mega Poisons the target for 200TU. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

InstantFuryAOkitaRegularBoss.name: Stealth Landslide
InstantFuryAOkitaRegularBoss.description: Targets 2 enemies. 500% damage to targets that are not burning. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

InstantFuryAOkitaRegular.name: Stealth Landslide
InstantFuryAOkitaRegular.description: Targets 2 enemies. 500% damage to targets that are not burning. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

InstantHealAllyASnowWhiteBride.name: Instant Restoration
InstantHealAllyASnowWhiteBride.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 1 ally, and heals them for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

InstantLastDrainAJeanneDarkSwimBoss.name: Final Rush
InstantLastDrainAJeanneDarkSwimBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. The user is healed for 10% of max HP, and is granted the Stealth status effect with a Stealth Shield. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Usable only if the user has no allies on the battlefield.

InstantMegaPoisonSurvivorALokiRegularBos.name: Instant Edict
InstantMegaPoisonSurvivorALokiRegularBos.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy then Mega Poisons them for 200TU, this will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and passive skill effects that would prevent units from being defeated. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

InstantMegaThrowAKingArthurBoss.name: Cometflare
InstantMegaThrowAKingArthurBoss.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements for 500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Usable only if there are 1 or more allied reinforcements left.

InstantSlayerbaneMegaThrowAKingArthur.name: Regal Cometflare
InstantSlayerbaneMegaThrowAKingArthur.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. If the target has not defeated any units and there are any allied reinforcements, instead the last unit in the allied reinforcements is sacrificed to still deal 500% damage. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

InstantSurvivorDrainAJeanneDarkSwim.name: Survivor's Rush
InstantSurvivorDrainAJeanneDarkSwim.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, is healed fully, and is granted the Stealth status effect with a Stealth Shield. Endure effects cannot stack. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 50TU after each use.

InstantSurvivorSingleACinderellaBoss.name: Survivor's Raid
InstantSurvivorSingleACinderellaBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again after use until the user activates another active skill.

InstantSurvivorSingleA.name: Survivor's Storm
InstantSurvivorSingleA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 50TU after each use.

IntimidateBuffAKintaroRegularBoss.name: Intimidate
IntimidateBuffAKintaroRegularBoss.description:
Enrages the user. Weakens, and removes Stealth from all enemies on the battlefield.

If Ally Spirit is less than Enemy Spirit, raises Ally Spirit to 10. If Ally Spirit is higher than Enemy Spirit, lowers Enemy Spirit to 0 instead.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

IntimidateBuffAKintaroRegular.name: Intimidate
IntimidateBuffAKintaroRegular.description:
Enrages the user. Weakens, and removes Stealth from all enemies on the battlefield.

If Ally Spirit is less than Enemy Spirit, raises Ally Spirit to 10. If Ally Spirit is higher than Enemy Spirit, lowers Enemy Spirit to 0 instead.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

IntimidationALudmillaDarkNewBoss.name: Degrading Slice
IntimidationALudmillaDarkNewBoss.description:
Damage to 2 enemies depending on the enemy team's Spirit:
- 6+ Enemy Spirit: 250%
- 4-5 Enemy Spirit: 400%
- 1-3 Enemy Spirit: 550%
- 0 Enemy Spirit: 700%
This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

IntimidationALudmillaDarkNew.name: Degrading Slice
IntimidationALudmillaDarkNew.description:
Damage to 2 enemies depending on the enemy team's Spirit:
- 6+ Enemy Spirit: 250%
- 4-5 Enemy Spirit: 400%
- 1-3 Enemy Spirit: 550%
- 0 Enemy Spirit: 700%
This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

JDSwimBalanceChangeNews.description:
Thank you for playing Evertale.

We would like to announce the following game balance adjustment:
- [Dark Jeanne, Summertime Fallen Angel] has had the [Shadow Dash] Passive Skill's healing amount adjusted from 100% of Max HP to 99.9% of Max HP.

This adjustment is intended to improve game stability and is not expected to affect Dark Jeanne's viability in battle.

JealousSpiritSiphonACinderellaDark.name: Spirit Crash
JealousSpiritSiphonACinderellaDark.description: The Enemy team loses all Spirit. If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

JointGainAttackSingleALife.name: Sparring Attack
JointGainAttackSingleALife.description: Damage to 1 enemy and allies gain 2 Spirit. The ally team and enemy team gain an additional 1 spirit each if there is at least 1 other Light ally.

JointRegenerationOnMyTurnJeanne.name: Twin Regeneration
JointRegenerationOnMyTurnJeanne.description: When this unit gets the turn, this unit and Light allies named Jeanne d'Arc are healed for 30% of their max HP.

KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv1.name: Lunar Curse
KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv1.description:
Grants a random enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. 20% chance to trigger after each enemy turn if no enemy is sleeping already.

Whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn, this unit heals 50% of its max HP and will again Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU.

KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv2.name: Lunar Curse
KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv2.description:
Grants a random enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. 40% chance to trigger after each enemy turn if no enemy is sleeping already.

Whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn, this unit heals 50% of its max HP and will again Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU.

KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv3.name: Lunar Curse
KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv3.description:
Grants a random enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. 60% chance to trigger after each enemy turn if no enemy is sleeping already.

Whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn, this unit heals 50% of its max HP and will again Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU.

KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv4.name: Lunar Curse
KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv4.description:
Grants a random enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. 80% chance to trigger after each enemy turn if no enemy is sleeping already.

Whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn, this unit heals 50% of its max HP and will again Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU.

KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv5.name: Lunar Curse
KaguyahimeEnchantmentLv5.description:
Grants a random enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. 100% chance to trigger after each enemy turn if no enemy is sleeping already.

Whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn, this unit heals 50% of its max HP and will again Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU.

KillBadFriendMegaPoisonOthersBoss.name: Queen's Domain
KillBadFriendMegaPoisonOthersBoss.description:
The first damage this unit deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, an Imposter is added to the next in line of enemy reinforcements.

Whenever an enemy Imposter on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source (including Dark Substitute), all non-Imposter enemies on the battlefield that are not sleeping will become Mega Poisoned for 200TU and will be stunned for 50TU.

KillBusterDoubleAGilgameshRegularBoss.name: Deadly Blast
KillBusterDoubleAGilgameshRegularBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This attack ignores any damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, Counter Stance status effects, skin passive skills and ignores passives skill effects that would prevent units from being defeated.

KillCloneSelfADeadlyVampire.name: Deadly Doppelganger
KillCloneSelfADeadlyVampire.description: Adds another Reina to the next in line of allied reinforcements. This Reina's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and will fail if there are 3 or more conjured copies of Reina among allies on the battlefield and allied reinforcements.

KillDamagePlusAMusashiRegularBoss.name: Lone Wolf
KillDamagePlusAMusashiRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

KillDamagePlusAMusashiRegular.name: Lone Wolf
KillDamagePlusAMusashiRegular.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

KillerRevengeAOkitaRegularBoss.name: Stealthy Vengeance+
KillerRevengeAOkitaRegularBoss.description: Allies gain the Stealth status effect, a Stealth Shield, 2 Spirit and will become Enraged. All of these effects are triggered whenever another non-conjured Ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

KillerRevengeAOkitaRegular.name: Vengeance Rampage
KillerRevengeAOkitaRegular.description:
Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured unit on the battlefield with an attack, the next damage this unit deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Allies gain the Stealth status effect, a Stealth Shield, 2 Spirit and will become Enraged. All of these effects are triggered whenever another non-conjured Ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

KillGiveTurnA.name: Avalon's Fruit
KillGiveTurnA.description: Immediately give 1 ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0, and give them the Poison status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

KillGuardModeBoss.name: Triumph Guard
KillGuardModeBoss.description:
When this unit defeats an enemy unit with an attack while it is not a Guardian, it will become a Guardian for 100TU.

For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot become a Guardian from other skills.

KillGuardMode.name: Deadly Guard
KillGuardMode.description:
When this unit defeats an enemy unit with an attack while it is not a Guardian, it will become a Guardian. While this unit is a Guardian, it cannot be defeated by non-attack damage. If this unit would be defeated by an attack while it is a Guardian, this unit will stop being a Guardian and be healed for 100% of max HP.

For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot become a Guardian from other skills.

KillInstantPurifyHealAllyAGilgameshRegul.name: Deadly Restoration
KillInstantPurifyHealAllyAGilgameshRegul.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from all allies, and heals them each for HP equal to 300% of the user's Attack. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

KillMegaHealBurnCerberusRegular.name: Underworld Burn
KillMegaHealBurnCerberusRegular.description:
The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. Also heals each other ally that is either Fire element or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill for 50% of their max HP. 

This skill is unlocked either:
- Each time the user defeats another unit with an attack.
- When this unit enters battle, if 2 other allies are either Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill. 

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

KillRageArmorAllHealAllACrossSwordKnight.name: Triumph Boost
KillRageArmorAllHealAllACrossSwordKnight.description: All allies are healed for 25% of their max HP, granted the Armor status effect and become Enraged. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on allies. This skill is unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

KillRageArmorAllHealSelfA.name: Triumph Battlecry
KillRageArmorAllHealSelfA.description: Heals the user fully. The Hold Ground+ passive skill is reset for the user and can be triggered again. All allies are granted the Armor status effect (50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed) and become Enraged (Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn). This skill is unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on allies.

KillSendAllyBackBoss.name: Deadly Reset
KillSendAllyBackBoss.description: Each time this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this unit sends an ally Cleopatra away from the battlefield to the very end of allied reinforcements and adds 1 Kuromori to the very front of allied reinforcements.

KillStrikeAExcaliburRegularBoss.name: Sword Storm
KillStrikeAExcaliburRegularBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, and adds 1 Super Kuromori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use unless it defeats an enemy. This skill is also locked again if the user leaves the battlefield.

KillStrikeAExcaliburRegular.name: Sword Storm
KillStrikeAExcaliburRegular.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy, and adds 1 Super Kuromori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use unless it defeats an enemy. This skill is also locked again if the user leaves the battlefield.

KillSummonTokenx2ADeath.name: Triumph Call
KillSummonTokenx2ADeath.description: Adds 2 Kuromoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

KillSummonx2AAir.name: Triumph Call
KillSummonx2AAir.description: Adds 2 Denmoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements. Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

KingStrikeAKingArthurSwimsuit.name: Regal Cornobble
KingStrikeAKingArthurSwimsuit.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy and Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn). Heals the user fully. The user is granted Stealth. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge. This does not consume the Power Charge.

Weak will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

KirinEnlightenmentAKirinGirlRegularBoss.name: Kirin's Strength
KirinEnlightenmentAKirinGirlRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit will be healed for 1% of its max HP each time an ally gets the turn.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has 50%+ of max HP, or if any enemy unit has 100TU or more.

KirinEnlightenmentAKirinGirlRegular.name: Kirin's Vigor
KirinEnlightenmentAKirinGirlRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit cannot fall asleep if there are any Water enemies on the battlefield. This unit cannot be Stunned if there are any other Storm allies on the battlefield.

This unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP each time an ally gets the turn.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has 50%+ of max HP, or if any enemy unit has 100TU or more.

KnockbackProtectorCyrusBoss.name: Guard Repulse
KnockbackProtectorCyrusBoss.description: 800% damage to 1 enemy if they are a Guardian, then exchanges that Guardian with an Imposter if they survive the attack and are not alone in the enemy team. The exchanged enemy will be sent to the very back of enemy reinforcements.

LargeBuffAChopinRegularBoss.name: Inspiring Ballad
LargeBuffAChopinRegularBoss.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1% of max HP, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison).

The user randomly gains either the Water, Storm, Earth or Fire Melody.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Locked for 50TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 50TU after each use.

LargeBuffAChopinRegular.name: Inspiring Song
LargeBuffAChopinRegular.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants each of  them a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, Burn Ward, and Intense Rage.

The user gains the Recovery Melody. If the user already has Recovery Melody active, the user randomly gains either the Water, Storm, Earth or Fire Melody instead. While active, Recovery Melody will heal Chopin for 25% of max HP each time an ally gets the turn.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Locked for 50TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 50TU after each use.

Intense Rage increases a unit's Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be overwritten by Weak effects. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

LargeBuffAWashingtonRegularBoss.name: Stars of Freedom
LargeBuffAWashingtonRegularBoss.description:
Weakens all enemies. Enrages and heals all allies on the battlefield for 1% of max HP.

Then immediately give all other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

LargeBuffAWashingtonRegular.name: Stars of Victory
LargeBuffAWashingtonRegular.description:
Weakens all enemies. Enrages and heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack.

Then immediately give all other allies that are burning or the Water element the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

LargeHeal1Icon.name: Auto Healing
LargeHeal1Icon.description:
75% Healing triggers left: 1

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

LargeHeal2Icon.name: Auto Healing
LargeHeal2Icon.description:
75% Healing triggers left: 2

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

LargeHeal3Icon.name: Auto Healing
LargeHeal3Icon.description:
75% Healing triggers left: 3

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 75% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

LastDrainA.name: Final Drain
LastDrainA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user has no allies on the battlefield.

LastDrainDoubleAGyurelleBoss.name: Final Drain
LastDrainDoubleAGyurelleBoss.description: 250% damage to 2 enemies and heals the user for 10% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. Usable if there is no Earth ally Mega Gyurelle on the battlefield. 500% damage if the user is alone on the battlefield.

LastShieldMaxHPUp50PercentBoss.name: Final Effort
LastShieldMaxHPUp50PercentBoss.description:
This unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x.
This unit's max HP is increased to 5 times its normal amount.
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

All of these effects are active only while this unit has no other allies on the battlefield.

LastStanceBoss.name: Final Counter
LastStanceBoss.description: This unit gains the Counter Stance status effect whenever its last ally on the battlefield is defeated. This will overwrite other status effects on this unit. For 150TU, the next time this unit takes damage from an enemy attack, it will become their turn.

LastStandAllADarkFinn.name: Final Annihilator
LastStandAllADarkFinn.description: 1000% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth status effect, enemy damage reduction effects and passive skill effects that would prevent units from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no allies on the battlefield.

LastStandBurnBlastAllHurtCerberusRegular.name: Hell Claw
LastStandBurnBlastAllHurtCerberusRegular.description:
300% damage to all enemies, 500% if the user has no allies on the battlefield.

Each unit on the battlefield has a 50% chance of being stunned for 100TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

LastTwoStandAAstridBrideBoss.name: Sisters Stand
LastTwoStandAAstridBrideBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user has only one other ally on the battlefield. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and passive skill effects that would prevent units from being defeated.

LethalAllBuffAPinocchioRegular.name: Poison Memories
LethalAllBuffAPinocchioRegular.description:
Removes all Poison wards and Stealth Shields from enemy units on the battlefield. Then all non-sleeping enemies have a 50% chance each to be granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. Then all non-sleeping enemies are granted Mega Poison for 200TU. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

LethalPoisonACleopatraDark.name: Creeping Death
LethalPoisonACleopatraDark.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. Then, if that target is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. Usable only if the user has Stealth. This skill is locked for 150TU after use.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

LethalSurvivorASnowWhiteMaid01.name: Survivor's Crash
LethalSurvivorASnowWhiteMaid01.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

LethalSurvivorASnowWhiteMaidBoss01.name: Survivor's Crash
LethalSurvivorASnowWhiteMaidBoss01.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

LethalSurvivorASnowWhiteMaidBoss.name: Survivor's Crash
LethalSurvivorASnowWhiteMaidBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

LethalSurvivorASnowWhiteMaid.name: Survivor's Crash
LethalSurvivorASnowWhiteMaid.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

lifeAtkLimit.description: <color=#00edf6>Light Bane:</color> {0}% Attack increase against Light units

LifeFlipAllyA.name: Life Flip Ally
LifeFlipAllyA.description: Exchanges 1 ally's current HP with the amount of HP they have currently lost. Usable once per battle.

LifeFlipAttackA.name: Life Flip Attack
LifeFlipAttackA.description: Damage to 1 enemy. If the user's current HP is below 50%, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost.

LifeFlipAttackAIbarahimeSwimsuit.name: Hat Trick
LifeFlipAttackAIbarahimeSwimsuit.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield after this attack.

LifeFlipAttackAJeanneDarkSwim.name: Dark Spirit
LifeFlipAttackAJeanneDarkSwim.description: Damage to 1 enemy. If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. Otherwise, allies gain 2 additional Spirit.

LifeFlipBurnAttackAGilgamesh.name: Royal Flame
LifeFlipBurnAttackAGilgamesh.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy if the user is burning. Otherwise, damage to 1 enemy and the user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost.

LifeFlipOrSummonAttackADeathSnowBlackBri.name: Dark Summons
