LifeFlipOrSummonAttackADeathSnowBlackBri.description: 75% damage to 1 enemy. If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. Otherwise, adds 2 Kuromoris to the very end of allied reinforcements.

LifeFlipSuperBlastA.name: Flip Inferno
LifeFlipSuperBlastA.description: 750% damage to 1 enemy, and exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Usable if the user is not at max HP.

LightningBladesAKirinGirlRegularBoss.name: Lightning Blades
LightningBladesAKirinGirlRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and a random enemy is Stunned for 50TU. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Then the user becomes Enraged. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used any other active skill since this skill was last used.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

LightningBladesAKirinGirlRegular.name: Lightning Bolts
LightningBladesAKirinGirlRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and a random enemy is Stunned for 100TU. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Then the user becomes Enraged. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used any other active skill since this skill was last used.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

LightningPassiveAZeusRegular.name: Godly Lightning
LightningPassiveAZeusRegular.description:
This unit's attacks ignore Guardians and heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit has Sleep immunity and Stun immunity. These immunity effects are removed from this unit when this unit activates Zeus's Blessing.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, they will immediately get the next turn, this cannot trigger again until TU advances. This is a skin effect. This unit cannot become a Guardian or Stun Absorber.

This unit enters battle with 3 Charges. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

At the end of this unit's turn, if this unit has exactly:
- 3 Charges, all enemies on the battlefield that have a current TU of 50 or less are stunned for 100TU.
- 2 Charges, all enemies on the battlefield that have a current TU of 100 or less are stunned for 200TU.
- 1 Charge, all enemies on the battlefield that have a current TU of 200 or less are stunned for 300TU.
Then a Charge is consumed by this unit.

LimitBreakAccelerateSelfStackableArga.name: Crisis Speed
LimitBreakAccelerateSelfStackableArga.description: The user is healed for 30% of max HP, and has the TU costs of all skills reduced by 15%. This TU reduction effect stacks up to 3 times to a max of 45%. Usable only if the user's party has exactly 0 Spirit, and the user has not already used this skill 3 times since entering the battlefield. This effect overwrites and blocks other Quicken effects.

LimitBreakDrainAllAOniSGBoss.name: Crisis Drain
LimitBreakDrainAllAOniSGBoss.description: 300% damage to all enemies, and the user recovers their HP by 100% of its own max if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user's party has 1 or less Spirit.

LimitBreakDrainDoubleA.name: Crisis Drain
LimitBreakDrainDoubleA.description: 250% damage to 2 enemies, and the user recovers their HP by 50% of its own max if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user's party has 1 or less Spirit.

LoneKnightPassiveADonQuixoteRegularBoss.name: Great Strength
LoneKnightPassiveADonQuixoteRegularBoss.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

At the end of each ally unit's turn while this unit is on the battlefield, if there are 4 or more burning units on the battlefield, a random burning non-water enemy will be stunned for 25TU. This may trigger before or after other effects.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, a random burning ally has their current TU reduced by 25TU.

LoneKnightPassiveADonQuixoteRegular.name: Unwavering Strength
LoneKnightPassiveADonQuixoteRegular.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

At the end of each ally unit's turn while this unit is on the battlefield, if there are 4 or more burning units on the battlefield, a random burning non-water enemy will be stunned for 25TU. This may trigger before or after other effects.

Until this unit has survived for 150TU on the battlefield, this unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks. Afterwards, this unit has 40% damage reduction from attacks.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn:
- this unit will heal for 10% of max HP for each burning ally on the battlefield (max 40%).
- a random burning non-guardian ally will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

LongFightANapoleonRegularBoss.name: Naval Mastermind
LongFightANapoleonRegularBoss.description: Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, all allies are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

LongFightANapoleonRegular.name: Naval Tactician
LongFightANapoleonRegular.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit cannot fall asleep if there are any Water enemies on the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, all allies are Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

This unit will have their TU costs reduced by 40% while this unit has 3 Charges. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

LowHPBurnBlastAllHurtCerberusRegular.name: Hellhound
LowHPBurnBlastAllHurtCerberusRegular.description:
300% damage to all enemies, 500% if the user is below 50% of max HP.

Each unit on the battlefield has a 50% chance of being stunned for 100TU. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

LowHpEnemyExtraTurnAMusashiRegularBoss.name: Zero Mercy
LowHpEnemyExtraTurnAMusashiRegularBoss.description:
Heals the user for 20% of total damage dealt.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack and leaves them on or below 25% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack), this unit will get another turn. The extra turn is granted after Counter Skin type effects triggered by this unit's attacks, and so this unit will act before a countering enemy.
 -This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.
 -Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

LowHpEnemyExtraTurnAMusashiRegular.name: No Mercy
LowHpEnemyExtraTurnAMusashiRegular.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack and leaves them on or below 25% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack), this unit will get another turn. The extra turn is granted after Counter Skin type effects triggered by this unit's attacks, and so this unit will act before a countering enemy.
 -This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.
 -Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

LowHPKnockoutACinderellaSwimsuitBoss.name: Knockout Storm
LowHPKnockoutACinderellaSwimsuitBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield if they are left with below 50% of max HP. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect or at the cost of consuming 1 charge if the user has no stealth. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

LowHPKnockoutACinderellaSwimsuit.name: Knockout Storm
LowHPKnockoutACinderellaSwimsuit.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield if they are left with below 50% of max HP. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect or at the cost of consuming 1 charge if the user has no stealth. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

MagicalGirlSacA.name: Starlight Sacrifice
MagicalGirlSacA.description: The user is sacrificed to grant "Alice, Dreamy Magical Girl" her Starlight Champion form. When Alice enters Starlight Champion form her Hold Ground+ is reset so it can trigger again, she will be purified, healed for 100% of her max HP, Quickened by 20% (this will overwrite the effects of other quicken skills), and will immediately get the next turn by having her TU reduced to 0. While in Starlight Champion form, Alice will heal 15% of max HP on every ally and enemy turn, has a 50% chance to gain 1 Spirit after every ally and enemy turn, has her Attack increased to 1.5x (this will not stack with Enrage effects), and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. Only usable when an ally "Alice, Dreamy Magical Girl" unit on the battlefield no longer has Hold Ground+ active.

MagicWoodPassiveAPinocchioRegularBoss.name: Burning Ego
MagicWoodPassiveAPinocchioRegularBoss.description:
Each time this unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 1% of its max HP.

While a unit on the battlefield is Burning, this unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

MagicWoodPassiveAPinocchioRegular.name: Imprinted Ego
MagicWoodPassiveAPinocchioRegular.description:
Each time a Poisoned or Sleeping unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP.

While a unit on the battlefield is Poisoned, this unit has:
- A 100% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.
- 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 40%. Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

MassacreAYandereMaidDarkBoss.name: Massacre
MassacreAYandereMaidDarkBoss.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 400% total damage). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

MassacreAYandereMaidDark.name: Massacre
MassacreAYandereMaidDark.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 400% total damage). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

MasterThiefPassiveALupinRegularBoss.name: Moonlight Thief
MasterThiefPassiveALupinRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be poisoned or burned.

Whenever an enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit will immediately have its TU reduced to 0. Then this effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will be Purified. This unit has 35% damage reduction from attacks. This unit has 70% damage reduction from attacks instead if this unit has any Ward (e.g. a Sleep Ward)

MaxHPTargetMomentumBoss.name: Wall Buster
MaxHPTargetMomentumBoss.description:
Each time this unit damages an enemy that has 100% of their max HP with an attack, this unit will immediately get the next turn, then this cannot trigger again until TU advances.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, all allies are purified.

- The extra turn is granted after Counter Skin type effects triggered by this unit's attacks, and so this unit will act before a countering enemy.
- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

MaxHPTargetMomentum.name: Wall Breaker
MaxHPTargetMomentum.description:
Each time this unit damages an enemy that has 100% of their max HP with an attack, this unit will immediately get the next turn.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, all allies are purified.

- The extra turn is granted after Counter Skin type effects triggered by this unit's attacks, and so this unit will act before a countering enemy.
- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).
- The extra turn cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.

MaximumStealthAGoemonRegularBoss.name: Great Thief
MaximumStealthAGoemonRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. When this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, it grants all non-sleeping enemies the Super Poison status effect.

At the end of each of this unit's turns, if this unit is not-sleeping, it will be granted Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on this unit. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

MaximumStealthAGoemonRegular.name: Master Thief
MaximumStealthAGoemonRegular.description:
When this unit enters battle whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements:
- This unit gains Stealth, a Stealth Shield and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.
- Other allies on the battlefield with Stealth Strike type active skills are Quickened by 30%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken effects on those allies. Other effects that further reduce TU will have diminishing returns while this TU Cost reduction is in effect.

When this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, it grants all non-sleeping enemies the Super Poison status effect.

At the end of each of this unit's turns, if this unit is not-sleeping, it will be granted Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on this unit. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

MegaBirdBombAOdinRegularBoss.name: Unleash Power
MegaBirdBombAOdinRegularBoss.description: Sacrifices the user to deal 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and the Stealth status effect. Adds 1 Mega Winged Shade to a random place in ally reinforcements. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

MegaBirdBombAOdinRegular.name: Ragnarok
MegaBirdBombAOdinRegular.description: Sacrifices the user to deal 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and the Stealth status effect. Adds 1 Winged Shade to a random place in ally reinforcements for each Awakening the user has, up to 4 max when fully awakened. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

MegaBurnForceSingleAGilgamesh.name: Royal Judgment
MegaBurnForceSingleAGilgamesh.description: 750% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if all units on the battlefield are burning. This is considered a Burn Drive type active skill.

MegaGetTurnPassiveARoundTableKnightDark.name: Unholy Counter
MegaGetTurnPassiveARoundTableKnightDark.description:
When this unit gets a turn, it heals 50% of its max HP.

The first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn while on the battlefield, this unit will enter Unholy Trance for 30TU plus 30TU per Awakening (up to 150TU if this unit has 4 Awakenings). While in Unholy Trance, this unit cannot be defeated by damage, and cannot be Stunned.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, they will immediately get the next turn, this cannot trigger again until TU advances. Enemy units that deal damage to this unit get stunned for 100TU and Super Poisoned. These are Skin effects. This unit cannot become a Guardian or Stun Absorber.

MegaHealArmorLudmillaYukata.name: Unrelenting Defense
MegaHealArmorLudmillaYukata.description:
The first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will enter Enduring Stance for 150TU. While in Enduring Stance, this unit cannot be defeated by damage unless it is burning, and cannot be granted Poison, Sleep, or Stuns.
Once Enduring Stance ends, this unit will enter Recovery Stance for 150TU. While in Recovery Stance, this unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks, and heals for 40% of max HP at the end of each turn. Whenever this unit is at max HP after this healing triggers, it will be Purified and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. These stances can trigger once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

When this unit enters battle all enemies will be granted Rage Wards. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

MegaHealPurifyContinuousALudmillaYukata.name: Dawn of Spring
MegaHealPurifyContinuousALudmillaYukata.description:
Immediately give all other allies that are at max HP the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Then heals all allies other than the user for 100% of their max HP, Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison), and grants them Recovery Mist for 200TU. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. Usable once per battle.

MegaPoisonAllHealSelfMordredRegularBoss.name: Poison Blood
MegaPoisonAllHealSelfMordredRegularBoss.description: Grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU, and the user is healed for 20% of max HP. This will overwrite other status effects on those units.

MegaPoisonChanceAttackACleopatra.name: Snake Bite
MegaPoisonChanceAttackACleopatra.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The damaged enemy also becomes Poisoned, with a 25% chance of becoming Mega Poisoned for 200TU instead. Poisons will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

MegaPoisonChanceAttackACleopatraRegularB.name: Snake Bite
MegaPoisonChanceAttackACleopatraRegularB.description: 50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The damaged enemy also becomes Poisoned, with a 25% chance of becoming Mega Poisoned for 200TU instead. Poisons will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

MegaPoisonCounterAttackAGokuDarkBoss.name: Thunder Kick
MegaPoisonCounterAttackAGokuDarkBoss.description:
800% damage to 1 enemy and then Mega Poisons them for 200TU. Heals the user for 20% of max HP. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 100TU after each use.

Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

MegaPoisonJoltAKaguyahimeDarkBoss.name: Mega Poison Jolt
MegaPoisonJoltAKaguyahimeDarkBoss.description:
250% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has stealth. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. All enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU and are Stunned for 30TU. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

MegaPoisonJoltAKaguyahimeDark.name: Mega Poison Jolt
MegaPoisonJoltAKaguyahimeDark.description:
250% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead if the user has stealth. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. All enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU and are Stunned for 30TU. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

MegaPoisonKillerEnemiesA.name: Mega Vengeance
MegaPoisonKillerEnemiesA.description: Grants the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU to any enemy that defeats a non-conjured ally (including this unit) with an attack. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This skill will not trigger if Survivor's Fury is unlocked by this unit. This is not a Revenge passive skill.

MegaPoisonKillerOnAllyDeaths.name: Mega Vengeance
MegaPoisonKillerOnAllyDeaths.description: Grants the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU to any enemy that defeats a non-conjured ally (including this unit) with an attack. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This skill will not trigger if Survivor's Fury is unlocked by this unit. This is not a Revenge passive skill.

MegaPoisonSleepStrikeARizBride.name: Final Vows
MegaPoisonSleepStrikeARizBride.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy, 400% if there is any poisoned or sleeping enemy on the battlefield, or 600% damage if there are both (even if the target is not poisoned or sleeping). If the targeted enemy is not burning, poisoned, or sleeping, they are randomly granted either Noxious Sleep for 100TU or Mega Poison for 200TU.

These status effects will overwrite other status effects if applied. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, Skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. This is considered a Dream Hunter type Active Skill. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

MegaPoisonSurvivorALokiRegular.name: Survivor's Edict
MegaPoisonSurvivorALokiRegular.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy then Mega Poisons them for 200TU, this will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1 HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

MegaResetStrikeSingleACinderella.name: Calamity Phoenix
MegaResetStrikeSingleACinderella.description: 1000% damage to 1 enemy. The Hold Ground+ passive skill is reset for the user and can be triggered again. The user is healed for 100% of max HP. Usable if the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill has been triggered while on the battlefield and only once per battle.

MegaSoloBuffAKingArthurEvilBoss.name: Fiery Heal
MegaSoloBuffAKingArthurEvilBoss.description: Burns all allies on the battlefield, and heals them for 10% of max HP. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. Usable once per battle.

MegaSoloBuffAKingArthurEvil.name: Dark Rebirth
MegaSoloBuffAKingArthurEvil.description:
Heals all Dark allies for 100% of max HP. The user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward. The user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is reset for the user and can be triggered again.

When the user activates this skill a third time, a random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on or below 25% of max HP and on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

This skill is locked until the user's Hold Ground+ passive skill effect is triggered while on the battlefield and is locked again after each use. This skill can be used only three times per battle.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

MegaThrowA.name: Blood Assassin
MegaThrowA.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements for 500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there are 1 or more allied reinforcements left.

MegaThrowDoubleADeathMinionSac.name: Blood Assassin+
MegaThrowDoubleADeathMinionSac.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements for 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. If there are no allied reinforcements left, sacrifices all ally Kuromoris on the battlefield instead. Cannot be used if there are no allied reinforcements left unless there is an ally Kuromori on the battlefield.

MegaThrowDrainSingleADeathMinionSacSnowB.name: Blood Revelry
MegaThrowDrainSingleADeathMinionSacSnowB.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements for 600% damage to 1 enemy. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. If there are no allied reinforcements left, sacrifices all ally Kuromoris on the battlefield instead. Cannot be used if there are no allied reinforcements left unless there is an ally Kuromori on the battlefield.

MegaThrowSingleASnowBlackBrideBoss.name: Blood Raid
MegaThrowSingleASnowBlackBrideBoss.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements for 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there are 1 or more allied reinforcements left.

MiddleHeal1Icon.name: 3 Headed Defense
MiddleHeal1Icon.description:
50% Healing triggers left: 1

This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU and will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will:
- Gain Endure if it didn't have Endure when it was attacked.
- Gain Healing Burn if it does not have Healing Burn, or a Sleep status effect (excluding Cursed or Noxious).
- Heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 50% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

MiddleHeal2Icon.name: 3 Headed Defense
MiddleHeal2Icon.description:
50% Healing triggers left: 2

This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU and will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will:
- Gain Endure if it didn't have Endure when it was attacked.
- Gain Healing Burn if it does not have Healing Burn, or a Sleep status effect (excluding Cursed or Noxious).
- Heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 50% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

MiddleHeal3Icon.name: 3 Headed Defense
MiddleHeal3Icon.description:
50% Healing triggers left: 3

This unit enters battle with the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU and will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will:
- Gain Endure if it didn't have Endure when it was attacked.
- Gain Healing Burn if it does not have Healing Burn, or a Sleep status effect (excluding Cursed or Noxious).
- Heal for 10% of max HP. This healing is increased to 50% of max HP for the first 3 times it triggers while this unit is on the battlefield.

MightyStrikeAMusashiRegularBoss.name: Glacial Slash
MightyStrikeAMusashiRegularBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable 10 times per battle.

MightyStrikeAMusashiRegular.name: Glacial Slash
MightyStrikeAMusashiRegular.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable 10 times per battle.

MiniPoisonEatALokiRegularBoss.name: Reaping Scythe
MiniPoisonEatALokiRegularBoss.description: Targets 2 enemies and deals 100% damage. 400% damage instead against poisoned targets and steals 1 Spirit from enemies for each poisoned enemy hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

MiniPoisonEatALokiRegular.name: Reaping Scythe
MiniPoisonEatALokiRegular.description: Targets 2 enemies and deals 100% damage. 400% damage instead against poisoned targets and steals 1 Spirit from enemies for each poisoned enemy hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

MistShieldACinderellaSwimsuit.name: Cinderella's Resolve
MistShieldACinderellaSwimsuit.description:
This unit cannot be burned.

This unit enters battle with Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and 3 Charges. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of its max HP. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Whenever a sleeping enemy gets the turn or this unit damages a sleeping enemy with an attack, this unit gains 1 charge.

ModernRoyaltyPassiveAWashingtonRegularBo.name: Spirited Genius
ModernRoyaltyPassiveAWashingtonRegularBo.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

At the end of each enemy turn, if Ally Spirit is less than 8, Allies gain 1 Spirit.

Whenever this unit damages any number of units with an attack, ally Spirit is doubled at the end of the turn, if ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.

Whenever ally Spirit is at 8 at the end of any turn, this unit will be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and have its TU reduced to 0. This effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

ModernRoyaltyPassiveAWashingtonRegular.name: Spirited Genius
ModernRoyaltyPassiveAWashingtonRegular.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

At the end of each enemy turn, if Ally Spirit is less than 8, Allies gain 1 Spirit.

Whenever this unit damages any number of units with an attack, ally Spirit is doubled at the end of the turn, if ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.

Whenever ally Spirit is at 8 or more at the end of any turn, this unit will be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and have its TU reduced to 0. This effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

MomentumBusterDoubleAOssiaDarkBoss.name: Combo Raid
MomentumBusterDoubleAOssiaDarkBoss.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MomentumBusterLowHPDrainDoubleAOssiaDark.name: Combo Reaper
MomentumBusterLowHPDrainDoubleAOssiaDark.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Heals the user for 50% of max HP if the user is below 50% of max HP and damage is dealt. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MomentumBusterSingleAOssiaDarkBoss.name: Team Combo Raid
MomentumBusterSingleAOssiaDarkBoss.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Unlocked for all ally Mega Ossias each time an ally Mega Ossia damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again for all ally Mega Ossias after use.

MomentumBusterSingleBOssiaDarkBoss.name: Combo Raid
MomentumBusterSingleBOssiaDarkBoss.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MomentumDrainDoubleA.name: Combo Drain
MomentumDrainDoubleA.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. Heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MomentumDrainSingleYandereMaidRQ.name: Combo Drain+
MomentumDrainSingleYandereMaidRQ.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MomentumStarterAttackSingleYandereMaidRQ.name: Rallying Queen
MomentumStarterAttackSingleYandereMaidRQ.description:
Damage to 1 enemy. Allies on the battlefield with active skills that can Stun or Combo Burst type active skills are granted Sleep Wards and become Enraged (this will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those allies). Combo Burst type active skills also become unlocked for allies on the battlefield.

-Active Attack skills that unlock for one use when their user deals damage with an attack are considered Combo Burst type skills. They will still lock again after use or if their user leaves the battlefield.
-Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

MomentumStrikeDoubleA.name: Combo Burst
MomentumStrikeDoubleA.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MomentumStrikeSingleAPoison.name: Poison Burst
MomentumStrikeSingleAPoison.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy and then poisons them. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MomentumStrikeSingleGiveTurnALudmillaRac.name: Command & Combo
MomentumStrikeSingleGiveTurnALudmillaRac.description:
Targets 1 enemy, and another ally with the highest current TU. 500% damage to the targeted enemy, then gives that ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

- The given turn is granted after Counter Stance or Counter Skin type effects triggered by this attack, and so the affected ally will act before a countering enemy.
- Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.
- Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

MomentumStrikeSingleYandereMaidRQBoss.name: Combo Burst+
MomentumStrikeSingleYandereMaidRQBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MonarchsWillAElizabethRegularBoss.name: Queen's Will
MonarchsWillAElizabethRegularBoss.description:
When an ally, including this unit enters the battlefield, all allies other than this unit receive a Monarch Token. Monarch Tokens cannot stack. Any attack damage will remove Monarch Tokens.

Each time an ally with a Monarch token is damaged by an attack (even if defeated), this unit will immediately have its TU reduced to 0.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Ally Spirit is doubled. If Ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.
- Then remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from 1 random non-poisoned enemy and grant them Mega Poison for 200TU. This triggers an additional time for each 2 Spirit allies have (up to 5 additional times with 10 Spirit).
- Then if all enemies are poisoned, all allies have their current TU reduced by 100TU.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

MonarchsWillAElizabethRegular.name: Monarch's Will
MonarchsWillAElizabethRegular.description:
When an ally, including this unit enters the battlefield at the very start of battle or from reinforcements, all allies other than this unit receive a Monarch Token. Monarch Tokens cannot stack. Any attack damage will remove Monarch Tokens.

Each time an ally with a Monarch token is damaged by an enemy attack (even if defeated), this unit will immediately have its TU reduced to 0.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Ally Spirit is doubled. If Ally Spirit is at 0, gain 1 Spirit instead.
- Then remove burn (including Mega Healing Burn) from 1 random non-sleeping enemy and grant them Sleep (Forced) for 200TU. This triggers an additional time for each 2 Spirit allies have (up to 5 additional times with 10 Spirit).
- Then if all enemies are sleeping, all allies have their current TU reduced by 100TU.

Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, the ally team gains 2 Spirit, all allies gain Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on those units. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

MoriCompanionPassiveAExcaliburRegularBos.name: Shields and Swords
MoriCompanionPassiveAExcaliburRegularBos.description:
Adds 2 Super Kuromoris to the very front and 2 to the very end of ally reinforcements. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks, and its attack is increased to 1.25x if there is an ally Mori on the battlefield or at the very end of allied reinforcements. If there is an ally Mori on the battlefield and one at the very end of allied reinforcements, this unit has 75% damage reduction from attacks, and its attack is increased to 1.5x instead. These Attack increases do not stack with Enrage effects.

If this unit is below 50% of max HP at the end of a turn, and there is a Mori at the very end of allied reinforcements, that Mori will be sacrificed and all allies will be Purified, and become Enraged. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

MoriCompanionPassiveAExcaliburRegular.name: Sword and Shields
MoriCompanionPassiveAExcaliburRegular.description:
Adds 2 Super Kuromoris to the very front and 2 to the very end of ally reinforcements. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks, and its attack is increased to 1.25x if there is an ally Mori on the battlefield or at the very end of allied reinforcements. If there is an ally Mori on the battlefield and one at the very end of allied reinforcements, this unit has 75% damage reduction from attacks, and its attack is increased to 1.5x instead. These Attack increases do not stack with Enrage effects.

If this unit is below 50% of max HP at the end of a turn, and there is a Mori at the very end of allied reinforcements, that Mori will be sacrificed and all allies will be Purified, healed for 30% of max HP and become Enraged. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

MoriSacrificeAttackAExcaliburRegularBoss.name: Sacred Blade
MoriSacrificeAttackAExcaliburRegularBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies, and adds 1 Super Kuromori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there is an ally Mori on the battlefield or a Mori in the very back of allied reinforcements.

MoriSacrificeAttackAExcaliburRegular.name: Sacred Blade
MoriSacrificeAttackAExcaliburRegular.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies, and adds 1 Super Kuromori to the very front of the allied reinforcements. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if there is an ally Mori on the battlefield or a Mori in the very back of allied reinforcements.

MorningstarALuciferRegularBoss.name: Death Hit
MorningstarALuciferRegularBoss.description: 750% damage to 1 enemy. Purifies user, removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user is not poisoned or if at least 1 enemy is poisoned.

MorningstarALuciferRegular.name: Death Blow
MorningstarALuciferRegular.description:
750% damage to 1 enemy. The user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU if the user is not burning. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if all enemies on the battlefield are burning or if the user is not burning.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

MoveFrontReinforcementToLastWhenHurt.name: Endless Cycle+
MoveFrontReinforcementToLastWhenHurt.description: Whenever this unit uses any active skills or is dealt damage by an attack, it moves the front ally in reinforcements to the back of ally reinforcements.

MultiAttackAKintaroRegularBoss.name: Golden Cleave
MultiAttackAKintaroRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. 700% damage instead to targets that do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user is damaged by an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MultiAttackAKintaroRegular.name: Golden Cleave
MultiAttackAKintaroRegular.description:
700% damage to 2 enemies. 500% damage instead to burning targets. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Unlocked each time the user is damaged by an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

MultiElementAHokusaiMechaSisterAndYamato.name: Great Hero
MultiElementAHokusaiMechaSisterAndYamato.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

Whenever this unit gets the turn, and survives until after the end of the turn, allies gain 1 Spirit.

MultiElementPassiveAHokusaiRegular.name: Legendary Artist
MultiElementPassiveAHokusaiRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks instead if all 6 Element types are on the battlefield.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 25% of its max HP. Then this unit will have Sleep status effects removed at the end of the turn.

Whenever another ally gets the turn, if there is a different ally (including Hokusai) that matches their Element on the battlefield, the acting ally will be healed for 25% of their max HP. Then allies gain 1 Spirit at the end of that turn.

When this unit enters the battlefield all allies are granted Elemental Quicken. Units with Elemental Quicken will have their TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20% while there is a different ally with a matching Element on the battlefield. Whenever another ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, they are also granted Elemental Quicken. Elemental Quicken will overwrite the effect of previous Quicken skills.

MusicalWarfarePassiveAChopinRegularBoss.name: Musical Composition
MusicalWarfarePassiveAChopinRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 1% of its max HP.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each unique Melody this unit has active. (e.g. Grand Finale: 400% => 800% damage with all 4 Melodies active).

At the end of each enemy turn, this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and will have its TU reduced to 0. Then this effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

MusicalWarfarePassiveAChopinRegular.name: Musical Warfare
MusicalWarfarePassiveAChopinRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each unique Melody this unit has active (e.g. Grand Finale: 400% => 900% damage with all 5 Melodies active).

At the end of each enemy turn, this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and will have its TU reduced to 0. Then this effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

NeverKillDoubleDarna.name: Torment Strike
NeverKillDoubleDarna.description: 220% damage to 2 enemies. If this attack would defeat an enemy, that enemy instead survives on 1HP.

NewbieSlashATristanRegularBoss.name: First Hit
NewbieSlashATristanRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has not yet defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield. If an enemy is sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and does not wake up sleeping enemies.

NewbieSlashATristanRegular.name: First Blood
NewbieSlashATristanRegular.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has not yet defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield. Heals the user for 30% of max HP. If an enemy is sleeping, grants the target the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and does not wake up sleeping enemies.

NightmareHuntDoubleAOtohimeBoss.name: Nightmare Dragon
NightmareHuntDoubleAOtohimeBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each sleeping target hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

NightmareHuntDoubleAOtohime.name: Nightmare Dragon
NightmareHuntDoubleAOtohime.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each sleeping target hit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

NightmareTurnDoubleATristanRegularBoss.name: Grand Fortissimo
NightmareTurnDoubleATristanRegularBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. If damage is dealt to 2 sleeping targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and this skill will become locked until the user damages an enemy with another attack.

NightmareTurnDoubleATristanRegular.name: Royal Fortissimo
NightmareTurnDoubleATristanRegular.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping, this damage will not wake up sleeping enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt to a sleeping target. If damage is dealt to 2 sleeping targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and this skill will become locked until the user damages an enemy with another attack.

NoStunToughBurnGuardCerberusRegularBoss.name: Hell's Sentry
NoStunToughBurnGuardCerberusRegularBoss.description:
This unit is a Guardian so long as it has the burn status effect. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit has 40% damage reduction from attacks.
This unit is not affected by stun effects.
Burns all units on the battlefield when this unit is defeated by an enemy, this will overwrite other status effects on those units.

NoStunToughBurnGuardCerberusRegular.name: Hell's Guard Dog
NoStunToughBurnGuardCerberusRegular.description:
This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks.
This unit is not affected by stun effects.
Burns all units on the battlefield when this unit is defeated by an enemy, this will overwrite other status effects on those units.

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

NoWakingNonBurningKnockoutKaguyahimeBoss.name: Lunar Knockout
NoWakingNonBurningKnockoutKaguyahimeBoss.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever an enemy survives an attack from this unit with 25% or less of max HP they will be granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU unless this unit is Burning.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack, 1 random non-sleeping enemy is granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

NoWakingNonBurningKnockoutKaguyahime.name: Lunar Knockout
NoWakingNonBurningKnockoutKaguyahime.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever an enemy survives an attack from this unit with 25% or less of max HP they will be granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU unless this unit is Burning.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack, 1 random non-sleeping enemy is granted the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

NullifyDrainSingleA.name: Status Drain
NullifyDrainSingleA.description: Removes any status effect from 1 enemy. If an effect is removed, heals the user for 10% of max HP and allies are granted 1 Spirit.

NullStrikeDrainA.name: Null Strike Drain
NullStrikeDrainA.description: Removes any status effect from 1 enemy and then deals damage to them. The user is healed for 100% of the total damage dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and skin passive skills.

OmegaBreakerPassiveACrossSwordKnightDark.name: Dual Breaker
OmegaBreakerPassiveACrossSwordKnightDark.description:
This unit has 50% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or sleeping.

If this unit damages at least one enemy that is poisoned or sleeping with an attack, this unit will get another turn. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

OmegaBreakerPassiveACrossSwordKnightDark.name: Omega Breaker
OmegaBreakerPassiveACrossSwordKnightDark.description:
This unit has 10% plus 10% per Awakening (up to 50% max if this unit has 4 Awakenings) bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or sleeping.

If this unit damages at least one enemy that is poisoned or sleeping with an attack, this unit will get another turn and heal for 50% of its max HP. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

OnEnterBarrierWithRecoveryOnEndBoss.name: Turbo Barrier
OnEnterBarrierWithRecoveryOnEndBoss.description: Non-Guardian allies are granted 35% damage reduction from attacks. If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 5% of max HP.

OnEnterBarrierWithRecoveryOnEnd.name: Power Barrier
OnEnterBarrierWithRecoveryOnEnd.description:
This Barrier will be activated whenever this unit enters battle.

While this unit is on the battlefield and this Barrier is activated:
- Allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.
- This unit cannot be defeated by non-attack damage.
- If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP.
-If this unit would be defeated by an attack, this Barrier will be deactivated and this unit will be Purified and healed for 100% of max HP.

If this unit's Barrier is deactivated and it would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

OtherAllyBuffAMasamuneRegularBoss.name: Spreading Storm
OtherAllyBuffAMasamuneRegularBoss.description:
Immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU, heal them for 1% of their max HP and Purify them (remove negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Increase the number of targets by 1 for each enemy with 100+TU (up to 3 targets). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Unlocked each time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield.

OtherAllyBuffAMasamuneRegular.name: Storm Relay
OtherAllyBuffAMasamuneRegular.description:
Immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU, heal them for 50% of their max HP and Purify them (remove negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Increase the number of targets by 1 for each enemy with 100+TU (up to 3 targets). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Unlocked each time an ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield.

OtherAllyRegenerationOnMyTurn.name: Healing Pulse
OtherAllyRegenerationOnMyTurn.description: Other allies on the battlefield will each be healed for 100% of this unit's Attack when this unit gets the turn.

OtherAllyRegenerationOnMyTurnForVicariou.name: Healing Pulse
OtherAllyRegenerationOnMyTurnForVicariou.description: Other allies on the battlefield will each be healed for 100% of this unit's Attack when this unit gets the turn.

OutToSeaPassiveAPerryRegularBoss.name: Out To Sea
OutToSeaPassiveAPerryRegularBoss.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, if there are 2 or more enemies that are sleeping on the battlefield, this unit will immediately be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed, new status effects may still apply following this effect), and get the next turn.

OutToSeaPassiveAPerryRegular.name: Tides of Fortune
OutToSeaPassiveAPerryRegular.description:
This unit cannot be burned. This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit has 40% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% for each burning or sleeping enemy on the battlefield (up to 80% max).

When this unit takes damage from an attack, if there are 2 or more enemies that are burning or sleeping on the battlefield, this unit has a 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to be immediately Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed, new status effects may still apply following this effect), and get the next turn.

When this unit enters the battlefield and at the end of each turn, if there are 2 or more enemies on the battlefield that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill, this unit will become a Stun Absorber (Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead). At the end of each turn, if there are less than 2 enemies on the battlefield that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill, this unit will stop being a Stun Absorber.

PainAttackDoubleABurn.name: Pain Inferno
PainAttackDoubleABurn.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies and reduces the user's current HP by 30% of max. The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

PainfulSleepPassiveAPerryRegularBoss.name: Captain's Demands
PainfulSleepPassiveAPerryRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, they will heal for 1% of their max HP.

When this unit's attacks hit a sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (this unit is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

When this unit enters battle all allies will be granted Sleep Wards. Sleep Ward prevents Sleep from being applied once, then is removed. Sleep Wards cannot stack.

PainfulSleepPassiveAPerryRegular.name: Captain's Orders
PainfulSleepPassiveAPerryRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, they will heal for 20% of their max HP. If that ally is Water and survives until after the end of the turn, Allies gain 1 Spirit.

When this unit's attacks hit a sleeping, non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (this unit is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

When this unit enters battle all allies will be granted Sleep Wards. After the end of this unit's first turn on the battlefield, all allies will have Burn removed and be granted Burn wards. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

PaintSweepAHokusaiRegularBoss.name: Elemental Sweep
PaintSweepAHokusaiRegularBoss.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, the Stealth Status Effect, and the Counter Stance Status Effect.

Then heals all allies for 1% of their max HP. This triggers once for each Element type on the battlefield.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

PaintSweepAHokusaiRegular.name: Paint Fall
PaintSweepAHokusaiRegular.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills, the Stealth Status Effect, and the Counter Stance Status Effect. Randomly grants all allies either Stun Wards, or Sleep Wards. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Then heals all allies for 200% of the user's attack. This triggers once for each Element type that remains on the battlefield.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

PartyModeAttackUP50PercentElmKouhaiRegul.name: Earthen Might
PartyModeAttackUP50PercentElmKouhaiRegul.description: This unit has 0.5x of their original Attack added to their Attack while they are not burning. This does stack on top of Enrage effects, and other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.5x => 2.0x total), but cannot stack with itself. Earthen Might ends for all allies if the unit who granted it leaves the battlefield, and is removed from units that leave the battlefield.

PartyTimeBuffARizKouhaiBoss.name: Blaze Forward
PartyTimeBuffARizKouhaiBoss.description: Heals all allies for 1% of max HP. Then immediately give 2 other random burning allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill locks after use, and unlocks each time a non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

PartyTimeBuffARizKouhai.name: Blaze Onward
PartyTimeBuffARizKouhai.description: Heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. Then immediately give 2 other random burning allies the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill locks after use, and unlocks each time a non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source.

PassiveAllyBuffAExcaliburRegularBoss.name: Awakened Sword
PassiveAllyBuffAExcaliburRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Whenever a non-sleeping ally gets the turn, this unit will gain Stealth and a Stealth Shield at the end of that turn. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

PassiveAllyBuffAExcaliburRegular.name: Awakened Blade
PassiveAllyBuffAExcaliburRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit heals for 10% of max HP, each time an ally hits an enemy with an attack.

Whenever an ally Mori enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit heals 10% of max HP.

Whenever a non-sleeping ally gets the turn, this unit will gain Stealth and a Stealth Shield at the end of that turn. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

PeakPerformancePassiveABalletBoss.name: Charged Dance
PeakPerformancePassiveABalletBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Charge, Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, and a Poison Ward. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit is granted a Charge.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Charge stored on this unit (e.g. Deadly Dance: 700% => 1000% damage with 3 Charges are stored).

This unit has 50% damage reduction.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack, and survives until after the end of the turn, if this unit is charged, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 1% of max HP. Otherwise, if this unit is not charged, this unit will have its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

PeakPerformancePassiveABallet.name: Charged Performance
PeakPerformancePassiveABallet.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Charge, Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, Poison Ward, and an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

Each time this unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit is granted a Charge.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Charge stored on this unit (e.g. Deadly Dance: 700% => 1000% damage while 3 Charges are stored on this unit).

This unit has 50% damage reduction, plus 10% for each Charge stored on this unit (max of 80% while 3 Charges are stored on this unit).

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack, and survives until after the end of the turn, if this unit is charged, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 100% of max HP. Otherwise, if this unit is not charged, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

PianoMusicPassiveAChopinRegularBoss.name: Chopin's Performance
PianoMusicPassiveAChopinRegularBoss.description:
When this unit enters battle, this unit is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, and Burn Ward.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

When this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield, at the end of the turn this unit is healed for 1% of max HP and gains one of the following Melodies at random:
- Water Melody: Grants this unit Sleep Immunity.
- Storm Melody:  Grants this unit Stun Immunity.
- Earth Melody: Grants this unit Poison Immunity.
- Fire Melody: Grants this unit Burn Immunity.

Melodies do not end unless Chopin is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Chopin can have multiple Melodies active at once, but is not guaranteed to gain one she does not already have when a Melody is randomized by her skills.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

PianoMusicPassiveAChopinRegular.name: Chopin's Reverie
PianoMusicPassiveAChopinRegular.description:
When this unit enters battle, this unit is granted an Instant Death Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, and Burn Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

When this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield, at the end of the turn this unit is healed for 100% of max HP and gains one of the following Melodies at random:
- Water Melody: Grants this unit Sleep Immunity.
- Storm Melody:  Grants this unit Stun Immunity.
- Earth Melody: Grants this unit Poison Immunity.
- Fire Melody: Grants this unit Burn Immunity.

Melodies do not end unless Chopin is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Chopin can have multiple Melodies active at once, but is not guaranteed to gain one she does not already have when a Melody is randomly gained by her skills.

PinkHairPassiveAPeachGirlRegularBoss.name: Imposter Drive
PinkHairPassiveAPeachGirlRegularBoss.description:
Whenever an imposter on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, a random ally will have their current TU reduced by 25TU.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 1% of its max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

PinkHairPassiveAPeachGirlRegular.name: Flashy Entrance
PinkHairPassiveAPeachGirlRegular.description:
This unit cannot be stunned if there is an enemy on the battlefield that is Fire element, or has a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill.

Whenever an imposter on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, a random ally will have their current TU reduced by 50TU.

When this unit enters battle, for 150TU:
- This unit cannot be defeated by damage (including Lethal Poison).
- Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 100% of its max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
After 150TU on the battlefield, each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of its max HP and be Purified.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack, this unit will grant the Deep Sleep status effect for 100TU to the next enemy that enters the battlefield. Deep Sleep will overwrite other status effects, cannot be overwritten by Burn or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified.

PlanAPassiveAElminaModernBoss.name: Cyber Creations
PlanAPassiveAElminaModernBoss.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

This unit will gain a Charge each time it attacks and does not defeat any non-conjured enemies.

When this unit enters battle:
- If this unit is not conjured, it will have Hold Ground (If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP).
- If this unit is conjured, this unit will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack:
- An Elmina will be added to the front of allied reinforcements. This effect cannot trigger if there are 8 or more "Elmina, Moonveiled Agent" in the ally team.
- Then all charges are removed from this unit.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. All Elmina's created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories.

PlanAPassiveAElminaModern.name: Cyber Doubles
PlanAPassiveAElminaModern.description:
This unit is not affected by stun effects.

When this unit enters battle:
- If this unit is not conjured, it will have Hold Ground (If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP).
- If this unit is not conjured and if there are 4 allies on the battlefield, an Elmina will be added to the front of allied reinforcements.
- If this unit is conjured, this unit will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

This unit will gain a Charge each time it attacks and does not defeat any non-conjured enemies.

Whenever this unit defeats any number of non-conjured enemies with an attack:
- An Elmina will be added to the front of allied reinforcements. This effect cannot trigger if there are 8 or more "Elmina, Moonveiled Agent" in the ally team.
- Then all charges are removed from this unit.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. All Elmina's created by this unit will have matching Levels, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapons, and Accessories.

PlanBPassiveAElminaModernBoss.name: Hyper Speed
PlanBPassiveAElminaModernBoss.description:
Triggered the first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, and when this unit activates Elmina Unleashed:
- All allies will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- Then all other ally units will be given the next turns by having their TU reduced. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by those allies until after they have had the turn.

These effects will each only trigger once each time this unit is on the battlefield, and only if this unit entered the battlefield from reinforcements.

Each time this unit damages at least one enemy with an attack and leaves them on or below 10% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack), this unit will get another turn. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances.

Effects that influence TU order may interrupt extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

PlanBPassiveAElminaModern.name: Hyper Drive
PlanBPassiveAElminaModern.description:
If this unit entered from reinforcements, the following effects are triggered when this unit activates Limiter Release, and the first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn:
- All allies will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and heal for 100% of max HP.
- Then all other ally units will be given the next turns by having their TU reduced. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by those allies until after they have had the turn.

Each time this unit damages at least one enemy with an attack and leaves them on or below 25% of max HP (even if they are defeated by the attack), this unit will get another turn. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances.

Effects that influence TU order may interrupt extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

PoisonAttackPlusADarkRizetteSwimsuit.name: Poison Scourge
PoisonAttackPlusADarkRizetteSwimsuit.description: Damages 1 enemy and then Mega Poisons them for 100TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. 300% damage if the user is a conjured unit. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

PoisonChargeA.name: Poison Charge
PoisonChargeA.description: For each enemy with the Poison status effect, grants 1 Charge to the user and heals the user for 25% of max HP. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

PoisonDrainDoubleA.name: Poison Drain
PoisonDrainDoubleA.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. Heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt to a poisoned enemy.

PoisonDrainDoubleARizBride.name: Endless Bride
PoisonDrainDoubleARizBride.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt to a poisoned target.

PoisonDrainDoubleB.name: Poison Drain
