PoisonDrainDoubleB.description: 250% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. Heals the user for 30% of max HP if damage is dealt to a poisoned enemy.

PoisonDrainDoubleSKingArthurBoss.name: Fangsbane
PoisonDrainDoubleSKingArthurBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. Heals the user for 5% of max HP if damage is dealt to a poisoned enemy.

PoisonDrainDoubleSKingArthur.name: Regal Fangsbane
PoisonDrainDoubleSKingArthur.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt to a poisoned enemy.

PoisonDrainPlusSingleADarkRizetteSwimsui.name: Poison Carnage
PoisonDrainPlusSingleADarkRizetteSwimsui.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are poisoned. If damage is dealt to a poisoned target, the user recovers HP to 100% of its own max and gains the Counter Stance status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user.

PoisonDrainPlusSingleADarkRizetteSwimsui.name: Poison Carnage
PoisonDrainPlusSingleADarkRizetteSwimsui.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are poisoned. If damage is dealt to a poisoned target, the user recovers HP to 100% of its own max and gains the Counter Stance status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user.

PoisonDrainSingleA.name: Poison Drain
PoisonDrainSingleA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy if they are poisoned. Heals the user for 50% of max HP if the target is poisoned.

PoisonDrainSniperADarkAstridBoss.name: Poison Chaser
PoisonDrainSniperADarkAstridBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they are poisoned and heals the user for 5% of max HP if damage is dealt. No healing will occur if the target is not poisoned. This attack ignores Guardians.

PoisonEaterAKaguyahimeDarkBoss.name: Shadow Split
PoisonEaterAKaguyahimeDarkBoss.description: Targets 1 enemy. If an enemy is poisoned, deals 400% damage. If the user has survived for 200TU+ on the battlefield, 600% damage instead. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

PoisonEaterAKaguyahimeDark.name: Shadow Rift
PoisonEaterAKaguyahimeDark.description: Targets 1 enemy. If an enemy is poisoned, deals 400% damage. If the user has survived for 200TU+ on the battlefield, 600% damage instead. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. The user recovers HP to 100% of its own max if damage is dealt.

PoisonEaterDoubleADarkAstridBoss.name: Poison Devour
PoisonEaterDoubleADarkAstridBoss.description: 250% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. This attack ignores Hold Ground.

PoisonEaterDoubleAOniSchoolGirlBoss.name: Poison Raid
PoisonEaterDoubleAOniSchoolGirlBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

PoisonExtraTurnGokuDarkBoss.name: Thousand Thrusts
PoisonExtraTurnGokuDarkBoss.description:
Each time this unit damages a poisoned enemy with an attack, this unit will get another turn and allies gain 1 Spirit for each other ally Mega Dark Sun Wukong on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, up to 4 spirit gained max.

These effects cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.

Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

PoisonExtraTurnGokuDark.name: Thousand Thrusts
PoisonExtraTurnGokuDark.description:
Each time this unit damages a poisoned enemy with an attack, this unit will get another turn and allies gain 1 Spirit for each other ally "Dark Sun Wukong, The Great Menace, Hell's Equal" on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, up to 4 spirit gained max.

These effects cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances.

Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

PoisonFruitPassiveAPeachGirlRegularBoss.name: Peach Legend
PoisonFruitPassiveAPeachGirlRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be burned, or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While there is a poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

The first time this unit is damaged by an attack while it does not have its Active Skills disabled, this unit will have its TU reduced to 0.

This unit's attacks remove burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from hit targets.

PoisonLustPassiveAYandereMaidDark.name: Toxic Maid
PoisonLustPassiveAYandereMaidDark.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack while there is a Poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit will survive with 1HP remaining instead. Then this unit will remove poison (including Lethal Poison) from a random poisoned enemy at the end of turn.

This unit heals for 50% of max HP whenever it damages a poisoned enemy with an attack (triggers once per poisoned enemy hit).

This unit's Attack is increased by:
- 1.25x if there is exactly 1 Poisoned enemy on the battlefield.
- 1.5x if there are exactly 2 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
- 1.75x if there are exactly 3 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
- 2.0x if there are exactly 4 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
These Attack increases do not stack with Enrage effects.

PoisonThrowDrainA.name: Poison Blood Drain
PoisonThrowDrainA.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements for 400% damage to 1 enemy then poisons them. The user is healed for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Usable only if there are 1 or more allied reinforcements left.

PoisonTrapEnemiesRegenerateWhenPoisonGet.name: Auto Poison+
PoisonTrapEnemiesRegenerateWhenPoisonGet.description: This unit heals 30% of its max HP whenever a poisoned enemy gets a turn, and new enemies entering the battlefield will gain the Poison status effect. Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected units.

PoisonTurnPassiveAKenshinRegular.name: Hypnotic Swordsman
PoisonTurnPassiveAKenshinRegular.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time this unit damages a poisoned enemy with an attack, this unit will be healed for 100% of its max HP.

If this unit damages at least one poisoned enemy with an attack, this unit will get another turn. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

The first time this unit is damaged by an attack while no enemies on the battlefield are Hypnotized, and no other "Kenshin, Master of Rashomon Gate" is on the battlefield, there is a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) for this unit to Hypnotize all enemies on the battlefield. A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then that unit's hypnosis will end. Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the hypnotizer is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units.

PoisonWallALuciferRegularBoss.name: Poison Sweep
PoisonWallALuciferRegularBoss.description: 100% damage to all enemies, 250% damage instead to targets that are poisoned. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

PowerBlastDoubleACinderellaDarkBoss.name: Demolition Raid
PowerBlastDoubleACinderellaDarkBoss.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

PowerBlastDoubleAMechaBride.name: Demolition Raid
PowerBlastDoubleAMechaBride.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

PowerBlastPurifyARapunzelRegularBoss.name: Golden Strikes
PowerBlastPurifyARapunzelRegularBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to deal 750% damage instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Removes Burn and Poison status effects (including Lethal Poison) from the user. Usable if the user has a Power Charge or a Burn or Poison status effect.

PowerBlastPurifyARapunzelRegular.name: Golden Bolts
PowerBlastPurifyARapunzelRegular.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. If the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to deal 750% damage instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. Removes Burn and Poison status effects (including Lethal Poison) from the user and grants the user Recovery Mist for 100TU. Recovery Mist effects do not stack. Usable if the user has a Power Charge or a Burn or Poison status effect.

A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.

PowerChargeBlastAFrankensteinRegularDoll.name: Maximum Output
PowerChargeBlastAFrankensteinRegularDoll.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

PowerChargeBlastAFrankensteinRegularDoll.name: Maximum Output
PowerChargeBlastAFrankensteinRegularDoll.description: Consumes a Power Charge for 600% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

PowerUpAlliesSacAOrcanix.name: Endless Power
PowerUpAlliesSacAOrcanix.description: Sacrifices 1 other ally to increase the Attack of all remaining allies on the battlefield by 50%. This effect does stack.

PrepareArmorSelfOnHitDeath.name: Augment: Armor
PrepareArmorSelfOnHitDeath.description: This unit gains the Armor status effect after dealing damage with an attack. This will overwrite other status effects on the unit. This will not activate if the unit begins its turn with armor. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

PromisedGuardALudmillaYukata.name: Friendly Evasion
PromisedGuardALudmillaYukata.description: Grants the Stealth status effect with a Stealth Shield to 1 other ally. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on that ally. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

ProtectAlliesDodgeDoubleTargetAttackWhen.name: God Alliance
ProtectAlliesDodgeDoubleTargetAttackWhen.description:
While there is no ally Mega Odin on the battlefield, this unit will be a Guardian and will ignore any attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot be defeated while there is an ally Mega Odin or Mega Winged Shade on the battlefield.

ProtectAlliesHealAlternatingStun.name: Thunder Guard
ProtectAlliesHealAlternatingStun.description:
Every time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 10% of max HP. Every second time this unit takes damage from an attack, the attacker will be stunned for 100TU (this is not considered a Skin effect).

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from the Burn or normal Poison status effects (stronger poisons such as Super Poison or Mega Poison can still defeat this unit).

This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectBelow25MaxHPTriggerMurasakiRegula.name: Red Herring
ProtectBelow25MaxHPTriggerMurasakiRegula.description:
For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

Whenever this unit is hit by an attack and is defeated or survives with 25% or less of max HP until after the end of the turn:
- They are sacrificed if they were not defeated.
- A copy of this unit is added to next in line of ally reinforcements.
- All allies become Enraged and have their current TU reduced by 100. These effects won't trigger if defeated by the burn status effect.

ProtectBelow25MaxHPTriggerMurasakiRegula.name: Fake Out
ProtectBelow25MaxHPTriggerMurasakiRegula.description:
For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

Whenever this unit is hit by an attack and is defeated or survives with 5% or less of max HP until after the end of the turn:
- They are sacrificed if they were not defeated.
- A copy of this unit is added to next in line of ally reinforcements.
- All allies become Enraged and have their current TU reduced by 100. These effects won't trigger if defeated by the burn status effect.

ProtectBelow25MaxHPTriggerMurasakiRegula.name: Red Herring
ProtectBelow25MaxHPTriggerMurasakiRegula.description:
For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

Whenever this unit is hit by an attack and is defeated or survives with 25% or less of max HP until after the end of the turn:
- They are sacrificed if they were not defeated.
- A copy of this unit is added to next in line of ally reinforcements.
- All allies become Enraged and have their current TU reduced by 100. These effects won't trigger if defeated by the burn status effect.

ProtectDamageReducBurn50TUA.name: Burning Shield
ProtectDamageReducBurn50TUA.description: For 50TU, the user becomes a Guardian and gains 50% damage reduction from attacks. The user is also granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Usable only if this unit is not already a Guardian.

ProtectDamageReducPurify50TUA.name: Guardian Mode
ProtectDamageReducPurify50TUA.description: For 50TU, the user becomes a Guardian and gains 50% damage reduction from attacks. Any negative status effects like burn or poison are also removed from the user. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable only if this unit is not already a Guardian.

ProtectDamageReducPurifyADeerGirlBoss.name: Guard Allies
ProtectDamageReducPurifyADeerGirlBoss.description: The user becomes a Guardian and gains 50% damage reduction from attacks. Any negative status effects like burn or poison are also removed from the user. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable only if this unit is not already a Guardian.

ProtecterABeastRegularBoss.description: This unit becomes a Guardian and cannot be defeated. These effects begin when this unit enters the battlefield, and end after this unit's third turn on the battlefield. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. ProtecterALudmillaDarkNewStartOnBattlefi.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtecterARolotiaDarkBoss.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtecterARolotiaDark.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtecterAThorRegular.description: This unit is a Guardian for another {0}TU. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectFor100TU50DamageReductionBoss.name: Protective Sister
ProtectFor100TU50DamageReductionBoss.description: For another {0}TU, this unit is a Guardian and has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While it is a Guardian, this unit redirects any enemy attack that would target 1 or 2 allies to themselves. This doesn't redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectFor100TU50DamageReduction.name: Protective Sister
ProtectFor100TU50DamageReduction.description: For another {0}TU, this unit is a Guardian and has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While it is a Guardian, this unit redirects any enemy attack that would target 1 or 2 allies to themselves. This doesn't redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectForAutoProtectWhileAngelPresent.name: Twin Guardian
ProtectForAutoProtectWhileAngelPresent.description: If there is a Water ally named Mikaela on the battlefield this unit is a Guardian and has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSource100TU.name: Triumph Guard
ProtectSource100TU.description: For another {0}TU, this unit is a Guardian. While it is a Guardian, this unit redirects any enemy attack that would target 1 or 2 allies to themselves. This doesn't redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSourceAutoChanceShowIcon.name: Auto Guard
ProtectSourceAutoChanceShowIcon.description: This unit is a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 60% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSourceBlockDeathUntilNextTurn.name: Angelic Guard Entry
ProtectSourceBlockDeathUntilNextTurn.description: Until the end of this unit's next turn, this unit is a Guardian and cannot be defeated. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This unit cannot become a Stun Absorber while this skill is in effect.

ProtectSourceBlockDeathUntilNextTurnMagi.name: Morphie Forcefield
ProtectSourceBlockDeathUntilNextTurnMagi.description: Until the end of this unit's next turn, this unit is a Guardian and cannot be defeated. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSourceDamageReduc50TU.name: Guardian Mode
ProtectSourceDamageReduc50TU.description: For another {0}TU, this unit is a Guardian and has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While it is a Guardian, this unit redirects any enemy attack that would target 1 or 2 allies to themselves. This doesn't redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSourceDamageReducBurn50TU.name: Burning Shield
ProtectSourceDamageReducBurn50TU.description: For another {0}TU, this unit is a Guardian and has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While it is a Guardian, this unit redirects any enemy attack that would target 1 or 2 allies to themselves. This doesn't redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSourceDamageReduce.name: Guardian
ProtectSourceDamageReduce.description: This unit is a Guardian and has 50% damage reduction from attacks. This unit redirects any enemy attack that would target 1 or 2 allies to themselves. This doesn't redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSourceDamageRemove.name: Guard Once
ProtectSourceDamageRemove.description: This unit is a Guardian. For the next enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the attacks is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This effect will go away only if this unit redirects an attack, targeting this unit directly will not remove it. This unit cannot have the Counter Stance status effect while it has guard once.

ProtectSource.name: Guardian
ProtectSource.description: This unit redirects any enemy attack that would target 1 or 2 allies to themselves. This doesn't redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSourceFreyaBoss.name: God Alliance
ProtectSourceFreyaBoss.description:
While there is no ally Mega Odin on the battlefield, this unit will be a Guardian and will ignore any attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

This unit cannot be defeated while there is an ally Mega Odin or Mega Winged Shade on the battlefield.

ProtectSourceUntilBlockDeathHeal.name: Deadly Guard
ProtectSourceUntilBlockDeathHeal.description: This unit is a Guardian. While this unit is a Guardian, it cannot be defeated by non-attack damage. When this unit would next be defeated by an attack, this unit will stop being a Guardian and be healed for 100% of max HP. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectSourceWithDamageReduce.name: Guardian
ProtectSourceWithDamageReduce.description: This unit is a Guardian and has 50% damage reduction from attacks. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This doesn't redirect skills that don't deal damage.

ProtectTeammatesA.name: Guard Allies
ProtectTeammatesA.description: The user becomes a Guardian. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable only if this unit is not already a Guardian.

ProtectTeammatesUntilNextTurnAMagicalRab.name: Morphie Forcefield
ProtectTeammatesUntilNextTurnAMagicalRab.description: Until the end of the user's next turn, the user will become a Guardian and cannot be defeated. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable once each time this unit is conjured.

ProtectUntilGetTurnEntrance.name: Angelic Guard Entry
ProtectUntilGetTurnEntrance.description: This unit becomes a Guardian and cannot be defeated. These effects begin when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements and end after this unit's first turn on the battlefield. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This unit cannot become a Stun Absorber while this skill is in effect.

PullBackWhenHoldGroundTrigger.name: Mikaela's Rescue
PullBackWhenHoldGroundTrigger.description:
The first time this unit would be defeated by an attack while on the battlefield, it will instead survive the turn on 1HP.

Then since this unit has not yet used Survivor's Rush while on the battlefield, if there are any other non-conjured allies on the battlefield this unit will be sent away from the battlefield to be next in line of allied reinforcements. If there are no allied reinforcements to replace this unit, enough Kuromoris (up to 3) will be added to the battlefield in this unit's place so that it can still return to reinforcements.

This passive skill will be disabled if there is another ally "Dark Jeanne, Summertime Fallen Angel" on the battlefield or in ally reinforcements.

PuppetAttackAFrankensteinRegularDollBoss.name: Doll Raid
PuppetAttackAFrankensteinRegularDollBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user gains a Power Charge. Usable if Frankenstein is among allies on the battlefield.

PuppetDrainAFrankensteinRegularDoll.name: Doll Harvest
PuppetDrainAFrankensteinRegularDoll.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. If damage is dealt, the user is granted a Power Charge, fully healed, and all ally "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" on the battlefield are fully healed. Usable if the user is below 50% of max HP or if "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" is among allies on the battlefield.

PuppeteerGuardAFrankensteinRegularBoss.name: Protective Sister
PuppeteerGuardAFrankensteinRegularBoss.description: For 100TU, the user becomes a Guardian and gains 50% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable if Mary is among allies on the battlefield.

PuppeteerGuardAFrankensteinRegular.name: Protective Sister
PuppeteerGuardAFrankensteinRegular.description: For 100TU, the user becomes a Guardian and gains 50% damage reduction from attacks. While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. Usable if "Mary, Guardian Angel on Strings" is among allies on the battlefield.

PurifyAllyWhenHurtDamageReduc.name: Elegant Defense
PurifyAllyWhenHurtDamageReduc.description:
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will grant Poison and Sleep wards to all allies and Purify them. This is not a skin passive skill.

PurifyGainTurnACthulhuGirlRegularBoss.name: The Great One
PurifyGainTurnACthulhuGirlRegularBoss.description:
Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit has a 100% chance to immediately have its TU reduced to 0, be Purified, and be granted Sleep Immunity until the end of the turn.

The first time this unit is damaged by an attack while this unit has no Charges, and is below 10% of max HP, it will enter Warped Reality for 200TU. While in Warped Reality, this unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, cannot be defeated by damage, has 90% damage reduction from attacks and is a Guardian.

Whenever this unit gets the turn in Warped Reality, it will lose the turn and Mega Poison all non-sleeping enemies for 200TU. Then if there is more than 1 enemy on the battlefield and no enemy is Hypnotized, this unit will hypnotize 1 random enemy on the battlefield. This unit cannot be Hypnotized while in Warped Reality. When Warped Reality ends, this unit will be sacrificed.

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end. Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the hypnotizer is defeated or leaves the battlefield.

PurifyGainTurnACthulhuGirlRegular.name: The Great Old One
PurifyGainTurnACthulhuGirlRegular.description:
Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0, be Purified, and be granted Sleep Immunity until the end of the turn.

The first time this unit is damaged by an attack while this unit has no Charges, it will survive that attack and then enter Warped Reality for 200TU. While in Warped Reality, this unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield, cannot be defeated by damage, has 90% damage reduction from attacks and is a Guardian.

Whenever this unit gets the turn in Warped Reality, it will lose the turn and Mega Poison all non-sleeping enemies for 200TU. Then if there is more than 1 enemy on the battlefield and no enemy is Hypnotized, this unit will hypnotize 1 random enemy on the battlefield. This unit cannot be Hypnotized while in Warped Reality. When Warped Reality ends, this unit will be sacrificed.

While this unit is a Guardian, for any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. A Hypnotized enemy will use its next turn to grant the turn to and Purify the hypnotizer (the turn will be lost as if it were sleeping), and then the hypnosis will end. Hypnosis is not a status effect and cannot be removed by Purify skills, but will be canceled if the hypnotizer is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Hypnosis will fail against Boss units.

PurifyGiveTurnDoubleYandereMaidRQ.name: Deadly Command
PurifyGiveTurnDoubleYandereMaidRQ.description: Immediately give 2 other allies the next turns by reducing their current TU, and remove negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from them and the user. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the given turns (e.g. Counter Stance and Stuns targeting the lowest TU target). Unlocked each time the user defeats another unit with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield, and will not reduce the user's TU if they are targeted.

PurifyHealAllAMechaSisterNew.name: Mass Surge
PurifyHealAllAMechaSisterNew.description:
Heals the user for 30% of max HP, and the user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Poison Ward. All other allies heal for 100% of their max HP. Then all allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and granted Recovery Mist for 200TU. Usable 10 times per battle.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack.

PurifyHealAllyAAstridBrideBoss.name: Purify Heal
PurifyHealAllyAAstridBrideBoss.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 2 allies, and heals them each for HP equal to 300% of the user's Attack.

PurifyHealAllyA.name: Purify Heal
PurifyHealAllyA.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 1 ally, and heals them for 25% of their max HP.

PurifyHealDoubleA.name: Purify Heal
PurifyHealDoubleA.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 2 allies, and heals them each for HP equal to 150% of the user's Attack.

PurifyHealDoubleBMagicalRabbit.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 2 allies, and heals them each for 25% of their max HP.

PurifyHealElixirADeerGirl.name: Ink of Restoration
PurifyHealElixirADeerGirl.description: Removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison from 1 ally, and heals them for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack. Usable 3 times per battle.

QuickLastStandAKaguyahimeBoss.name: Final Barrage
QuickLastStandAKaguyahimeBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Usable only if the user has no allies on the battlefield.

QuickSurvivorBusterAKaguyahime.name: Survivor's Barrage
QuickSurvivorBusterAKaguyahime.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

RageBurnSpiritWhenMonstersDie.name: Viral Livestream
RageBurnSpiritWhenMonstersDie.description: This unit gains the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU, is Enraged (its Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn), and gains a Stun Ward. Allies gain 1 Spirit. All of these effects are triggered whenever another non-conjured unit (ally or enemy) on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is not Sleeping. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Healing Burn's duration will be reset if this unit already has it. Stun Wards cannot stack. Triggered effects on enemies that cause this unit to Sleep (e.g. Sleep Thorns) may prevent these effects from triggering.

RageHasteKillGateSingleACowGirl.name: Attack Charm
RageHasteKillGateSingleACowGirl.description: Enrages 1 Ally, increasing their Attack to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Quickens that ally instead if they have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, reducing their TU costs for all of their skills by 20% until they leave the battlefield. This will overwrite the effect of previous Enrage or Quicken skills respectively. This skill becomes locked after use until the user activates another active skill.

RageLowestArmorHighestTUAlliesEntranceA.name: Blessing Entry
RageLowestArmorHighestTUAlliesEntranceA.description: Enrages the two allies with the lowest current TU, increasing their Attack to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effect of previous Enrage skills. Grants the Armor status effect to the two allies with the highest current TU. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. Armor will overwrite other status affects. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

RageStealthSpiritPoisonChanceOnHP50Perce.name: Aeon Plaguebearer
RageStealthSpiritPoisonChanceOnHP50Perce.description: Whenever damage reduces this unit's HP to below 50% and it survives until after the end of the turn, each enemy that is not Sleeping or Burning has a 75% chance to become Poisoned. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. This unit will also gain the Stealth status effect, become Enraged (its Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn) and Allies will gain 3 Spirit. This skill cannot trigger again until this unit recovers to above 50% of max HP.

RageStealthSpiritPoisonChanceOnHP50Perce.name: Aeon Plaguebearer+
RageStealthSpiritPoisonChanceOnHP50Perce.description: Whenever damage reduces this unit's HP to below 50%, each enemy that is not Sleeping or Burning has a 75% chance to become Poisoned. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. If this unit also survives until after the end of the turn it was damaged, it will gain the Stealth status effect, become Enraged (its Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn) and Allies will gain 3 Spirit. This skill cannot trigger again until this unit recovers to above 50% of max HP.

RageStealthSpiritWhenAlliesDie.name: Stealthy Vengeance
RageStealthSpiritWhenAlliesDie.description: This unit gains the Stealth status effect and is Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. Allies gain 1 Spirit. All of these effects are triggered whenever another non-conjured Ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This may not trigger if this unit is defeated or sacrificed at the same time. This will overwrite other status effects and the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

RagingFireBuffALuBuRegularBoss.name: Flames of Battle
RagingFireBuffALuBuRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements, it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

While this unit has the Burn status effect, this unit has:
- Attack increased to 1.5x. This effect does not stack with Enrage skills.
- 50% damage reduction from attacks.

RagingFireBuffALuBuRegular.name: Flames of War
RagingFireBuffALuBuRegular.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield, whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements, it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

While this unit has the Burn status effect, this unit has:
- Attack increased to 1.5x. This effect does not stack with Enrage skills.
- TU costs for all active skills reduced by 40%. This effect does not stack with Quicken skills.
- 50% damage reduction from attacks.

RainbowBrushPassiveAHokusaiRegular.name: Elemental Palette
RainbowBrushPassiveAHokusaiRegular.description:
This unit enters battle with a Stun Ward, and Sleep Ward. This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Element type on the battlefield. (e.g. Paint Fall: 50% => 350% damage when 3 Element types are on the battlefield)

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water or Dark, Stun them for 100TU.
- Fire or Light, grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Storm or Earth, grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

RainbowElementAHokusaiMechaSisterAndYama.name: Elemental Palette
RainbowElementAHokusaiMechaSisterAndYama.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

When attacking, adds 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks for each Element type on the battlefield. (e.g. Elemental Sweep: 50% => 350% damage when 3 Element types are on the battlefield)

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water or Dark, Stun them for 100TU.
- Fire or Light, grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units.
- Storm or Earth, grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU. Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideA0.name: Adaptive Circuit
RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideA0.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 20% chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideA1.name: Adaptive Circuit
RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideA1.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 40% chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideA2.name: Adaptive Circuit
RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideA2.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 60% chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideA3.name: Adaptive Circuit
RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideA3.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 80% chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideBoss.name: Elemental Circuit
RainbowWelcomeMechaBrideBoss.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 100% chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

RainbowWelcomeMechaBride.name: Adaptive Circuit
RainbowWelcomeMechaBride.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 100% chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

RandomAllyTurnAUnicornRegular.name: Magical Experience
RandomAllyTurnAUnicornRegular.description:
Immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0, and Purifies them (removes negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison). Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.

This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with an Attack. This skill cannot be used if this unit is alone on the battlefield.

RandomAttackAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Red Dragon Heat
RandomAttackAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to 2 random enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are burning. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

RandomAttackAElmKouhaiRegular.name: Red Dragon Wrath
RandomAttackAElmKouhaiRegular.description:
300% damage to 2 random enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are poisoned or sleeping. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Mega Poison status effect or the Cursed Sleep status effect. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

RechargeSlashAOkitaRegularBoss.name: Boundless Slice
RechargeSlashAOkitaRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and 3 Charges. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

RechargeSlashAOkitaRegular.name: Boundless Slash
RechargeSlashAOkitaRegular.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and 3 Charges. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

The next damage the user deals with an Attack while on the battlefield will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

RecklessAttackBoostAllyA.name: Enrage Ally
RecklessAttackBoostAllyA.description: 1 ally's Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. If the target is not the user, their health is also reduced by 30% of their max. If this HP reduction would defeat an ally, they survive on 1 HP instead. This will overwrite the effect of previous Enrage skills.

RecklessAttackBoostSelfA.name: Pain Rage
RecklessAttackBoostSelfA.description: Reduces the user's current HP by 30% of max and the user's Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. If this HP reduction would defeat the user, it survives on 1 HP instead. This will overwrite the effect of previous Enrage skills.

RecklessGainSpiritA2.name: Pain Spirit
RecklessGainSpiritA2.description: Reduces the user's current HP by 30% of max and allies are granted 3 Spirit.

RecklessGainSpiritA.name: Pain Spirit
RecklessGainSpiritA.description: Reduces the user's current HP by 30% of max and allies are granted 3 Spirit.

RecklessGainSpiritB.name: Pain Spirit
RecklessGainSpiritB.description: Reduces the user's current HP by 30% of max and allies are granted 3 Spirit.

RecklessGainSpiritBoss1.name: Pain Spirit
RecklessGainSpiritBoss1.description: Reduces the user's current HP by 30% of max and allies are granted 5 Spirit.

RecklessHealA.name: Pain Heal
RecklessHealA.description: Heals 1 ally for HP equal to 400% of the user's Attack, then reduces the user's current HP by 40% of max.

RecklessHealASpiritGain.name: Pain Heal
RecklessHealASpiritGain.description: Heals 1 ally for HP equal to 400% of the user's Attack, then reduces the user's current HP by 20% of max.

RecklessHealDoubleA.name: Pain Heal
RecklessHealDoubleA.description: Heals 2 allies for HP equal to 350% of the user's Attack, then reduces the user's current HP by 40% of max.

RecklessStunRandomA.name: Pain Stun Random
RecklessStunRandomA.description: Reduces the user's current HP by 30% of max and stuns 1 random enemy for 200TU.

RecklessSummonSkeletonA.name: Pain Necromancy
RecklessSummonSkeletonA.description: Reduces the user's current HP by 30% of max and adds 1 Souldier to the very end of the allied reinforcements.

RecoveryMelodyHPRegen25PercentMaxHPOnAll.name: Recovery Melody
RecoveryMelodyHPRegen25PercentMaxHPOnAll.description: This unit will heal for 25% of their max HP each time an ally gets the turn.

RegenerateAllSpiritGainA.name: Song of Rejuvenation
RegenerateAllSpiritGainA.description: For another {0}TU, allies heal for 20% of their own max HP when they get a turn, and allies gain 1 Spirit after each ally turn.

RegenerateAllSpiritGainBurnABoss.name: Burn Rejuvenation
RegenerateAllSpiritGainBurnABoss.description: Each time an ally gets the turn while Burning, they will heal for 5% of their own max HP and then allies will gain 1 Spirit after that turn so long as this unit remains on the battlefield.

RegenerateAllSpiritGainBurnA.name: Fires of Rejuvenation
RegenerateAllSpiritGainBurnA.description: Each time an ally gets the turn while Burning, they will heal for 20% of their own max HP and then allies will gain 1 Spirit after that turn so long as this unit remains on the battlefield.

RegenerateWhenBurnAllyGetTurn.name: Blaze of Glory
RegenerateWhenBurnAllyGetTurn.description:
When this unit or a Burning ally gets a turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

Other allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills gain the Burn status effect and a Stun Ward. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Stun Ward prevents Stun from being applied once, then is removed. Stun Wards cannot stack.

RegenerateWhenPoisonGetTurn.name: Poison Regeneration
RegenerateWhenPoisonGetTurn.description: This unit heals 30% of its max HP whenever a poisoned enemy gets a turn.

RegenerationGain1SpiritChanceOnTurn.name: Starlight Champion
RegenerationGain1SpiritChanceOnTurn.description: This unit will heal 15% of max HP on every ally and enemy turn, has a 50% chance to gain 1 Spirit after every ally and enemy turn, has its Attack increased to 1.5x (this will not stack with Enrage effects), and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

RegenerationLifeMinionChance.name: Regeneration Call
RegenerationLifeMinionChance.description: When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP. After the turn, it has a 50% chance to add 1 Shiromori next in line of allied reinforcements.

RegenerationOnMyTurnAir.name: Regeneration
RegenerationOnMyTurnAir.description: When there is at least 1 other Storm ally and this unit gets the turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

RegenerationOnMyTurn.name: Regeneration
RegenerationOnMyTurn.description: When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP.

RegenerationOnMyTurnFor300TU.name: Survival Regeneration
RegenerationOnMyTurnFor300TU.description: This unit heals 30% of its max HP when it gets a turn for another {0}TU.

RegenerationOnMyTurnGetArmor.name: Armored Regeneration
RegenerationOnMyTurnGetArmor.description: When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP. After each turn this unit gets, it gains the Armor status effect unless it is sleeping. This will overwrite other status effects on this unit. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

RegenerationOnMyTurnGetStealth.name: Regeneration Shroud
RegenerationOnMyTurnGetStealth.description: When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP. After each turn this unit gets, it gains the Stealth status effect unless it is sleeping. This will overwrite other status effects on this unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

RegenerationOnMyTurnGetTurnSkinA.name: Regen Counter Skin
RegenerationOnMyTurnGetTurnSkinA.description: When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP. When this unit takes damage from an attack, they will immediately get the next turn, this cannot trigger again until TU advances. This unit cannot become a Guardian or Stun Absorber.

RegenerationOnMyTurnKills0.name: Turning Tides
RegenerationOnMyTurnKills0.description: When this unit gets a turn, it heals 30% of its max HP.

RegenerationOnMyTurnLife.name: Regeneration
RegenerationOnMyTurnLife.description: When there is at least 1 other Light ally and this unit gets the turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

RegenerationOnMyTurnSleep.name: Sleep Regeneration
RegenerationOnMyTurnSleep.description: When there is at least 1 enemy with the Sleep status effect and this unit gets the turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

RegenerationOnMyTurnWater.name: Regeneration
RegenerationOnMyTurnWater.description: When there is at least 1 other Water ally and this unit gets the turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

RegenerationOnMyTurnWaterDojo.name: Regeneration
RegenerationOnMyTurnWaterDojo.description: When there is at least 1 other Water ally and this unit gets the turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

ResetRealityACthulhuGirlRegularBoss.name: Reset Reality
ResetRealityACthulhuGirlRegularBoss.description: The user has all Sleep immunities, Sleep Wards and Stealth Shields removed. Then, the user is healed for 5% of max HP, granted 3 Charges, and Sleep for 100TU, even if they have already slept. A random enemy is also granted Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept. The next time the user is awake at the end of a turn, they will be healed for 5% of max HP, and have their current TU reduced by 100. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

ResetRealityACthulhuGirlRegular.name: Reset Reality
ResetRealityACthulhuGirlRegular.description: The user has all Sleep immunities, Sleep Wards and Stealth Shields removed. Then, the user is healed for 100% of max HP, granted 3 Charges, and Sleep for 100TU, even if they have already slept. A random enemy is also granted Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept. The next time the user is awake at the end of a turn, they will be healed for 100% of max HP, and have their current TU reduced by 100. Usable only if the user has no Charges stored.

ReversalDrainA.name: Retribution Drain
ReversalDrainA.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, and the user recovers HP by 30% of its own max HP. 500% damage and 50% HP recovered instead if the user's HP is at 25% or less. Unlocked each time this unit is damaged by an attack while it is a Guardian. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

ReviveAtBackEffectB.name: Repeat Reincarnation
ReviveAtBackEffectB.description: Revives this unit to the very back of allied reinforcements with full HP whenever this unit is defeated and it has a Mega Nobunaga or Mega Honnoji ally on the battlefield.

ReviveAtBackEffect.name: Endless Return
ReviveAtBackEffect.description:
Revives this unit to the very back of allied reinforcements with full HP whenever this unit is defeated and it has any reinforcements.

This unit immediately gets the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

ReviveEndlessAtBackRevengeB.name: Repeat Reincarnation
ReviveEndlessAtBackRevengeB.description: Revives this unit to the very back of allied reinforcements with full HP whenever this unit is defeated and it has a Mega Nobunaga or Mega Honnoji ally on the battlefield.

ReviveEndlessAtBackRevenge.name: Endless Return
ReviveEndlessAtBackRevenge.description:
Revives this unit to the very back of allied reinforcements with full HP whenever this unit is defeated and it has any reinforcements.

This unit immediately gets the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

ReviveFrankensteinAFrankensteinRegularDo.name: Mary's Monster
ReviveFrankensteinAFrankensteinRegularDo.description: Sacrifices the user to revive the Frankenstein that conjured the user to the battlefield with full HP. Usable only if the user doesn't have "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" in the ally team, including reinforcements. The revived Frankenstein will be considered a conjured unit.

ReviveFrankensteinAFrankensteinRegularDo.name: Mary's Monster
ReviveFrankensteinAFrankensteinRegularDo.description: Sacrifices the user to revive the Frankenstein that conjured the user to the battlefield with full HP. Usable only if the user doesn't have "Frankenstein, Twin Horrors" in the ally team, including reinforcements. The revived Frankenstein will be considered a conjured unit.

ReviveOdinRegularA.name: Supreme Revival
ReviveOdinRegularA.description: Sacrifices the user to revive the Odin that conjured the user to the battlefield with full HP. Usable if there is not already an ally "Odin, Goddess of All Laws" on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. The revived Odin will be considered a conjured unit and will have use limits on active skills reset.

ReviveOdinRegularBossA.name: Revive Odin
ReviveOdinRegularBossA.description: Sacrifices the user to revive the Mega Odin that conjured the user to the battlefield with full HP. Usable if there is not already an ally Mega Odin on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. The revived Mega Odin will be considered a conjured unit and will have use limits on active skills reset.

ReviveOnceAtBackEffect.name: Reincarnation Revenge
ReviveOnceAtBackEffect.description: When this unit is defeated by an enemy, revives this unit to the very back of allied reinforcements with full HP. The revived unit will be considered a conjured unit and will have this passive skill disabled. Use limits on active skills will be reset for the revived unit.

ReviveOnceAtBackRevenge.name: Reincarnation Revenge
ReviveOnceAtBackRevenge.description: Revives this unit to the very back of allied reinforcements with full HP when this unit is defeated by an enemy. The revived unit will be considered a conjured unit and will have this passive skill disabled. Use limits on active skills will be reset for the revived unit.

ReviveOnceAtRandomEffect.name: Endless Revenge
ReviveOnceAtRandomEffect.description:
If this unit is not conjured, revives this unit to a random place in allied reinforcements with full HP when this unit is defeated by an enemy. The revived unit will be considered a conjured unit.

If this unit is conjured, it immediately gets the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield from reinforcements, and TU costs for all of its skills are reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of previous quicken skills.

ReviveOnceAtRandomRevengeDarkRizetteSwim.name: Endless Revenge
ReviveOnceAtRandomRevengeDarkRizetteSwim.description:
If this unit is not conjured, revives this unit to a random place in allied reinforcements with full HP when this unit is defeated by an enemy. The revived unit will be considered a conjured unit.

If this unit is conjured, it immediately gets the turn by having its TU reduced to 0 whenever it enters the battlefield from reinforcements, and TU costs for all of its skills are reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of previous quicken skills.

RoundTableKnight01.name: Lancelot
RoundTableKnight01.description: A Knight of the Round Table raised by a faerie known as the Lady of the Lake—that was the original Lancelot. The path this one is walking, and the paths she refuses to follow are not the same as her predecessor's. Her mind is as open as a wide lake, her appearance and expressions ever changing like a water surface that reflects the sky. And still, just like the waters of an inland lake do not ebb and flow with the tide, so does her swordsmanship stay ever unwavering. She withstands every attack and launches her own special move. She bears the title of the strongest like it's nothing, for she is the current Lancelot.

RoyalDriveAElizabethRegularBoss.name: Queen's Power
RoyalDriveAElizabethRegularBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Removes any Poison Wards from hit targets. Usable only if allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 100TU.

RoyalDriveAElizabethRegular.name: Queen's Drive
RoyalDriveAElizabethRegular.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Removes any Sleep Wards from hit targets. Usable only if allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 100TU.

SafeAttackAllFastA.name: Attack All+
SafeAttackAllFastA.description: 50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect and the effects of Skin passive skills.

SakuraSweepAKojiroRegularBoss.name: Sakura Storm
SakuraSweepAKojiroRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% total damage). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

SakuraSweepAKojiroRegular.name: Sakura Storm
SakuraSweepAKojiroRegular.description: 200% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 500% total damage). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

SavageSleepRevengeATristanRegularBoss.name: Dangerous Tempo
SavageSleepRevengeATristanRegularBoss.description:
When this unit is defeated by an enemy, 1 random non-sleeping enemy is granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This effect triggers again for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 4 triggers total). Then if all enemies are asleep, all allies on the battlefield will immediately get the turns by having their TU reduced.

This unit has a 100% chance to immediately have its TU reduced to 0 after the first enemy turn while this unit is on the battlefield. If this successfully triggers, the enemy unit that had the turn is also granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

When this unit defeats 1 or more enemy units with an attack:
- If no enemies are sleeping, 1 random enemy is granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

SavageSleepRevengeATristanRegular.name: Deadly Tempo
SavageSleepRevengeATristanRegular.description:
When this unit is defeated by an enemy, 1 random non-sleeping enemy is granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This effect triggers again for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 4 triggers total). Then if all enemies are asleep, all allies on the battlefield will immediately get the turns by having their TU reduced.

This unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0 after the first enemy turn while this unit is on the battlefield. If this successfully triggers, the enemy unit that had the turn is also granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

When this unit defeats 1 or more enemy units with an attack:
- All allies are healed for 30% of max HP.
- If no enemies are sleeping, 1 random enemy is granted the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.

SchoolDetentionPassiveAOniSchoolDarkBoss.name: Divine Cycle
SchoolDetentionPassiveAOniSchoolDarkBoss.description:
This unit has 35% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% for each poisoned enemy on the battlefield (up to 75% max).

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- A random enemy on the battlefield is granted Super Poison.
- A random enemy on the battlefield is Weakened.
- This unit steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This effect will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

SchoolDetentionPassiveAOniSchoolDark.name: Divine Darkness
SchoolDetentionPassiveAOniSchoolDark.description:
This unit has 35% damage reduction from attacks, plus 10% for each poisoned enemy on the battlefield (up to 75% max).

When this unit takes damage from an attack:
- If this unit survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 30% of max HP and be granted Stealth.
- If at the start of the turn there were no poisoned enemies and this unit had another ally on the battlefield, this unit will have its TU reduced to 0.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- A random enemy on the battlefield is granted Super Poison.
- A random enemy on the battlefield is Weakened.
- This unit steals up to 1 Spirit from the enemy team.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This effect will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

SchoolFriendsPassiveARizKouhaiBoss.name: Burning Friendship
SchoolFriendsPassiveARizKouhaiBoss.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Whenever there are 3 or more burning allies on the battlefield, this unit will survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

Each time this unit gets the turn, all allies will heal for 1% of their max HP.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- If this unit has a Power Charge, all allies will become Enraged, then the Power Charge is removed from this unit.
- Otherwise, this unit will gain a Power Charge.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

SchoolFriendsPassiveARizKouhai.name: Burning Bond
SchoolFriendsPassiveARizKouhai.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Whenever there are 3 or more burning allies on the battlefield, this unit will survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

Each time this unit gets the turn, all allies will heal for 30% of their max HP.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- If this unit has a Power Charge, all allies will become Enraged, then the Power Charge is removed from this unit.
- Otherwise, this unit will gain a Power Charge.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. Power Charges cannot stack and will be removed when the user leaves the battlefield.

SeekOpeningAZoroRegular.name: One Step Ahead
SeekOpeningAZoroRegular.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

Whenever another unit on the battlefield damages any unit(s) with an attack, this unit's current TU is reduced by 10TU per unit hit.

Each time an enemy unit gets the turn, if this unit has 150TU or more, this unit will gain the Counter Stance status effect for 150TU at the end of that turn.

SelfBuffABahamutGirlRegular.name: Dragon Reborn
SelfBuffABahamutGirlRegular.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack. The user is granted 3 Charges, and the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU.

Then the user has their current TU reduced by 10TU for each burning ally on the battlefield. All other non-sleeping allies are granted the next turns by reducing their current TU. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.

Usable only if the user has 1 or fewer Charges stored. Usable 10 times per battle. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

SelfBuffASiegfriedRegular.name: Icy Awakening
SelfBuffASiegfriedRegular.description:
Heals the user fully. The user is granted a Charge, Sleep Ward, Poison Ward, and the Armor status effect. Armor will overwrite other status effects. Then the user is Enraged, and will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Unlocked each time the user defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use.

Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards and Endure effects cannot stack. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

SelfBuffPassiveAMyshaKnightBoss.name: Determined Knight
SelfBuffPassiveAMyshaKnightBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit cannot be stunned.

These effects are triggered whenever another non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source:
- Allies gain 3 Spirit.
- This unit becomes Enraged. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

At the end of each non-stealthed enemy turn, this unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this effect cannot trigger again until 50TU advances.

SelfBuffPassiveAMyshaKnight.name: Mighty Legacy
SelfBuffPassiveAMyshaKnight.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

Each time a Stealthed unit (ally or enemy) gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 50% of its max HP. This effect cannot trigger if Mysha has no other allies on the battlefield.

This unit reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU for each Storm or Earth ally on the battlefield (max of -200TU if there are 4 Storm or Earth allies on the battlefield).

These effects are triggered whenever another non-conjured Ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source:
- Allies gain 3 Spirit.
- This unit gains Super Stealth and a Stealth Shield.
- This unit becomes Enraged. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

SetupRainbowWelcomeMechaBrideBoss.name: Elemental Circuit
SetupRainbowWelcomeMechaBrideBoss.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 100% chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

SetupRainbowWelcomeMechaBride.name: Adaptive Circuit
SetupRainbowWelcomeMechaBride.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Whenever another non-conjured ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements, 20%+ chance for one of the following effects determined by that unit's Element to trigger.

WATER: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Sleep (Forced) for 200TU.
FIRE: Grants Burn to all enemies.
EARTH: Grants 1 random non-sleeping enemy Cursed Sleep for 200TU (blocked by Burn).
STORM: Stuns 1 random enemy for 150TU.
DARK: Mega Poisons 1 random non-sleeping enemy for 200TU.
LIGHT: Purifies all allies and heals them for 400% of this unit's Attack.

The chance of these effects triggering increases by 20% for each Awakening this unit has, up to 100% when fully awakened. Successfully applied Status Effects will overwrite existing status effects on affected units.

SetUpToxicSleepOnHitOrHurt.name: Noxious Aura
SetUpToxicSleepOnHitOrHurt.description:
Each time an enemy damages this unit with an attack there is a 50% chance that they are immediately granted Noxious Sleep for 100TU unless they are burning or using an attack that will cause burn. This is not considered a skin effect.

Each time this unit damages a poisoned enemy, that enemy will be granted Noxious Sleep for 100TU. Each time this unit damages a sleeping enemy (including Noxious Sleep), that enemy will be granted Mega Poison for 200TU.

This skill's status effects will not spread if this unit is burning.

ShowHoldGroundTaunt.name: Taunt Active
ShowHoldGroundTaunt.description: This unit is a Guardian for this turn only, and cannot be defeated on this turn. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies on this turn, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to this unit. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. This unit will no longer be considered a Guardian when the taunt ends, so some active skill effects that target Guardians may fail to affect this unit.

ShowOfStrengthPassiveAKintaroRegularBoss.name: Brute Force
ShowOfStrengthPassiveAKintaroRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be stunned or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit cannot fall asleep if there are 2 or more enemies on the battlefield.

Each time this unit damages any number of non-burning enemies with an attack while charged, this unit will spend a charge to get another turn. This effect can trigger again against the same unit. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

While this unit is on the battlefield, whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, add 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks (max of 300% after 3 enemies have entered the battlefield from reinforcements. e.g. Heavy Swing: 700% => 1000% damage after 3 enemies have entered the battlefield from reinforcements, and no allies are sleeping, burning or poisoned).

ShowOfStrengthPassiveAKintaroRegular.name: Brute Force
ShowOfStrengthPassiveAKintaroRegular.description:
This unit cannot be stunned or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit cannot fall asleep if there are 2 or more enemies on the battlefield.

Each time this unit damages any number of non-burning enemies with an attack while charged, this unit will spend a charge to get another turn. This effect can trigger again against the same unit. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

While this unit is on the battlefield, whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, add 100% to the damage % of this unit's attacks (max of 300% after 3 enemies have entered the battlefield from reinforcements. e.g. Heavy Swing: 700% => 1000% damage after 3 enemies have entered the battlefield from reinforcements, and no allies are sleeping, burning or poisoned).

SingleAttackAAnastasiaRegular.name: Cold Steel
SingleAttackAAnastasiaRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each time this skill has damaged a non-sleeping enemy while on the battlefield (max of 750% total damage). Then give 1 other random ally a Monarch Token. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Monarch Tokens cannot stack. Any attack damage will remove Monarch Tokens.

SingleAttackABahamutGirlRegularBoss.name: Meteor Lance
SingleAttackABahamutGirlRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each charge stored by the user (max of 600% total damage). This attack does not consume charges. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. That enemy will also be granted the Burn status effect, and become infected with it.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Burn to a random non-burning unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

SingleAttackABahamutGirlRegular.name: Meteor Lance
SingleAttackABahamutGirlRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each charge stored by the user (max of 600% total damage). This attack does not consume charges. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. That enemy will also be granted the Burn status effect, and become infected with it.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Burn to a random non-burning unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield.
