Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

SingleAttackABeastRegularBoss.name: Beastly Uppercut
SingleAttackABeastRegularBoss.description:
700% damage to 1 enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Then the target hit has its burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

SingleAttackABeastRegular.name: Beastly Uppercut
SingleAttackABeastRegular.description:
700% damage to 1 enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Then the target hit has its burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy.

SingleAttackABeautyRegularBoss.name: Poisonous Axe
SingleAttackABeautyRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. If any enemy on the battlefield is poisoned, deals 600% damage instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

SingleAttackABeautyRegular.name: Poisonous Axe
SingleAttackABeautyRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. If any enemy on the battlefield is poisoned, deals 600% damage instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

SingleAttackACalKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Fire Prism
SingleAttackACalKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user is burning. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning enemies on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

SingleAttackACalKouhaiRegular.name: Dragon Prism
SingleAttackACalKouhaiRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user is burning. This attack heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt, and ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

The user is then granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning enemies on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

SingleAttackAChopinRegularBoss.name: Sharp Note
SingleAttackAChopinRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Then the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

This skill unlocks Broken Chord upon use, and becomes locked after use until the user uses Broken Chord or Grand Finale. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

SingleAttackAChopinRegular.name: Sharp Note
SingleAttackAChopinRegular.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Then the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

This skill unlocks Broken Chord upon use, and becomes locked after use until the user uses Broken Chord or Grand Finale. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges.

SingleAttackADonQuixoteRegularBoss.name: Heated Lance
SingleAttackADonQuixoteRegularBoss.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user is burning. 1000% damage instead if all units on the battlefield are burning. Then another random ally is granted Piercing. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn.

SingleAttackADonQuixoteRegular.name: Heated Lance
SingleAttackADonQuixoteRegular.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user is burning. 1000% damage instead if all units on the battlefield are burning. Then another random ally is granted Piercing. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn.

SingleAttackAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Heated Edge
SingleAttackAElmKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if any unit on the battlefield is burning. This attack ignores Guardians and damage reduction effects.

Then immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn.

SingleAttackAElmKouhaiRegular.name: Cutting Edge
SingleAttackAElmKouhaiRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if any enemy on the battlefield is poisoned or sleeping. This attack ignores Guardians and damage reduction effects.

Then immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn.

SingleAttackAFreyaNew.name: Passionate Cleave
SingleAttackAFreyaNew.description:
250% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 1000% total damage). The user will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used Meteor Call or Tides of War since this skill was last used.

Then heals all allies for 800% of the user's attack, and grant them the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

SingleAttackAKenshinRegularBoss.name: Seasoned Slash
SingleAttackAKenshinRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 random enemy, plus 100% for each time the user has hit a poisoned enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 800% total after hitting 5 poisoned enemies with attacks). This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

SingleAttackAKenshinRegular.name: Unstable Blade
SingleAttackAKenshinRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 random enemy, plus 100% for each time the user has hit a poisoned enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 800% total after hitting 5 poisoned enemies with attacks). This attack ignores Guardians, damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

The user is granted Super Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Super Stealth will overwrite other Status effects. Super Stealthed units ignore enemy attacks that would damage more than 1 target. Super Stealth will be removed after ignoring 3 enemy attacks since applying, and can be overwritten by other status effects, except normal Stealth. Damage will not remove Super Stealth. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.

SingleAttackAKingArthurEvilBoss.name: Infectious Burn
SingleAttackAKingArthurEvilBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each turn the user has gotten and survived until after the end of the turn on the battlefield (max of 600% total damage). That enemy will also be granted the Burn status effect, and become infected with it. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Burn to a random non-burning unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

Burn will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

SingleAttackAKingArthurEvil.name: Infectious Evil
SingleAttackAKingArthurEvil.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each turn the user has gotten and survived until after the end of the turn on the battlefield (max of 600% total damage). If that enemy is not burning, they will also be granted the Lethal Poison status effect, and become infected with it. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Lethal Poison to a random non-burning, non-Lethal Poisoned unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, lasts 999 TU, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison, and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning or Boss units.

SingleAttackAKintaroRegularBoss.name: Heavy Swing
SingleAttackAKintaroRegularBoss.description:
700% damage to 1 enemy. Minus 100% damage for each sleeping, burning or poisoned ally on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 affected allies). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

SingleAttackAKintaroRegular.name: Heavy Swing
SingleAttackAKintaroRegular.description:
700% damage to 1 enemy. Minus 100% damage for each sleeping, burning or poisoned ally on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 affected allies). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 1HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

SingleAttackALupinRegularBoss.name: Shattering Shot
SingleAttackALupinRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, and the user is granted a Charge. This attack ignores Guardians, any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

The user removes all Sleep Wards, Stun Wards, and Poison Wards from the hit target. Usable if the user has Stealth or if The Setup is locked.

SingleAttackAMasamuneRegularBoss.name: Lightning Cut
SingleAttackAMasamuneRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead if the target has 100TU or more. 400% damage instead if the target has 150TU or more. 500% damage instead if the target has 200TU or more. 600% damage instead if the target has 250TU or more. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

SingleAttackAMasamuneRegular.name: Lightning Strike
SingleAttackAMasamuneRegular.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead if the target has 100TU or more. 400% damage instead if the target has 150TU or more. 500% damage instead if the target has 200TU or more. 600% damage instead if the target has 250TU or more. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then if the target is a non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy and had 500TU or more at the start of the turn, they will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect can only trigger 3 times per battle, and will ignore Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

SingleAttackAMechaSisterBandBoss.name: Vocal Warmup
SingleAttackAMechaSisterBandBoss.description:
Targets 1 enemy. This skill will randomly deal either 300%, 600% or 900% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill unlocks Spirited Tune upon use.

When this attack damages a:
- burning enemy, all non-Fire element enemies without Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will be granted the burn status effect at the end of the turn.
- sleeping enemy, all non-poisoned enemies will be granted the Sleep status effect for 100TU at the end of the turn, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- poisoned enemy, all non-sleeping enemies will be granted the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU at the end of the turn.

Burn, Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

SingleAttackAMechaSisterBand.name: Prismatic Voice
SingleAttackAMechaSisterBand.description:
Targets 1 enemy. This skill will randomly deal either 300%, 600% or 900% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill unlocks Spirited Beat upon use.

When this attack damages a:
- burning enemy, all non-Fire element enemies without Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills will be granted the burn status effect at the end of the turn.
- sleeping enemy, all non-poisoned enemies will be granted the Sleep status effect for 100TU at the end of the turn, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield.
- poisoned enemy, all non-sleeping enemies will be granted the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU at the end of the turn.

Burn, Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

SingleAttackAMusashiDarkBoss.name: Oni Claws
SingleAttackAMusashiDarkBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 100% for each time this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield (max of 700% total damage after defeating 4 enemies). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

SingleAttackAMusashiDark.name: Oni Claws

Any damage will remove stealth.

SingleAttackAMyshaKnightBoss.name: Lethal Downfall
SingleAttackAMyshaKnightBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 450% damage instead if the enemy has 1 Guardian on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the enemy has 2+ Guardians on the battlefield. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, if that enemy is not burning, they are granted Lethal Poison for 999TU.

This skill becomes locked after use until the user deals damage with another attack. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

SingleAttackANikeRegularBoss.name: Storm of Blades

300% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then grants the user the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turns.

When a unit with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that unit's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

Then the user will add a Kuromori to a random place in line of enemy reinforcements. This will not trigger if there were no enemy reinforcements at the start of the turn.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects on the affected enemy, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning units or Boss units.

SingleAttackAThorRegularBoss.name: Hammering Blade
SingleAttackAThorRegularBoss.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU or more on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the user has survived 200TU or more on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Then stuns the target for 100TU, then if the hit target has 200TU or more and is not a Stun Absorber, they can no longer be Stunned by Hammering Blade unless they leave the battlefield.

SingleAttackAThorRegular.name: Hammering Blade
SingleAttackAThorRegular.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU or more on the battlefield. 600% damage instead if the user has survived 200TU or more on the battlefield. SingleAttackAVenusRegularBoss.name: Venus Strike
SingleAttackAVenusRegularBoss.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. The enemy hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on that unit. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skins and counter stance.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

SingleAttackAVenusRegular.name: Heartfelt Strike
SingleAttackAVenusRegular.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. Minus 100% damage for each sleeping, burning or poisoned ally on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 affected allies). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Then the target hit will become Weakened, and is granted a Rage ward. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on that unit.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

SingleAttackAVictoriaRegularBoss.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 200% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 900% total damage if this skill has already been used 3 times or more). The first time an enemy is damaged by Disabling Blow since entering the battlefield, it has its Active Skills disabled for 50TU. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

This skill becomes locked after use until the user uses Vaporizing Bolt.

SingleAttackAZeusRegular.name: Disabling Strike

When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping. This effect cannot affect boss units, cannot be purified, and will end if the user is defeated.

This skill unlocks Oblivion Blast upon use, and becomes locked after use until the user uses Oblivion Blast.

SingleHellballASatanRegularBoss.name: Fiery Hellball

The user and target are both granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

Stuns for 50TU one other non-water, burning enemy per Charge stored on the user (max of 3 targets).

The user and target are both granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.

Stuns for 50TU one other non-water, burning enemy per Charge stored on the user (max of 3 targets).

SleepImmuneWhenAloneOrHPAbove50Percent.description: This unit cannot fall asleep if it is above 50% of max HP or is alone on the battlefield.

SleepyExtraTurnACinderellaSwimsuitBoss.name: Water Slaughter
SleepyExtraTurnACinderellaSwimsuitBoss.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

Each time this unit damages a sleeping enemy with an attack, this unit will get another turn. This effect cannot trigger again against the same target until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

When this unit defeats an enemy with an attack, this unit gains Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

SleepyExtraTurnACinderellaSwimsuit.name: Water Slaughter
SleepyExtraTurnACinderellaSwimsuit.description:

SleepyPassiveAPeachGirlRegular.name: Demon Slayer
SleepyPassiveAPeachGirlRegular.description:
This unit cannot be burned, or be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While there is a sleeping or burning enemy on the battlefield, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

The first time this unit is damaged by an attack while it does not have its Active Skills disabled, this unit will have its TU reduced to 0.

This unit's attacks:
- Will not wake sleeping enemies.
- Heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.
- Remove burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from hit targets.
- Then grant hit targets the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This effect cannot trigger if Momotaro has no other allies on the battlefield.

SmallerBuffAMechaSisterBandBoss.name: Spirited Tune
SmallerBuffAMechaSisterBandBoss.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield. This skill unlocks Disabling Music upon use.

Then if ally Spirit is:
- 1+, all allies on the battlefield are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.

- 5+, another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0 at the end of the turn. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used by any affected units until after they have had the turn.
- 10, adds 500% to the damage % of this user's next attack (e.g. Disabling Music: 300% => 800%).

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Vocal Warmup. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

SmallerBuffAMechaSisterBand.name: Spirited Beat
SmallerBuffAMechaSisterBand.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally on the battlefield. This skill unlocks Disabling Chorus upon use.

Then if ally Spirit is:
- At least 1, all allies on the battlefield are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of the turn.
- At least 5, also another random ally is given the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0 at the end of the turn. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill.
- At 10, also adds 500% to the damage % of this user's next attack (e.g. Disabling Chorus: 300% => 800% damage when Center Stage has not been used 3 times).

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Prismatic Voice. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

SneakAttackDoubleSJeanneDarkSwim.name: Stealth Ravager
SneakAttackDoubleSJeanneDarkSwim.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackDrainDoubleAOssiaDarkBoss.name: Stealth Drain
SneakAttackDrainDoubleAOssiaDarkBoss.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies and heals the user for 10% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackDrainFastA.name: Stealth Drain
SneakAttackDrainFastA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackDrainFastATwinGod.name: Moonlight Arrow
SneakAttackDrainFastATwinGod.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. If damage is dealt, the user is healed for 50% of max HP. The user will also Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackDrainSingleAOssiaDarkBoss.name: Stealth Drain
SneakAttackDrainSingleAOssiaDarkBoss.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackFastA.name: Stealth Impact
SneakAttackFastA.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackFastARoundTableKnightBoss.name: Stealth Raid
SneakAttackFastARoundTableKnightBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackFormationA.name: Stealth Ambush
SneakAttackFormationA.description: 400% damage to 2 enemies. Usable only if 4 allies have the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackSingleBoss1.name: Stealth Fury
SneakAttackSingleBoss1.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackSlayerbaneA.name: Stealth Avenger
SneakAttackSlayerbaneA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage against units that have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakAttackSuperA.name: Stealth Fury+
SneakAttackSuperA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakNonBurningAttackSKaguyahimeBoss.name: Gravity Cannon
SneakNonBurningAttackSKaguyahimeBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy that is not burning. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakNonBurningAttackSKaguyahime.name: Gravity Cannon
SneakNonBurningAttackSKaguyahime.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. Usable if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SneakStanceAttackDrainDoubleAOssiaDark.name: Aeon Bane
SneakStanceAttackDrainDoubleAOssiaDark.description: 300% damage to 2 enemies and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable only if the user has the Stealth or Counter Stance status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

SometimesLuckyBuffAGenieRegularBoss.name: Kind of Powerful?
SometimesLuckyBuffAGenieRegularBoss.description:
This unit has a 33% chance to:

- have its TU reduced to 0 after dealing damage with an Attack (1 chance per hit).
- each turn, survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.
- ignore the incoming status effects Poison, and Burn.
- ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.
- enrage 1 random ally at the end of each turn.
- weaken 1 random enemy at the end of each turn.

The chance for each effect is determined independently each time they may occur. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

SometimesLuckyBuffAGenieRegular.name: All Powerful?
SometimesLuckyBuffAGenieRegular.description:
This unit has a 33% chance to:

- have its TU reduced to 0 after dealing damage with an Attack (1 chance per hit).
- each turn, survive any damage that would defeat it with 1HP.
- ignore the incoming status effects Sleep, Poison, and Burn.
- ignore incoming Stun effects.
- ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.
- enrage 1 random ally at the end of each turn.
- weaken 1 random enemy at the end of each turn.

The chance for each effect is determined independently each time they may occur. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

SpecialAllAttackAMasamuneRegularBoss.name: Cloudbreaker
SpecialAllAttackAMasamuneRegularBoss.description: 500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SpecialAllAttackAMasamuneRegular.name: Skybreaker
SpecialAllAttackAMasamuneRegular.description: 500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SpecialAllAttackAPerryRegularBoss.name: Crashing Anchor
SpecialAllAttackAPerryRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead to sleeping targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

SpecialAllAttackAPerryRegular.name: Crashing Anchor
SpecialAllAttackAPerryRegular.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 500% damage instead to sleeping targets. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

SpecialAllAttackAPinocchioRegularBoss.name: Memory Strike
SpecialAllAttackAPinocchioRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead to targets that are burning. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use.

SpecialAllAttackAPinocchioRegular.name: Memory Collapse
SpecialAllAttackAPinocchioRegular.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead to targets that are poisoned. 600% damage instead to targets that have the Mega Poison status effect. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Lethal Poison status effect. All non-sleeping enemies hit are then granted Mega Poison for 200TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

SpecialAllAttackARizKouhaiBoss.name: Silver Sky Slash
SpecialAllAttackARizKouhaiBoss.description: 500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

SpecialAllAttackARizKouhai.name: Silver Sky Slash
SpecialAllAttackARizKouhai.description: 500% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Locked for 100TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and becomes locked for 100TU after use.

SpecialAllAttackAVenusRegularBoss.name: Waves of Love
SpecialAllAttackAVenusRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead if the user has survived 100TU or more on the battlefield. 500% damage instead if the user has survived 200TU or more on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

SpecialAttackAAnastasiaRegularBoss.name: Tundra Slash
SpecialAttackAAnastasiaRegularBoss.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SpecialAttackAAnastasiaRegular.name: Blizzard Slash
SpecialAttackAAnastasiaRegular.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy. 700% damage instead if the user has survived 200TU+ on the battlefield. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield. This lock is ignored while all enemies on the battlefield are sleeping, burning or frostburned.

SpecialAttackACalKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Dual Destruction
SpecialAttackACalKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
700% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Usable only if 2 or more units on the same team are burning. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

SpecialAttackACalKouhaiRegular.name: Dual Destruction
SpecialAttackACalKouhaiRegular.description:
700% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Usable only if 2 or more units on the same team are burning. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

SpecialAttackADonQuixoteRegularBoss.name: Lance Throw
SpecialAttackADonQuixoteRegularBoss.description: 1000% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. Usable once per battle.

SpecialAttackADonQuixoteRegular.name: Lance Cannon
SpecialAttackADonQuixoteRegular.description: 1000% damage to 1 enemy, and exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. This attack ignores effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less. Usable 3 times per battle.

SpecialAttackAKongmingRegularBoss.name: Staff Slam
SpecialAttackAKongmingRegularBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that were Burning at the start of the turn. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

SpecialAttackAKongmingRegular.name: Dragon Slam
SpecialAttackAKongmingRegular.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost. 600% damage instead if the user has 3 Charges. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that were Burning at the start of the turn. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user's HP is at 50% or less.

SpecialAttackARizetteBraveBoss.name: Cerulean Blade
SpecialAttackARizetteBraveBoss.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each non-conjured unit on the battlefield defeated or sacrificed by any source since this unit entered the battlefield (max of 750% total damage after 3 non-conjured units have been defeated). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

SpecialAttackARizetteBrave.name: Cerulean Blade
SpecialAttackARizetteBrave.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each non-conjured unit on the battlefield defeated or sacrificed by any source since this unit entered the battlefield (max of 750% total damage after 3 non-conjured units have been defeated). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

SpecialAttackASnowWhiteNewBoss.name: Dark Reckoning
SpecialAttackASnowWhiteNewBoss.description:
800% damage to 2 random enemies. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, and enemy damage reduction effects. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Unlocked after 5 or more units (including ephemeral ally units) on the battlefield are defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield.

SpecialAttackASnowWhiteNew.name: Dark Reckoning
SpecialAttackASnowWhiteNew.description:
800% damage to 2 random enemies. This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated, and enemy damage reduction effects. This attack can hit targets that have the Stealth Status Effect or a passive effect that ignores multiple target attacks.

Unlocked after 5 or more units (including ephemeral ally units) on the battlefield are defeated or sacrificed by any source while this unit is on the battlefield.

SpecialAttackAThorRegularBoss.name: Thundering Wrath
SpecialAttackAThorRegularBoss.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Usable if the user is not a Guardian, and only 3 times per battle.

SpecialAttackAThorRegular.name: Thundering Wrath
SpecialAttackAThorRegular.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Usable if the user is not a Guardian, and only 3 times per battle.

SpecialAttackAZeusRegularBoss.name: Vaporizing Bolt
SpecialAttackAZeusRegularBoss.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if the target has 100TU or more. 900% damage instead if the target has 200TU or more. 1200% damage instead if the target has 400TU or more. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Disabling Blow. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

SpecialAttackAZeusRegular.name: Oblivion Blast
SpecialAttackAZeusRegular.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy. 600% damage instead if the target has 100TU or more. 900% damage instead if the target has 200TU or more. 1200% damage instead if the target has 400TU or more. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Disabling Strike. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

SpecialBuffAMechaSisterBandBoss.name: Spotlight Stage
SpecialBuffAMechaSisterBandBoss.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 5% of their max HP, and grant them the Armor status effect.

This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

SpecialBuffAMechaSisterBand.name: Center Stage
SpecialBuffAMechaSisterBand.description:
Heals all allies on the battlefield for 1000% of the user's attack, and Fortifies them.

Usable only if the user is not alone, and 1 or more allies on the battlefield are not Fortified. Usable 3 times per battle.

A Fortified unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. This reduction cannot be ignored by attacks that do not specifically ignore Fortify. Fortify will be removed after reducing damage 3 times since applying, and will be reset if reapplied. This is not a status effect.

SpecialDoubleAttackAOniSchoolDarkBoss.name: Toxic Finish
SpecialDoubleAttackAOniSchoolDarkBoss.description: 350% damage to 2 enemies. 600% damage instead to targets that are poisoned. All non-poisoned enemies hit are then granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Destructive Reign or Oni Blast. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill unlocks Demonic Dissent after use.

SpecialDoubleAttackAOniSchoolDark.name: Toxic Finale
SpecialDoubleAttackAOniSchoolDark.description: 350% damage to 2 enemies. 700% damage instead to targets that are poisoned. All non-poisoned enemies hit are then granted Lethal Poison for 999TU. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Toxic Reign or Demon Blast. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. This skill unlocks Demonic Defiance after use.

SpecialDoubleAttackAPeachGirlRegularBoss.name: Split Peach
SpecialDoubleAttackAPeachGirlRegularBoss.description: 800% damage to 2 enemies, and the user will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Minus 100% damage for each enemy on the battlefield that is not poisoned (max of -400% if 4 enemies are not poisoned). If this attack damages a target, the user's Power Charge is consumed. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

SpecialDoubleAttackAPeachGirlRegular.name: Peachburst
SpecialDoubleAttackAPeachGirlRegular.description: 800% damage to 2 enemies, and the user will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack. Minus 100% damage for each enemy on the battlefield that is not burning or sleeping (max of -400% if 4 enemies are not burning or sleeping). If this attack damages a target, the user's Power Charge is consumed. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Usable only if the user has a Power Charge.

SpecialDoubleAttackARolotiaDarkBoss.name: Magical Shatter
SpecialDoubleAttackARolotiaDarkBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping or poisoned. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Cursed Sleep or Lethal Poison status effects. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. All non-burning, non-poisoned, non-sleeping enemies hit are then randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

SpecialDoubleAttackARolotiaDark.name: Magical Ruin
SpecialDoubleAttackARolotiaDark.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies if they are sleeping or poisoned. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Cursed Sleep or Lethal Poison status effects. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. All non-burning, non-poisoned, non-sleeping enemies hit are then randomly granted either Cursed Sleep for 200TU or Lethal Poison for 999TU.

SpecialDoubleAttackAVenusRegular.name: Divine Kiss
SpecialDoubleAttackAVenusRegular.description:
300% damage to 2 enemies, plus 100% for each 100TU the user has survived on the battlefield (800% max after 500TU). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, skin passive skills, and the Counter Stance status effect.

When this attack hits a Charmed, non-boss, non-Ephemeral target and that target has 10% or less of max HP remaining after damage, that target is immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

SpecialSingleAttackABeautyRegularBoss.name: Buzzsaw Axe
SpecialSingleAttackABeautyRegularBoss.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Mega Poison status effect or the Lethal Poison status effect. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

If damage from this attack defeats a non-Ephemeral enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

Usable if any ally on the battlefield has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

SpecialSingleAttackABeautyRegular.name: Buzzsaw Axe
SpecialSingleAttackABeautyRegular.description:
600% damage to 1 enemy. 800% damage instead to targets that have the Mega Poison status effect or the Lethal Poison status effect. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

If damage from this attack defeats a non-Ephemeral enemy, another random non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemy on the battlefield will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the random enemy from being defeated.

Usable if any ally on the battlefield has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

SpiritAdjustmentDarna.name: Chaos Skin
SpiritAdjustmentDarna.description: When this unit is dealt damage by an enemy attack, if the attacker has 50% or more health, this unit gains 2 spirit. If the attacker has less than 50% health, this unit loses 2 spirit.

SpiritBlastAHijikataRegularBoss.name: Spirit Blast
SpiritBlastAHijikataRegularBoss.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and allies randomly gain either 2, 4 or 8 Spirit. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

SpiritBlastAHijikataRegular.name: Spirit Blast
SpiritBlastAHijikataRegular.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and allies randomly gain either 3, 5 or 9 Spirit. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

SpiritDrainDamageReduction.name: Tempered Envy
SpiritDrainDamageReduction.description:
This unit steals 1 Spirit from the enemy team whenever this unit deals damage with an attack. Attacks that target multiple enemies will trigger this once for each enemy they damage.

This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks unless this unit has defeated an enemy while on the battlefield.

SpiritedHoldGroundAZoroRegularBoss.name: Blade Resolve
SpiritedHoldGroundAZoroRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured unit on the battlefield with an attack:
- All allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).

SpiritedHoldGroundAZoroRegular.name: Steel Resolve
SpiritedHoldGroundAZoroRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect.

This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time a unit gets the turn while their team has 5+ Spirit, this unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured unit on the battlefield with an attack:
- All allies will be healed for 100% of their max HP.
- All allies will have Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) removed.

SpiritGainOnHitA.name: Augment: Spirit
SpiritGainOnHitA.description: Allies gain 1 Spirit whenever this unit deals damage with an attack. Attacks that target multiple enemies will trigger this once for each enemy they damage.

SpiritGainRageNoKillsA.name: Killer Instinct
SpiritGainRageNoKillsA.description: Allies gain 3 Spirit and this unit becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. Triggered after each turn this unit takes unless it has defeated an enemy while on the battlefield. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills.

SpitfireA.name: Triple Strike
SpitfireA.description: 150% damage to 1 enemy. This skill activates 3 times in succession before its TU cost is applied. This attack ignores guardians.

StartOfBattlePassiveAThorRegularBoss.name: Lord of Thunder
StartOfBattlePassiveAThorRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit will become a Guardian for 100TU:
- When this unit enters the battlefield.
- Each time this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield.

This unit cannot become a Guardian from other skills.

While this unit is a Guardian:
- It has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- This unit has Stun and Sleep immunity.

While this unit is not a Guardian, this unit has 0.5x of their original Attack added to their Attack while they are not Enraged. This increase will stack with other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.5x => 2.0x total).

For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

StartOfBattlePassiveAThorRegular.name: God of Thunder
StartOfBattlePassiveAThorRegular.description:
This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt. This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit enters battle with an Instant Death Ward. An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

This unit will become a Guardian for 100TU:
- When this unit enters the battlefield.
- Each time this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield.

This unit cannot become a Guardian from other skills.

While this unit is a Guardian:
- It has 50% damage reduction from attacks.
- This unit has Stun and Sleep immunity.
- Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 100% of its max HP.

While this unit is not a Guardian, this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while this unit is a Guardian, this unit has a 100% chance to redirect 1 hit to itself instead. This unit will not redirect skills that don't deal damage.

StaticBarrierPassiveAMechaSisterNew.name: Quantum Barrier
StaticBarrierPassiveAMechaSisterNew.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield. When another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains Endure.

Whenever an enemy hits a non-Guardian ally with an attack, they will be Stunned for 50TU for each non-Guardian ally hit.

All other allies gain 35% damage reduction from attacks while this unit is on the battlefield. This effect can stack with other damage reduction effects such as Armor, but will not stack with itself or other ally Barrier type skills.

StealthAllyA.name: Grant Stealth
StealthAllyA.description: Grants the Stealth status effect to 1 ally. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthAllyAllRevengeAWater.name: Stealth Revenge
StealthAllyAllRevengeAWater.description: Whenever this unit is defeated by an enemy, all allies gain the Stealth status effect if there is at least 1 other Water ally. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthAllyB.name: Grant Stealth
StealthAllyB.description: Grants the Stealth status effect to 1 ally. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthAllyDoubleA.name: Grant Stealth
StealthAllyDoubleA.description: Grants the Stealth status effect to 2 allies. This will overwrite other status effects on these units. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthAllyDoubleAWater.name: Grant Stealth
StealthAllyDoubleAWater.description: Grants the Stealth status effect to 2 allies. Usable if there is at least 1 other Water ally. Stealth will overwrite other status effects on target units. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthAllySacA.name: Smoke Screen
StealthAllySacA.description: Sacrifices the user to grant the Stealth status effect to 1 ally. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthAllyWaterA.name: Stealth Charge
StealthAllyWaterA.description: Grants the Stealth status effect to 1 ally. Usable only if there is at least 1 other Water ally. Stealth will overwrite other status effects on target unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthBlastACinderellaSwimsuitBoss.name: Stealth Blast
StealthBlastACinderellaSwimsuitBoss.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthBlastACinderellaSwimsuit.name: Stealth Blast
StealthBlastACinderellaSwimsuit.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 300% damage instead every second time this skill is activated while on the battlefield. The user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthBloodfuryAGokuBrideBoss.name: Stealth Rampage
StealthBloodfuryAGokuBrideBoss.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has defeated 1+ enemies with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect.

StealthBloodfuryAGokuBride.name: Stealth Rampage
StealthBloodfuryAGokuBride.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has defeated 1+ enemies with attacks while on the battlefield. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect.

Stealth.name: Stealth
Stealth.description: Status Effect: The next time an enemy does an attack that targets multiple allies including this unit, the damage to this unit is negated. This effect will be removed if this unit takes damage. Other status effects will override this one. Stealth has no effect on skills that don't deal damage.

StealthFuryAHijikataRegularBoss.name: Stealth Ravager
StealthFuryAHijikataRegularBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

StealthFuryAHijikataRegular.name: Stealth Punisher
StealthFuryAHijikataRegular.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each ally that has the Stealth status effect. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills.

StealthFuryAOkitaRegularBoss.name: Trinity Thrust
StealthFuryAOkitaRegularBoss.description:
75% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has stealth. Then the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthFuryAOkitaRegular.name: Trinity Thrust
StealthFuryAOkitaRegular.description:
75% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user has stealth. Then the user is granted Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

StealthOverdriveAHijikataRegularBoss.name: Excessive Force
StealthOverdriveAHijikataRegularBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect, and allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

StealthOverdriveAHijikataRegular.name: Excessive Force
StealthOverdriveAHijikataRegular.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect, and allies have 6 or more Spirit. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

StealthPassiveAMyshaKnightBoss.name: Random Stealth
StealthPassiveAMyshaKnightBoss.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies.

This unit enters battle with Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

At the end of each other ally turn, a random ally is granted Stealth and healed for 1% of max HP.

StealthPassiveAMyshaKnight.name: Stealth Champion
StealthPassiveAMyshaKnight.description:
This unit's attacks will not wake sleeping enemies, and heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit enters battle with Super Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Whenever this unit enters battle from reinforcements, all ally Imposters on the battlefield are defeated at the end of the next turn. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the targets from being defeated.

At the end of each turn, this unit grants a random non-burning, non-stealthed ally on the battlefield the Super Stealth status effect. Then a random Stealthed ally will heal for 30% of their max HP. These effects cannot trigger if Mysha has no other allies on the battlefield.

At the end of each other ally turn, if all ally units on the battlefield have Stealth, this unit will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0, then this effect cannot trigger again until 20TU advances.

StealthSelfHealA.name: Healing Stealth
StealthSelfHealA.description: Grants the Stealth status effect to the user and heals them for 50% of Max HP. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Usable if the user does not have the Stealth status effect.

StealthSelfSummonTokenADeath.name: Stealth Call
StealthSelfSummonTokenADeath.description: Grants the Stealth status effect to the user and adds 1 Kuromori to the very end of the allied reinforcements. This will overwrite other status effects on that unit. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Usable if the user does not have the Stealth status effect.

StealthShieldAlliesAJeanneDarkSwimBoss.name: Stealth Zone
StealthShieldAlliesAJeanneDarkSwimBoss.description:
Each ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill is healed for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack, becomes Enraged, and gains Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each other affected ally. Cannot be used if the user already has both Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

-Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.
-Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.
-Stealth will overwrite other status effects on affected units. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on affected units.

StealthShieldAlliesAJeanneDarkSwim.name: Stealth Zone
StealthShieldAlliesAJeanneDarkSwim.description:
Each ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill is healed for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack, becomes Enraged, and gains Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Allies gain 3 Spirit for each other affected ally. Cannot be used if the user already has both Stealth and a Stealth Shield.

-Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.
-Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying.
-Stealth will overwrite other status effects on affected units. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.
-Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on affected units.

StealthShieldSelfAJeanneDarkSwimBoss.name: Shielded Stealth
StealthShieldSelfAJeanneDarkSwimBoss.description: The user is healed for HP equal to 500% of the user's Attack, becomes Enraged, and gains Stealth with a Stealth Shield. Usable only if the user does not have both Stealth and a Stealth Shield. Stealth Shield prevents the next non-stealth status effect the user would gain while Stealthed from applying.

StealthStrikeAllyTurnAGoemonRegularBoss.name: Stealth Flank
StealthStrikeAllyTurnAGoemonRegularBoss.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy, and immediately gives 1 other random ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.

StealthStrikeAllyTurnAGoemonRegular.name: Stealth Flank
StealthStrikeAllyTurnAGoemonRegular.description:
400% damage to 1 enemy, and immediately gives 1 other random ally with a Stealth Strike type active skill the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Usable only if the user has the Stealth status effect. This attack ignores any enemy status effects, damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

Stealth Strike type active skills are any skills that are unlocked while their user has Stealth.

StealthStunStrikeAKingArthurSwimsuitBoss.name: Regal Barrage
StealthStunStrikeAKingArthurSwimsuitBoss.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage instead if the user has stealth. Heals the user for 50% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

StealthStunStrikeAKingArthurSwimsuit.name: Regal Barrage
StealthStunStrikeAKingArthurSwimsuit.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage instead if the user has stealth. Heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. This is considered a Stealth Strike type skill.

StealthTurnRepriseAHijikataRegularBoss.name: Demonic Reprise
StealthTurnRepriseAHijikataRegularBoss.description:
Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while its TU is 100 or less and survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Then this unit will gain Stealth, even if it survived with 1HP. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

This unit enters battle with 3 Charges. If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead. Whenever a Stealthed ally gets the turn, this unit gains 1 charge at the end of the turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

StealthyPoisonPassiveAKaguyahimeDarkBoss.name: Moon's Shadow
StealthyPoisonPassiveAKaguyahimeDarkBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit enters battle with Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has the Stealth status effect.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements and when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack:
- All enemies are Stunned for 50TU.
- All enemies are granted Mega Poison for 200TU, this will overwrite other status effects on those units.

StealthyPoisonPassiveAKaguyahimeDark.name: Moon's Shadow
StealthyPoisonPassiveAKaguyahimeDark.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit enters battle with Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

This unit has 65% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has the Stealth status effect.

Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements and when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack:
- All enemies are Stunned for 50TU.
- All enemies are granted Mega Poison for 200TU, this will overwrite other status effects on those units.

StormAllyPassiveAMasamuneRegularBoss.name: Lightning Bearer
StormAllyPassiveAMasamuneRegularBoss.description:
Enemy units that deal damage to this unit get stunned for 100TU, this is a Skin effect.

Heals the user for 1% of total damage dealt. This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Grants all enemies 3 Discharge Counters. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements they will be granted 3 Discharge Counters. A unit can store a maximum of 3 Discharge Counters, and all are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

When this unit hits an enemy with any Discharge Counters with an attack, they will be stunned for:
- 300TU if they have 3 Discharge Counters
- 200TU if they have 2 Discharge Counters
- 100TU if they have 1 Discharge Counter
Then, the hit enemy will have 1 Discharge Counter removed.

StormAllyPassiveAMasamuneRegular.name: Lightning Wielder
StormAllyPassiveAMasamuneRegular.description:
Enemy units that deal damage to this unit get stunned for 100TU, this is a Skin effect.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt. This unit is not affected by stun effects and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Grants all enemies 3 Discharge Counters. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements they will be granted 3 Discharge Counters. A unit can store a maximum of 3 Discharge Counters, and all are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

When this unit hits an enemy with any Discharge Counters with an attack, they will be stunned for:
- 300TU if they have 3 Discharge Counters
- 200TU if they have 2 Discharge Counters
- 100TU if they have 1 Discharge Counter
Then, the hit enemy will have 1 Discharge Counter removed.

StoryCharacterAttackBoost.name: Hero ATK & HP Up
StoryCharacterAttackBoost.description: Allied units named Finn, Rizette, Ludmilla, Nagi, Astrid, Ga'Luga, Mysha, Theo, and Elmina have their Attack increased by 12% and max HP increased by 8%.
