StrongHidePassiveABeastRegularBoss.name: Morphean Dreamers
StrongHidePassiveABeastRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep, or be stunned.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements:
- All enemies on the battlefield are granted Mega Poison for 200TU.
- All Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will have their TU reduced to 0, and be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- Then this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, all Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will immediately have their TU reduced to 0. This is not a skin effect.

When this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield, at the end of the turn:
- This unit steals Spirit from the enemy team until enemy Spirit reaches 0.
- All Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will have their TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.
- Then this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.
Effects that influence TU order may interrupt these extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

StrongHidePassiveABeastRegular.name: Morphean Dreamers
StrongHidePassiveABeastRegular.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep, or be stunned.

Whenever this unit enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements:
- All enemies on the battlefield are granted Mega Poison for 200TU.
- All Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will have their TU reduced to 0, and be Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- Then this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, all Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will immediately have their TU reduced to 0. This is not a skin effect.

When this unit defeats any number of enemies with an attack while on the battlefield, at the end of the turn:
- This unit steals Spirit from the enemy team until enemy Spirit reaches 0.
- All Earth allies named Belle or "Beauty & Beast, Pair of Morphean Flowers" on the battlefield will have their TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.
- Then this unit will immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0, and be Purified.
Effects that influence TU order may interrupt these extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

StrongPassiveSnowWhiteNewBoss.name: Dark and Light
StrongPassiveSnowWhiteNewBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with Super Stealth. At the end of each of this unit's turns, this unit is granted Super Stealth.

This unit has 30% damage reduction, plus 10% for each ally Mori on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements (max of 70% while 4 Moris are on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements).

If this unit is below 25% of max HP at the end of a turn, and there is a Mori at the very end of allied reinforcements, that Mori will be sacrificed and all allies will be healed for 5% of max HP.

StrongPassiveSnowWhiteNew.name: Black and White
StrongPassiveSnowWhiteNew.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

This unit enters battle with a Burn Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Super Stealth. At the end of each of this unit's turns, this unit is granted a Burn Ward, Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and Super Stealth. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

Each time this unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 25% of its max HP for each ally on the battlefield (max of 100% if 4 allies are on the battlefield).

This unit has 30% damage reduction, plus 10% for each ally Mori on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements (max of 70% while 4 Moris are on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements).

If this unit is below 50% of max HP at the end of a turn, and there is a Mori at the very end of allied reinforcements, that Mori will be sacrificed and all allies will be healed for 100% of max HP and become Enraged. Then this unit will have its TU reduced to 0. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on those units. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

StrongQueenACleopatraDarkBoss.name: Cold Blood
StrongQueenACleopatraDarkBoss.description:
Unless this unit is burning, this unit has 75% damage reduction from attacks.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

StrongQueenACleopatraDark.name: Cold Blooded
StrongQueenACleopatraDark.description:
Unless this unit is burning, this unit has 75% damage reduction from attacks and is immune to Stun effects.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

StrongSingleAttackAElminaModernBoss.name: CODE: DELETE
StrongSingleAttackAElminaModernBoss.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 750% total damage). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

StrongSingleAttackAElminaModern.name: CODE: DELETE
StrongSingleAttackAElminaModern.description: 300% damage to 1 enemy, plus 150% for each Charge stored on the user (max of 750% total damage). This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

StunAbsorberBlockDeathOnceWhenHurtArmorS.name: Superconductor
StunAbsorberBlockDeathOnceWhenHurtArmorS.description:
This unit is a Stun Absorber. Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead.

If this unit takes damage from an attack while it does not have Endure and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

This unit gains the Armor status effect at the very start of the battle if it is on the battlefield. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

StunKingStrikeAKingArthurSwimsuitBoss.name: Regal Clobbering
StunKingStrikeAKingArthurSwimsuitBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 enemy, Weakens them (reduces their Attack to 0.75x until the end of their next turn), and Stuns them for 100TU. This attack ignores damage reduction effects. The user is granted a Poison Ward, Stealth, and a Stealth Shield.

Weak will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

Summon1MinionHealWhenHurtADeath.name: Hallowed Healing
Summon1MinionHealWhenHurtADeath.description: If this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of max HP and add 1 Kuromori to the very back of allied reinforcements.

SummonJeanneBrideA.name: Holy Revival
SummonJeanneBrideA.description: Revives the Jeanne d'Arc that conjured the user to next in line of allied reinforcements with full HP, then exchanges 1 other ally with her if there are already 4 allies on the battlefield. Usable only if there is at least 1 other ally on the battlefield, and there is not already a Storm ally Jeanne d'Arc on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements. The revived Jeanne d'Arc will be considered a conjured unit.

SummonJeanneDarkBossSacA.name: Unholy Revival
SummonJeanneDarkBossSacA.description: Sacrifices the user to revive the Mega Dark Jeanne that conjured the user to the battlefield with full HP. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield. The revived Mega Dark Jeanne will be considered a conjured unit.

SummonJeanneDarkSacA.name: Unholy Revival
SummonJeanneDarkSacA.description: Sacrifices the user to revive the Dark Jeanne that conjured the user to the battlefield with full HP. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield. The revived Dark Jeanne will be considered a conjured unit.

SummonMassTokenAWaterTiamat.name: Genesis
SummonMassTokenAWaterTiamat.description: Allies gain 3 Spirit, then adds a number of Suimori's to the next in line of ally reinforcements equal to Ally Spirit (Max 10). The user becomes Enraged, having its Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills. Usable once per battle.

SummonMinionOnPoisonedHitADeath.name: Poison Reaping
SummonMinionOnPoisonedHitADeath.description: Adds 1 Kuromori to the very end of allied reinforcements. Triggered when this unit deals damage to a poisoned enemy with an attack.

SummonSnowBlackBrideBossSacA01.name: Dark Transformation
SummonSnowBlackBrideBossSacA01.description:
The user transforms into Berserk Snow Black. Berserk Snow Black's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, Accessory and remaining HP will match the user. Berserk Snow Black will be treated as a new conjured unit, and is considered to have entered the battlefield upon transformation.

Locked until a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Berserk Snow White cannot activate any other active skills while this skill is unlocked. When a unit transforms, it is not considered to have been defeated or sacrificed.

SummonSnowBlackBrideBossSacA.name: Dark Transformation
SummonSnowBlackBrideBossSacA.description:
The user transforms into Mega Snow Black. Mega Snow Black's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, Accessory and remaining HP will match the user. Mega Snow Black will be treated as a new conjured unit, and is considered to have entered the battlefield upon transformation.

Locked until a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Mega Snow White cannot activate any other active skills while this skill is unlocked. When a unit transforms, it is not considered to have been defeated or sacrificed.

SummonSnowBlackBrideSacA.name: Dark Transformation
SummonSnowBlackBrideSacA.description:
The user transforms into Snow Black. Snow Black's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match the user. Snow Black will start with full HP, will be treated as a new conjured unit, and is considered to have entered the battlefield upon transformation.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield, or until a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Snow White cannot activate any other active skills while this skill is unlocked. When a unit transforms, it is not considered to have been defeated or sacrificed.

SummonSnowWhiteBrideBossSacA01.name: Light Transformation
SummonSnowWhiteBrideBossSacA01.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. The user transforms back into Berserk Snow White. Berserk Snow White's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, Accessory and remaining HP will match the user. Berserk Snow White will be treated as a new conjured unit, and is considered to have entered the battlefield upon transformation.

Locked until a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Berserk Snow Black cannot activate any other active skills while this skill is unlocked. When a unit transforms, it is not considered to have been defeated or sacrificed.

SummonSnowWhiteBrideBossSacA.name: Light Transformation
SummonSnowWhiteBrideBossSacA.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. The user transforms back into Mega Snow White. Mega Snow White's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, Accessory and remaining HP will match the user. Mega Snow White will be treated as a new conjured unit, and is considered to have entered the battlefield upon transformation.

Locked until a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Mega Snow Black cannot activate any other active skills while this skill is unlocked. When a unit transforms, it is not considered to have been defeated or sacrificed.

SummonSnowWhiteBrideSacA.name: Light Transformation
SummonSnowWhiteBrideSacA.description:
Stuns 1 enemy for 150TU and the user transforms back into Snow White. Snow White will return with full HP, will be treated as a new conjured unit, and is considered to have entered the battlefield upon transformation.

Locked until a non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. Snow Black cannot activate any other active skills while this skill is unlocked. When a unit transforms, it is not considered to have been defeated or sacrificed.

SummonStrikeHealAFreyaBoss.name: Conjured Force
SummonStrikeHealAFreyaBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals allies for 300% of the user's Attack if damage is dealt. Usable if there is a conjured ally on the battlefield.

SummonSweepAExcaliburRegularBoss.name: Mori Sweep
SummonSweepAExcaliburRegularBoss.description: Damage to all enemies. Adds 3 Super Kuromoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements, and the user's Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on the user.

SummonSweepAExcaliburRegular.name: Mori Sweep
SummonSweepAExcaliburRegular.description: Damage to all enemies. Adds 3 Super Kuromoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements, and the user's Attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of its next turn. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on the user.

SuperBuffKingArthur.name: King's Dawn
SuperBuffKingArthur.description:
This unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x.
This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 50%.
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

All of these effects are triggered when this unit begins on the battlefield at the very start of battle, and will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. This unit cannot be sent away from the battlefield during an ally turn.

-This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.
-This will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

SuperBuffPlusKingArthur.name: King's Dawn+
SuperBuffPlusKingArthur.description:
This unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x.
This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 50%.
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

All of these effects are triggered when this unit begins on the battlefield at the very start of battle, and will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

-This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.
-This will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

SuperModeAElminaModernBoss.name: Elmina Unleashed
SuperModeAElminaModernBoss.description: The user Unleashes for 100TU. If the user is conjured, the user will unleash for 50TU instead. While Unleashed, this unit heals for 1% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and has its Attack increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

SuperModeAElminaModern.name: Limiter Release
SuperModeAElminaModern.description: The user will Overclock for 150TU. If the user is conjured, the user will Overclock for 75TU instead. While Overclocked, this unit heals for 25% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and has its Attack increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects. This skill can only be used once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

SuperPurifierARapunzelRegularBoss.name: Golden Purify
SuperPurifierARapunzelRegularBoss.description:
Removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison from 1 other ally and grants them either a Sleep Ward or Poison Ward at random. If a status effect is removed by this skill, the user is Enraged. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each status effect removed by this skill. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.

SuperPurifierARapunzelRegular.name: Golden Purify
SuperPurifierARapunzelRegular.description:
Removes negative status effects like Sleep, Burn or Poison from 2 other allies and grants them either a Sleep Ward or Poison Ward at random. If a status effect is removed by this skill, the user is Enraged. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each status effect removed by this skill. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. Cannot be used if the user is alone on the battlefield, and will not remove negative status effects from the user if they are targeted.

SuperStealthPT1.name: Super Stealth
SuperStealthPT1.description: Status Effect: The next time an enemy does an attack that targets multiple allies including this unit, the damage to this unit is negated. Other status effects, except normal Stealth, will override this one. Stealth has no effect on skills that don't deal damage.

SuperStealthPT2.name: Super Stealth
SuperStealthPT2.description: Status Effect: The next 2 times an enemy does an attack that targets multiple allies including this unit, the damage to this unit is negated. Other status effects, except normal Stealth, will override this one. Stealth has no effect on skills that don't deal damage.

SuperStealthPT3.name: Super Stealth
SuperStealthPT3.description: Status Effect: The next 3 times an enemy does an attack that targets multiple allies including this unit, the damage to this unit is negated. Other status effects, except normal Stealth, will override this one. Stealth has no effect on skills that don't deal damage.

SuperStealthReincarnationOtohimeBoss.name: Deadly Revival
SuperStealthReincarnationOtohimeBoss.description:
If this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, revive this unit to the very front of allied reinforcements with full HP when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. The revived unit will be considered a conjured unit and cannot be revived again. Use limits on active skills will be reset for the revived unit. This is not a Revenge passive skill.

If this unit is conjured, its attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, until it defeats an enemy that isn't a Mori or Imposter with an attack.

This unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

SuperStealthReincarnationOtohime.name: Deadly Revival
SuperStealthReincarnationOtohime.description:
If this unit has defeated an enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, revive this unit to the very front of allied reinforcements with full HP when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. The revived unit will be considered a conjured unit and cannot be revived again. Use limits on active skills will be reset for the revived unit. This is not a Revenge passive skill.

If this unit is conjured, its attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, until it defeats an enemy that isn't a Mori or Imposter with an attack.

This unit will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored). If this unit gains the Stealth status effect, it will not be lost when ignoring attacks in this way.

SuppressingFireYamatoRegular.name: Suppressing Fire
SuppressingFireYamatoRegular.description:
Weakens all enemies, and grants them a Rage Ward. Enrages all allies. Then immediately give 1 other random ally the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0. Active skills that grant turns cannot be used on turns given by this skill. This skill can be used on such turns, but will not grant the extra turn.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects. Rage Wards will prevent a unit from becoming Enraged once, then be removed. Rage Wards cannot stack.

SurgicalAttackARapunzelRegularBoss.name: Surgical Strike
SurgicalAttackARapunzelRegularBoss.description:
Targets 1 enemy and ignores Guardians. If no enemies are sleeping, deals 100% damage, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If an enemy is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead, Weakens the target and grants the user a power charge.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. Weakening will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

SurgicalAttackARapunzelRegular.name: Surgical Strike
SurgicalAttackARapunzelRegular.description:
Targets 1 enemy and ignores Guardians. If no enemies are sleeping, deals 100% damage, and then grants that enemy the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. Sleep will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If an enemy is sleeping, deals 400% damage instead, Weakens the target and grants the user a Power Charge.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. Weakening will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the target and can be overwritten by Enrage effects. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects.

Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

SurvivalStunSkinAllA.name: Survival Storm Skin
SurvivalStunSkinAllA.description: For another {0}TU, all enemy units get stunned for 50TU whenever this unit is damaged by an enemy attack.

SurvivorAllADeerGirl.name: Survivor's Wrath
SurvivorAllADeerGirl.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, and the effects of skin passive skills. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorAttackATristanRegularBoss.name: Royal Grandioso
SurvivorAttackATristanRegularBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. This skill is usable if all enemies are sleeping or if the user has survived 200TU on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 75TU after use.

SurvivorAttackATristanRegular.name: Royal Grandioso
SurvivorAttackATristanRegular.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. This skill is usable if all enemies are sleeping or if the user has survived 200TU on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 75TU after use.

SurvivorBladeAZoroRegularBoss.name: Survivor's Blade
SurvivorBladeAZoroRegularBoss.description:
This attack ignores Guardians. 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorBladeAZoroRegular.name: Survivor's Blade
SurvivorBladeAZoroRegular.description:
This attack ignores Guardians. 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorBusterA.name: Survivor's Raid
SurvivorBusterA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorBusterDoubleAJeanneBride.name: Survivor's Judgment
SurvivorBusterDoubleAJeanneBride.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies and the user will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, Endure effects cannot stack. This attack ignores the Stealth status effect and enemy damage reduction effects. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorDoubleASnowBlackBrideBoss.name: Restless Fury
SurvivorDoubleASnowBlackBrideBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorDoubleHealPercivalRegular.name: Elemental Eruption
SurvivorDoubleHealPercivalRegular.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies, and heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Enemies damaged by this attack will be granted one of the following effects:
- Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield if they are a Fire or Light unit.
- Mega Poison for 200TU if they are a Storm or Earth unit.
- Stun for 200TU if they are a Water or Dark unit.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again after each use. After the first use, unlocks each time the user damages an enemy with a different attack. Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

SurvivorDoubleIgnoreDeathAUnicornRegular.name: Rainbow Raid
SurvivorDoubleIgnoreDeathAUnicornRegular.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated.

Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorDoubleIgnoreDefeatALuBuRegularBo.name: Scorched Earth
SurvivorDoubleIgnoreDefeatALuBuRegularBo.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 200TU after each use.

SurvivorDoubleIgnoreDefeatALuBuRegular.name: Scorched Earth
SurvivorDoubleIgnoreDefeatALuBuRegular.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the targets from being defeated.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 200TU after each use.

SurvivorDoublePercivalRegularBoss.name: Elemental Explosion
SurvivorDoublePercivalRegularBoss.description:
500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Enemies damaged by this attack will be randomly granted either Sleep for 200TU (even if they have already slept while on the battlefield), Mega Poison for 200TU or Stun for 200TU.

Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again after each use. After the first use, unlocks each time the user damages an enemy with a different attack. Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. This is not considered a Combo Burst type active skill.

SurvivorDrainA.name: Survivor's Drain
SurvivorDrainA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorDrainAJeanneDarkSwimBoss.name: Survivor's Raid+
SurvivorDrainAJeanneDarkSwimBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user is healed for 10% of max HP, and is granted the Stealth status effect with a Stealth Shield. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorDrainAYandereMaidRQBoss.name: Survivor's Drain
SurvivorDrainAYandereMaidRQBoss.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 10% of max HP if damage is dealt. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorDrainDoubleA.name: Survivor's Drain
SurvivorDrainDoubleA.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorFlipAUnicornRegular.name: Chevalier's Grace
SurvivorFlipAUnicornRegular.description:
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

When this unit gets the turn with less than 50% HP, this unit exchanges its current HP with the amount of HP it has currently lost.

Grants all other allies the Armor status effect, and all Enemies 3 Discharge Counters. Triggered both at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield, and when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. New enemies entering the battlefield will be granted 3 Discharge Counters.

Armor will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed. A unit can store a maximum of 3 Discharge Counters, and all are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

SurvivorGroundBusterSnowBlackBrideBoss.name: Restless Fury+
SurvivorGroundBusterSnowBlackBrideBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and passive skill effects that would prevent units from being defeated. Locked for 200TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SurvivorKnockoutAOkitaRegularBoss.name: Trinity Onslaught
SurvivorKnockoutAOkitaRegularBoss.description:
Damage 2 enemies, and then grants those enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU if they are left with below 25% of max HP. 300% damage to targets that have survived 100TU or more, and are not burning. 600% damage to targets that have survived 200TU or more, and are not burning. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

SurvivorKnockoutAOkitaRegular.name: Trinity Onslaught
SurvivorKnockoutAOkitaRegular.description:
Damage 2 enemies, and then grants those enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU if they are left with below 25% of max HP. 300% damage to targets that have survived 100TU or more, and are not burning. 600% damage to targets that have survived 200TU or more, and are not burning. This attack ignores damage reduction effects.

Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on affected enemies. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

SurvivorNonLethalANorzaRegular.name: Arc Rebellion
SurvivorNonLethalANorzaRegular.description: 550% damage to 1 enemy. If this attack would defeat an enemy, that enemy instead survives on 1HP. Locked for 300TU after the user has entered the battlefield.

SweepMaybeCloneAGoemonRegular01.name: Fireworks
SweepMaybeCloneAGoemonRegular01.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Adds a Shadow Double to the next in line of allied reinforcements if a Shadow Double is not next in line in allied reinforcements. This Shadow Double's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user. Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the next unit in allied reinforcements. Usable if this unit's active skill Assassinate is locked.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

SweepMaybeCloneAGoemonRegularBoss.name: Fireworks
SweepMaybeCloneAGoemonRegularBoss.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.

Adds a Shadow Double to the next in line of allied reinforcements if a Shadow Double is not next in line in allied reinforcements. This Shadow Double's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user. Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the next unit in allied reinforcements. Usable if this unit's active skill Assassinate is locked.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

SweepMaybeCloneAGoemonRegular.name: Fireworks
SweepMaybeCloneAGoemonRegular.description:
50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores any enemy status effects (including Stealth), damage reduction effects, revenge passive skills, and skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. All enemies hit by this attack will become Weakened, this will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on those units.
