This Shadow Double's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon, and Accessory will match the user. Then if 4 allies were already on the battlefield, the user exchanges themselves with the next unit in allied reinforcements. Usable if this unit's active skill Assassinate is locked.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

SwoopDownPassiveACalKouhaiRegularBoss.name: Scorching Presence
SwoopDownPassiveACalKouhaiRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

This unit cannot be Stunned if any ally on the battlefield is burning.

While all enemies on the battlefield are burning, this unit has 0.5x of their original Attack added to their Attack. This does stack on top of Enrage effects, and other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.5x => 2.0x total)

At the end of each of this unit's turns, all burning enemies on the battlefield will be stunned for 25TU.

Each time this unit damages a burning enemy with an attack, a random burning ally will have their TU reduced to 0 at the end of the turn. This cannot trigger unless there are 2 burning allies on the battlefield.

Each time an ally unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit will gain a Charge. If that enemy was burning, a random ally will be granted Piercing. A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

SwoopDownPassiveACalKouhaiRegular.name: Scorching Descent
SwoopDownPassiveACalKouhaiRegular.description:
When this unit enters battle, all allies are granted Instant Death Wards. Then at the end of the turn, all enemies on the battlefield will be granted the Burn status effect. An Instant Death Ward prevents a unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects.

This unit cannot be Stunned if any ally on the battlefield is burning.

While all enemies on the battlefield are burning, this unit has 0.5x of their original Attack added to their Attack. This does stack on top of Enrage effects, and other Attack increases (e.g. 1.5x + 0.5x => 2.0x total)

At the end of each of this unit's turns, all burning enemies on the battlefield will be stunned for 25TU.

Each time this unit damages a burning enemy with an attack, a random burning ally will have their TU reduced to 0 at the end of the turn. This cannot trigger unless there are 2 burning allies on the battlefield.

Each time an ally unit damages an enemy with an attack, this unit will gain a Charge. If that enemy was burning, a random ally will be granted Piercing. A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store up to 3 charges and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

SwoopInPassiveABahamutGirlRegular.name: Dragon's Might
SwoopInPassiveABahamutGirlRegular.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

This unit enters battle with the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU, a Burn Shield, and 3 Charges. Burn Shields prevent the next non-burn status effect a unit would gain while Burning from applying.

If this unit would be defeated while it has any charges, this unit will consume 1 charge to survive with 1HP remaining instead.

If this unit is burning, each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will spend a Charge to heal for 100% of max HP and immediately get the turn by having its TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. stuns targeting the lowest TU target). This is not considered a Counter Skin type effect.

TauntSingleA.name: Taunt
TauntSingleA.description: The user Taunts 1 enemy. On the taunted unit's turns, the user will become a Guardian, and cannot be defeated on those turns. This taunt will end when the taunted unit deals damage to the user with an attack, or if either the user or the taunted unit leaves the battlefield. For any enemy attack that would hit 1 or 2 other allies while the user is a Guardian, 1 of the hits is instead redirected to the user. The user will not redirect skills that don't deal damage. The user will no longer be considered a Guardian when the taunt ends, so some active skill effects that target Guardians may fail to affect the user. This skill becomes locked after use until the user activates another active skill, and cannot be used if any enemy is already taunted.

TeamAttackACthulhuGirlRegularBoss.name: No One Escapes
TeamAttackACthulhuGirlRegularBoss.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. Sets both enemy and ally Spirit to 5. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

TeamAttackACthulhuGirlRegular.name: No One Is Safe
TeamAttackACthulhuGirlRegular.description: 300% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Stealth Status Effect. Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack. Sets both enemy and ally Spirit to 5. This skill is locked until it becomes unlocked by Infect Reality. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

TeamBuffACleopatraDark.name: Dread Fumes
TeamBuffACleopatraDark.description:
Grants all non-burning allies Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and heals them for 500% of the user's attack. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies. Allies gain 1 Spirit for each Poisoned or Sleeping enemy on the battlefield. Then each non-burning enemy is randomly granted either Mega Poison for 200TU or Cursed Sleep for 200TU.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

TeamBuffsPercivalRegularBoss.name: Royal Blightburst
TeamBuffsPercivalRegularBoss.description:
The user becomes Enraged, and is granted either a Stun Ward or Sleep Ward at random. Heals all allies for 200% of the user's Attack and Weakens all enemies. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

TeamBuffsPercivalRegular.name: Royal Blightburst
TeamBuffsPercivalRegular.description:
The user becomes Enraged, and is granted either a Stun Ward or Sleep Ward at random. Heals all allies for 400% of the user's Attack and Weakens all enemies. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. These effects will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

TeamDisruptionALudmillaYukata.name: Flower Shower
TeamDisruptionALudmillaYukata.description:
Randomly grants each non-burning ally either a Stun Ward, Sleep Ward, or Poison Ward and Purifies them.

If the user's current HP is at 50% or less, exchanges the user's current HP with the amount of HP the user has currently lost.

Weakens all enemies.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

TeamRestoreRageTUReducAHimikoBoss.name: Bright Reflection
TeamRestoreRageTUReducAHimikoBoss.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack and Purifies them. Allies other than the user also become Enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and their current TU is reduced by 50 if their current TU is 50 or more.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. While this skill is locked, allies cannot enter the battlefield from reinforcements. When any unit gets the turn after this lock expires, the lowest TU enemy will be stunned for 50TU, and then the user will be Purified (even if sleeping) and get the next turn by having their TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

TeamRestoreRageTUReducAHimiko.name: Divine Reflection
TeamRestoreRageTUReducAHimiko.description:
Heals all allies for 800% of the user's Attack and Purifies them. Allies other than the user also become Enraged, having their attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn, and their current TU is reduced by 50 if their current TU is 50 or more.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. When any unit gets the turn after this lock expires, the lowest TU enemy will be stunned for 50TU, and then the user will be Purified (even if sleeping) and get the next turn instead by having their TU reduced to 0. This extra turn may be interrupted by other effects that influence the turn order (e.g. other stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

TemporalResistanceAChronosRegularBoss.name: Primordial Power
TemporalResistanceAChronosRegularBoss.description:
Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 1% of its max HP.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever an ally on the battlefield damages any number of units with 100TU or more with an attack, Allies gain 2 Spirit at the end of the turn.

TemporalResistanceAChronosRegular.name: Primordial Might
TemporalResistanceAChronosRegular.description:
Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 30% of its max HP.

If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger once each time this unit enters the battlefield. Whenever an ally on the battlefield damages any number of units with 100TU or more with an attack, Allies gain 2 Spirit at the end of the turn. Then If Allies have 10 Spirit, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

TenSpiritAttackAGenieRegularBoss.name: B. A. M.
TenSpiritAttackAGenieRegularBoss.description:
800% damage to 1 enemy, and randomly grants that enemy either Stun for 200TU, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and revenge passive skills. If Ally Spirit is at 0, allies gain 5 Spirit. If Ally Spirit is at 10, allies lose 5 Spirit. Usable if allies have 0 or 10 Spirit.

Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

TenSpiritAttackAGenieRegular.name: Big Awesome Move
TenSpiritAttackAGenieRegular.description:
800% damage to 1 enemy, and randomly grants that enemy either Stun for 200TU, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Sleep for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and revenge passive skills. If Ally Spirit is at 0, allies gain 5 Spirit. If Ally Spirit is at 10, allies lose 5 Spirit. Usable if allies have 0 or 10 Spirit.

Sleep and Mega Poison will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

ThornAlliesAIbarahimeBoss.name: An Ashen Garden
ThornAlliesAIbarahimeBoss.description:
Heals all non-burning allies for 10% of their max HP and grants them Sleep Thorns. When an ally with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that ally's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Usable if there are no Sleep Thorns on allies and the user is not burning.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

ThornAlliesAIbarahime.name: An Ashen Garden
ThornAlliesAIbarahime.description:
Heals all non-burning allies for 500% of the user's Attack and grants them Sleep Thorns. When an ally with Sleep Thorns is dealt damage by an attack, that ally's Sleep Thorns will be consumed to immediately grant the Cursed Sleep status effect to the attacker. Burn or attacks that grant Burn will remove Sleep Thorns and prevent Cursed Sleep from applying. Usable if there are no Sleep Thorns on allies and the user is not burning.

Cursed Sleep will overwrite status effects other than Burn, cannot be overwritten by Poison, can be applied repeatedly to units that have already slept while on the battlefield, and will not end from damage caused by Dream Hunter type active skills.

ThornBlastAIbarahimeBoss.name: Thorn Raid
ThornBlastAIbarahimeBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. That enemy will also become Poisoned if they were not burning, this will overwrite any other status effect on that unit. Consumes Sleep Thorns from a random ally that has them after dealing damage. Usable if an ally has Sleep Thorns or if the user has no allies on the battlefield.

ThornBlastAIbarahime.name: Thorn Raid
ThornBlastAIbarahime.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they do not have the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. That enemy will also become Poisoned if they were not burning, this will overwrite any other status effect on that unit. Consumes Sleep Thorns from a random ally that has them after dealing damage. Usable if an ally has Sleep Thorns or if the user has no allies on the battlefield.

ThornSleepEnchantmentKaguyahime.name: Lunar Curse
ThornSleepEnchantmentKaguyahime.description:
Grants a random enemy the Cursed Sleep status effect for 200TU. 20% chance plus 20% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to trigger after each enemy turn if no enemy is sleeping already.

When this unit enters battle (whether at the start of battle or from reinforcements) it will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP.

Whenever a Sleeping enemy gets a turn, this unit heals 50% of its max HP and will again Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. Endure effects cannot stack.

Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 50TU.

ThornyEnduranceACrossSwordKnightDarkBoss.name: Dangerous Thorns
ThornyEnduranceACrossSwordKnightDarkBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

All non-burning allies gain Sleep Thorns. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield.

If this unit has Sleep Thorns, this unit cannot be granted Poison, Sleep, or Stuns.

ThornyEnduranceACrossSwordKnightDark.name: Killer Thorns
ThornyEnduranceACrossSwordKnightDark.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

All non-burning allies gain Sleep Thorns. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield.

If this unit has Sleep Thorns, this unit cannot be granted Poison, Sleep, or Stuns. Each time this unit takes damage from an attack while it has Sleep Thorns and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will heal for 50% of its max HP.

ThrowDrainA.name: Blood Drain
ThrowDrainA.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements for 400% damage to 1 enemy and heals the user for 50% of max HP if damage is dealt. Usable only if there are 1 or more allied reinforcements left.

ThrowDrainSpiritDrainA.name: Blood Vampire
ThrowDrainSpiritDrainA.description: Sacrifices the last unit in the allied reinforcements for 500% damage to 1 enemy. If damage is dealt, the user is healed for 50% of max HP and steals 1 Spirit from the enemy team. Usable only if there are 1 or more allied reinforcements left.

ThrowKnivesAYandereMaidDarkBoss.name: Throw Knives
ThrowKnivesAYandereMaidDarkBoss.description:
500% damage to 1 random enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit has its Poison Wards removed, burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Super Poison, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

ThrowKnivesAYandereMaidDark.name: Throw Knives
ThrowKnivesAYandereMaidDark.description:
500% damage to 1 random enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit has its Poison Wards removed, burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Super Poison, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.

TidalWaveAMermaidRegularBoss.name: Ocean Sweep
TidalWaveAMermaidRegularBoss.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each sleeping enemy (500% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects and removes any Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from all hit targets.

TidalWaveAMermaidRegular.name: Ocean Sweep
TidalWaveAMermaidRegular.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each sleeping enemy (500% max). This attack ignores damage reduction effects and removes any Burn status effects (including Mega Healing Burn) from all hit targets.

TimeBreakerPassiveARoundTableKnightDarkB.name: Stable Aim
TimeBreakerPassiveARoundTableKnightDarkB.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep if there are any Water enemies on the battlefield.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

If this unit damages at least one enemy with 100+TU with an attack, this unit will get another turn. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

TimeBreakerPassiveARoundTableKnightDark.name: Steady Aim
TimeBreakerPassiveARoundTableKnightDark.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep if there are any Water enemies on the battlefield. Each time a poisoned enemy gets the turn, this unit heals for 20% of its max HP.

If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

If this unit damages at least one enemy with 100+TU with an attack, this unit will get another turn. Damaged targets cannot trigger this effect again until TU advances. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

TimeBusterDoubleAAntaresModernBoss.name: Time Assassin
TimeBusterDoubleAAntaresModernBoss.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they have 100TU or more in the turn order. 600% damage if the target has 130TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

TimeBusterDoubleA.name: Time Assassin
TimeBusterDoubleA.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they have 130TU or more in the turn order. 600% damage if the target has 200TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

TimeBusterDrainA.name: Time Drain Raid
TimeBusterDrainA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they have 130+ TU. 600% damage if the target has 200TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, and heals the user for 100% of total damage dealt.

TimeBusterPlusStealthARoundTableKnightBo.name: Royal Swiftslash
TimeBusterPlusStealthARoundTableKnightBo.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy if they have 100+ TU. 500% damage if the target has 130TU or more. 600% damage if the target has 200TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user also gains the Stealth status effect if the target has 100TU or more. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

TimeBusterPlusStealthARoundTableKnight.name: Royal Swiftslash
TimeBusterPlusStealthARoundTableKnight.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy if they have 100+ TU. 500% damage if the target has 130TU or more. 600% damage if the target has 200TU or more. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. The user also gains the Stealth status effect if the target has 100TU or more. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

TimeChargeBusterPlusAHimikoBoss.name: Time Dominator
TimeChargeBusterPlusAHimikoBoss.description: Targets 1 enemy. If the target has 100+ TU, deals 500% damage and the user gains a Power Charge. If the target does not have 100+ TU but the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to still deal 500% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

TimeChargeBusterPlusAHimiko.name: Time Dominator
TimeChargeBusterPlusAHimiko.description: Targets 1 enemy. If the target has 100+ TU, deals 500% damage and the user gains a Power Charge. If the target does not have 100+ TU but the user has a Power Charge, it will be consumed to still deal 500% damage. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects.

TimeDrainA.name: Time Drain
TimeDrainA.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they have 130+ TU. 600% damage if the target has 200TU or more. If damage is dealt and the target's TU is 130 or more, the user will heal 50% of max HP.

TimeDrainPlusA.name: Time Drain+
TimeDrainPlusA.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy if they have 100+ TU. 500% damage if the target has 130TU or more. 600% damage if the target has 200TU or more. If damage is dealt and the target's TU is 100 or more, the user will heal 50% of max HP.

TimeSniperAAir.name: Time Chaser
TimeSniperAAir.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they have 150TU or more in the turn order. 600% damage if the target has 200TU or more. This attack ignores Guardians. Usable only if there is at least 1 other Storm ally.

TimeSniperAMaskElf.name: Time Chaser
TimeSniperAMaskElf.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they have 130TU or more in the turn order. This attack ignores Guardians.

TimeStopAChronosRegularBoss.name: Time Freeze
TimeStopAChronosRegularBoss.description:
Activates Time Freeze For 100TU. While Time Freeze is active, the user:
- Cannot be defeated by Poison or Burn damage (including Lethal Poison).
- Is immune to Poison, and Burn status effects.
- Has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This does not stack with Quicken effects.
- Disables the Active Skills of all other units on the battlefield (including new units that enter from reinforcements).

When Time Freeze expires, all allies will be healed for 10% of max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and all non-boss enemies on the battlefield that are below 10% of their max HP will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack) . This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated.

Usable once per battle. The effects of Time Freeze cannot be Purified and will be cancelled if the user is defeated. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping.

TimeStopAChronosRegular.name: Time Stop
TimeStopAChronosRegular.description:
Activates Time Stop For 100TU. While Time Stop is active, the user:
- Cannot be defeated by Poison or Burn damage (including Lethal Poison).
- Is immune to Poison, and Burn status effects.
- Has their Active Skill TU Costs reduced by 50%. This does not stack with Quicken effects.
- Disables the Active Skills of all other units on the battlefield (including new units that enter from reinforcements).

When Time Stop expires, all allies will be healed for 100% of max HP and be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and all non-boss enemies on the battlefield that are below 10% of their max HP will be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated those enemies with an attack). This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Time Stop expiring may trigger before or after other effects.

Usable once per battle. The effects of Time Stop cannot be Purified and will be cancelled if the user is defeated. When a unit's Active Skills are disabled and they get the turn, they will lose the turn as if they were sleeping.

TimeStrikeAllPlusARolotiaNewBoss.name: Giga Time Strike
TimeStrikeAllPlusARolotiaNewBoss.description: 500% damage to all enemies if they have 100TU or more in the turn order. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Allies lose 1 Spirit for each enemy at 100TU or more hit by this attack. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

TimeStrikeAllPlusARolotiaNew.name: Giga Time Strike
TimeStrikeAllPlusARolotiaNew.description: 500% damage to all enemies if they have 100TU or more in the turn order. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Allies lose 1 Spirit for each enemy at 100TU or more hit by this attack. This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use if Allies would lose more Spirit than they have in this way. Other effects that would cause Allies to lose Spirit may apply before Spirit lost by this skill.

TimeStrikeAllPlusBRolotiaNewBoss.name: Giga Time Strike
TimeStrikeAllPlusBRolotiaNewBoss.description: 500% damage to all enemies if they have 100TU or more in the turn order. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect and the effects of Skin passive skills. Allies lose 1 Spirit for each enemy at 100TU or more hit by this attack.

TimeStrikeANorzaMagnifo.name: Time Chaser
TimeStrikeANorzaMagnifo.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they have 150TU or more in the turn order. This attack ignores Guardians.

TimeStrikeArgento.name: Time Strike
TimeStrikeArgento.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they have 150TU or more in the turn order. This attack ignores Guardians.

TimeWipeAKingArthurSwimsuitBoss.name: Regal Wavemaster
TimeWipeAKingArthurSwimsuitBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they have 100TU or more in the turn order. If this damage does not defeat the target, allies gain 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

TimeWipeAKingArthurSwimsuit.name: Regal Wavemaster
TimeWipeAKingArthurSwimsuit.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy if they have 150TU or more in the turn order. If this damage does not defeat the target, allies gain 2 Spirit. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

TurboMegaPoisonPassiveAKaguyahimeDarkBos.name: Harsh Venom
TurboMegaPoisonPassiveAKaguyahimeDarkBos.description:
If no enemy is Mega Poisoned already, these trigger after each enemy turn:
- Grants a random enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.
- This unit is healed for 1% of its max HP.
- This unit is granted a Poison Ward and Stealth.

Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit heals for 1% of its max HP and is granted a Poison Ward and Stealth. Poison Ward prevents Poison from being applied once, then is removed. Poison Wards cannot stack.

TurboMegaPoisonPassiveAKaguyahimeDark.name: Lunar Venom
TurboMegaPoisonPassiveAKaguyahimeDark.description:
Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit heals for 20% of its max HP and is granted a Poison Ward and Stealth. Poison Ward prevents Poison from being applied once, then is removed. Poison Wards cannot stack.

If no enemy is Mega Poisoned already, these trigger after each enemy turn:
- Grants a random enemy the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU.
- This unit is healed for 100% of its max HP.
- This unit is granted a Poison Ward and Stealth.

UltimateAttackACrossSwordKnightDarkBoss.name: Cursed End
UltimateAttackACrossSwordKnightDarkBoss.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

UltimateAttackACrossSwordKnightDark.name: Cursed End
UltimateAttackACrossSwordKnightDark.description: 600% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects and any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Usable only if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

UltimateDoubleAttackADaVinciRegularBoss.name: Astral Blast
UltimateDoubleAttackADaVinciRegularBoss.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. If damage is dealt to 2 targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Usable if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

UltimateDoubleAttackADaVinciRegular.name: Astral Ascension
UltimateDoubleAttackADaVinciRegular.description:
600% damage to 2 enemies, the user is granted Recovery Mist for 100TU and cannot be Stunned for 100TU. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies. If damage is dealt to 2 targets, the user will immediately get the next turn by having its TU reduced to 0. Usable if the user has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

A unit with Recovery Mist will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn. Recovery Mist effects do not stack.

UltimateShieldAKingArthurSwimsuitBoss.name: King's Aegis
UltimateShieldAKingArthurSwimsuitBoss.description:
The user is granted Stealth, a Stealth Shield, and a Poison Ward. This skill becomes locked for 3TU after use. Usable 5 times per battle.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Wards will prevent their named effect from applying to that ally once, then be removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducBoss.name: Dream Resistance
UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducBoss.description: When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 100% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv1.name: Dream Defense
UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv1.description: When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 40% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv2.name: Dream Defense
UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv2.description: When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 55% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv3.name: Dream Defense
UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv3.description: When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 70% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv4.name: Dream Defense
UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv4.description: When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 85% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv5.name: Dream Defense
UnkillableByAttacksAnd50DamageReducLv5.description: When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 100% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

UnkillableSleepIbarahimeSwimsuitBoss.name: Dream Resistance
UnkillableSleepIbarahimeSwimsuitBoss.description:
When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 100% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP.

Each time a sleeping ally gets the turn, they will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken, Weaken and Enrage skills on that ally.

UnkillableSleepIbarahimeSwimsuit.name: Dream Defense
UnkillableSleepIbarahimeSwimsuit.description:
When another unit on the battlefield is sleeping, this unit gains 50% damage reduction from attacks and has a 40% chance to survive any attack that would defeat this unit with 1HP, plus 15% per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings).

Each time a sleeping ally gets the turn, they will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken, Weaken and Enrage skills on that ally.

UserBuffAMusashiDark.name: Dark Heaven Style
UserBuffAMusashiDark.description:
The user will enter Dark Heaven Stance for 150TU. While in Dark Heaven Stance, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target All allies will not be ignored), and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. Usable if this unit has not defeated any units with attacks while on the battlefield.

VanguardBarrierALudmillaNew.name: Barrier of Light
VanguardBarrierALudmillaNew.description:
When this unit enters the battlefield and at the end of each turn, if there is no ally Guardian on the battlefield, this unit will become a Stun Absorber (Whenever any ally would be affected by stun, this unit takes the stun instead). At end of each turn, if there is an ally Guardian on the battlefield, this unit will stop being a Stun Absorber.

This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks, and is not affected by damage reduction effects granted by ally Barrier type skills.

Grants all other allies 35% damage reduction from attacks while this unit is on the battlefield and there is no Guardian among allies. This effect does not stack with itself if another ally has this passive skill, or with other Barrier type skills.

Each time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, Weaken all enemies. If this unit survives until after the end of the turn with more than 1 HP, this unit will gain 1 Charge and heal 30% of max HP.

VengeanceBrushAHokusaiRegularBoss.name: Elemental Burst
VengeanceBrushAHokusaiRegularBoss.description: Damage 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. 300% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefiled. 400% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

VengeanceBrushAHokusaiRegular.name: Stroke of Genius
VengeanceBrushAHokusaiRegular.description: Damage 1 enemy. This attack ignores any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. 300% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 1 unit with an attack while on the battlefiled. 400% damage instead if the user or target have defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

VicariousBloodfuryACyrusBoss.name: Fatal Inspiration
VicariousBloodfuryACyrusBoss.description: 1000% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores damage reduction effects and any passive skills or effects of active skills of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Unlocked each time an enemy on the battlefield that was not conjured during battle is defeated or sacrificed by any source. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

VictoryCannonYamatoRegular.name: Victory Cannon
VictoryCannonYamatoRegular.description:
1500% damage to 1 enemy. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Unlocked each time a non-conjured enemy or non-conjured ally is defeated or sacrificed by any source other than the user. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.

VictoryChantPassiveANikeRegularBoss.name: Triumphant Cry
VictoryChantPassiveANikeRegularBoss.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep.

When this unit enters battle, for 200TU, at the end of each turn an ally gets, the ally:
- will heal for 1% of their max HP.
- will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed).
- may gain a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward and a Poison Ward (50% chance for each ward).
This effect will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

If all allies on the battlefield are at max HP when this unit enters battle, this unit gains a Power Charge.

VictoryChantPassiveANikeRegular.name: Victory Cry
VictoryChantPassiveANikeRegular.description:
This unit cannot fall asleep.

When this unit enters battle, for 200TU, at the end of each turn an ally gets, the ally:
- will heal for 10% of their max HP, plus 10% per Awakening Nike has (up to 50% if Nike has 4 Awakenings).
- will have Sleep and Poison status effects other than Lethal Poison removed.
- may gain a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward and a Poison Ward (50% chance for each ward).
This effect will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

If all allies on the battlefield are at max HP when this unit enters battle, this unit gains a Power Charge and Intense Rage. Otherwise, all allies are healed for 100% of their max HP, Purified, and may gain a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, and a Poison Ward (50% chance for each ward).

Intense Rage increases a units Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be by Weak effects.

VigorDoubleBlastAGenieRegularBoss.name: Lamp Blast
VigorDoubleBlastAGenieRegularBoss.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage if the user's HP is at 75%+. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

VigorDoubleBlastAGenieRegular.name: Lamp Blast
VigorDoubleBlastAGenieRegular.description: 100% damage to 2 enemies. 400% damage if the user's HP is at 75%+. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

VigorousStingARoundTableKnightDarkBoss.name: Toxic Shot
VigorousStingARoundTableKnightDarkBoss.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user's HP is at 75%+. Grants the target the Super Poison status effect. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and steals up to 3 Spirit from enemies.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

VigorousStingARoundTableKnightDark.name: Toxic Shot
VigorousStingARoundTableKnightDark.description:
50% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the user's HP is at 75%+. Grants the target the Super Poison status effect. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and steals up to 3 Spirit from enemies.

Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.

VigorRushDownAGokuDarkBoss.name: Prime Blow
VigorRushDownAGokuDarkBoss.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

VigorRushDownAGokuDark.name: Prime Blow
VigorRushDownAGokuDark.description: 400% damage to 1 enemy. Usable only if the user's HP is at 75%+.

VorpSpeedIgnoreBlockDeathCinderellaDark.name: Berserker Form
VorpSpeedIgnoreBlockDeathCinderellaDark.description: This unit's active skill TU costs are reduced by 40%, and this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated. Berserker Form will end when this unit defeats an enemy with an attack.

WarGirlPassiveARyomaRegularBoss.name: Vow To Protect
WarGirlPassiveARyomaRegularBoss.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While there is another Earth ally on the battlefield, this unit has 75% damage reduction instead.

When another non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit is granted Sleep Thorns unless burning.

WarGirlPassiveARyomaRegular.name: Unbroken Vow
WarGirlPassiveARyomaRegular.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks. While there is another Earth ally on the battlefield, this unit has 75% damage reduction instead.

When another non-conjured unit on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit heals for 100% of max HP and if not burning is granted Sleep Thorns.

This unit has burn removed and is granted Burn Immunity for 100TU whenever:
- This unit enters battle, and there is a Water ally on the battlefield.
- A Water ally enters the battlefield from reinforcements.

WarGodFreya.name: War Goddess
WarGodFreya.description: This unit will gain the Burn status effect whenever it deals damage with or is dealt damage by an attack while this unit is not sleeping, this will overwrite other status effects on the user. If this unit is already burning when this triggers, it will become Enraged, this will overwrite the effect of other Enrage skills. If this unit is already enraged as well as burning, allies will gain 1 Spirit. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

WarModePassiveAFreyaNewBoss.name: Beauty and War
WarModePassiveAFreyaNewBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with Mega Healing Burn for 100TU.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects, and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit's attacks ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent their targets from being defeated.

When this unit takes damage from an attack, they will immediately get the next turn, this cannot trigger again until TU advances. This is a Skin effect.

This unit becomes Enraged at the end of its turns if this unit is Burning. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

Whenever another enemy unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements this unit will have its TU reduced to 0.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. Mega Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

WarModePassiveAFreyaNew.name: Love and War
WarModePassiveAFreyaNew.description:
This unit enters battle with an Instant Death Ward, and Mega Healing Burn for 100TU.

This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects, and cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit's attacks heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt, and ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent their targets from being defeated.

The first time this unit takes damage from an attack and survives until after the end of the turn, this unit will enter War Frenzy for 100TU, and have its TU reduced to 0. While in War Frenzy:
- This unit's attacks ignore damage reduction effects.
- When this unit takes damage from an attack, they will immediately get the next turn, this cannot trigger again until TU advances. This is a Skin effect.
- This unit becomes Enraged at the end of its turns if this unit is Burning. This will overwrite the effects of other Enrage skills on this unit. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

Whenever an enemy enters the battlefield from reinforcements, this unit has a 20% chance, plus 20% chance per Awakening (up to 100% chance if this unit has 4 Awakenings) to immediately have its TU reduced to 0,  and be granted the Burn status effect.

A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. Mega Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.

WarQueenPassiveAVictoriaRegularBoss.name: Étoile's Grace
WarQueenPassiveAVictoriaRegularBoss.description:
This unit enters battle with a Power Charge. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks for 100TU.

If this unit would be defeated while it has a Power Charge, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. The Power Charge will be consumed when this effect is triggered.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, this unit will become Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of that turn.

Each time an enemy gets the turn, this unit will become Enraged at the end of that turn. An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on this unit.

Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

WarQueenPassiveAVictoriaRegular.name: Queen's Grace
WarQueenPassiveAVictoriaRegular.description:
This unit enters battle with 10% HP Regen for 200TU, a Power Charge and an Instant Death Ward. This unit has 80% damage reduction from attacks for 100TU.

If this unit would be defeated while it has a Power Charge, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. The Power Charge will be consumed when this effect is triggered.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, all allies on the battlefield are healed for 100% of their max HP, and granted an Instant Death Ward.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, this unit will become Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed) at the end of that turn.

Each time an enemy gets the turn, this unit will become Enraged at the end of that turn. An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on this unit.

An Instant Death Ward prevents this unit from being immediately defeated without damage by a non-boss enemy once, then is removed. Instant Death Wards cannot be ignored and cannot stack. A unit with 10% HP Regen will heal for 10% of their max HP after every turn. HP Regen effects will overwrite existing HP Regen effects. Power Charges can be consumed by certain skills to activate or enhance their effects. Power Charges will be removed if this unit leaves the battlefield. Power Charges cannot stack.

WatchMeDancePassiveABalletBoss.name: Dancing Sword
WatchMeDancePassiveABalletBoss.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

This unit's attacks ignore Guardians, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water, Earth or Dark, Stun them for 100TU, and grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU.
- Fire, Storm or Light, Weaken them, and grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on that unit.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, all allies are Purified. Then all other allies are given the next turns by reducing their current TU. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turn (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

Mega Poison and Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

WatchMeDancePassiveALudmillaBallet01.name: Dancing Knight
WatchMeDancePassiveALudmillaBallet01.description:
This unit cannot be sent to the reinforcements from the battlefield.

Each time an ally (including this unit) gets the turn, this unit will heal for 25% of their max HP.

This unit's attacks ignore Guardians, any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated, enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, the effects of Skin passive skills, and heal this unit for 100% of total damage dealt.

When this unit damages an enemy with an attack, if they are:
- Water, Earth or Dark, Stun them for 100TU, and grant them the Mega Poison status effect for 100TU.
- Fire, Storm or Light, Weaken them, and grant them the Sleep status effect for 100TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on that unit.

Whenever this unit defeats a non-conjured enemy with an attack, all allies are Purified. Then all other allies are given the next turns by reducing their current TU. Effects that influence TU order may interrupt the extra turns (e.g. Stuns targeting the lowest TU target).

If this unit has defeated a non-conjured enemy with an attack while on the battlefield, Clarice is added to the very front of allied reinforcements when this unit is defeated by an enemy attack. This is not considered a Revenge passive skill. Clarice's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

Mega Poison and Sleep will overwrite other status effects on those units. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison. Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

waterAtkLimit.description: <color=#00edf6>Water Bane:</color> {0}% Attack increase against Water units

WeakenAllAMusashiRegularBoss.name: Sword Virtuoso
WeakenAllAMusashiRegularBoss.description:
Weakens all enemies. The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, will Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP, and gains the Armor status effect. Armor grants 50% damage reduction from the next attack, then the effect is removed.

Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards and Endure effects cannot stack. This skill becomes locked for 20TU after use. Usable if this unit has not defeated any units with attacks or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. This effect will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on affected units. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

WeakeningPaintAHokusaiRegularBoss.name: Elemental Strike
WeakeningPaintAHokusaiRegularBoss.description:
Damage to 1 enemy and Weaken them. Then enemies lose Spirit equal to the number of Element types that remain on the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

WeakeningPaintAHokusaiRegular.name: Blot Out
WeakeningPaintAHokusaiRegular.description:
Damage to 1 enemy and Weaken them. Then enemies lose Spirit equal to the number of Element types that remain on the battlefield.

Weakened units have their Attack reduced to 0.75x until the end of their next turn. The effect of Weakening may be diminished if the affected unit's Attack is increased by other effects and it can be overwritten by Enrage effects.

WoodenKeyAttackAPinocchioRegularBoss.name: Lock Smasher
WoodenKeyAttackAPinocchioRegularBoss.description: 200% damage to 1 enemy. 400% damage instead if the target has the Burn status effect. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills.

WoodenKeyAttackAPinocchioRegular.name: Lock Breaker
WoodenKeyAttackAPinocchioRegular.description:
200% damage to 1 enemy. 500% damage instead if the target does not have the Burn status effect. Grants the user Stealth, and a Stealth Shield. Randomly grants either Stun Wards, Sleep Wards, or Poison Wards to all allies. This attack ignores enemy damage reduction effects, the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. Damage from this attack does not wake up sleeping enemies.

Stealth will overwrite other Status effects on the user. Stealth Shields prevent the next non-stealth status effect a unit would gain while Stealthed from applying. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards cannot stack.

ZeroSpiritAllAttackAGenieRegularBoss.name: Golden Sandstorm
ZeroSpiritAllAttackAGenieRegularBoss.description: 50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with another attack.

ZeroSpiritAllAttackAGenieRegular.name: Golden Sandstorm
ZeroSpiritAllAttackAGenieRegular.description: 50% damage to all enemies. This attack ignores the Counter Stance Status Effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill locks after use, and unlocks when this unit damages an enemy with another attack.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Quicken Burn
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: All allies that have the Burn status effect will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of other Quicken skills.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Afternoon Tea
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
Grants all enemies the Sleep status effect for 200TU, even if they have already slept while on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. Then for each enemy that is not asleep (e.g. due to a Sleep Ward), allies gain 3 Spirit.

This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. If all enemy units on the battlefield are Fire or have Burn Blast, or Burn Drive type active skills, this skill becomes locked for 100TU after use instead.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Poisoned Tea
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
Grants all enemies the Mega Poison status effect for 200TU. This will overwrite other status effects on those units. For each enemy that does not become poisoned (e.g. due to a Poison Ward), allies gain 3 Spirit.

This skill becomes locked for 100TU after use.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Poison Garden
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: Whenever another Earth ally ends their turn with 0 Spirit, allies gain 2 Spirit. Triggers only if there are 2 or more enemies with the poison status.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Infected
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: This unit is Infected with Burn. After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Burn to a random non-burning ally. Infection ends after 3 triggers.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Flame of Apollo
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: This unit always counts as having the Burn status effect for skills that count or affect burning units. This unit cannot gain the Burn status effect. Any unit that is dealt damage by this unit will become burned, attacking this unit will not cause units to become burned. This unit cannot become a Stun Absorber.
